fields.schemeName: “Training in Coir” Component of the "Development of Coir" Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Training in Coir” by the Dept of Industries and Commerce, UT of Puducherry aims to promote and develop Coir and Coir-based industries in the region. Additionally, it focuses on providing a 6-month training to the rural poor in producing coir products to generate employment.

fields.schemeName: Supply of Agriculture Machineries Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to distribute and sale of agricultural machinery such as Power Tillers, etc. to farmers at subsidized rates.

fields.schemeName: Nirman Shramik Avm Unke Aashrit Bacchon Dwara Bhartiya Rajasthan Prashasnik Seva Hetu Aayojit Pratibhabhik Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Labor department of Rajasthan started "Nirman Shramik Avm Unke Aashrit Bacchon Dwara Bhartiya Rajasthan Prashasnik Seva Hetu Aayojit Pratibhabhik Yojana" to help the children of construction workers.

fields.schemeName: Pension Benefit (ANBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, pension shall be provided to the Building and Other Construction Workers who are registered under the A&N Islands Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board upon attaining the age of 55 years.

fields.schemeName: Laxman Award / Rani Laxmi Bai Award Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Laxman Award/Rani Laxmi Bai Award” was launched by the Department of Sports, Government of Uttar Pradesh to honor special sports personalities of the state. The Laxman award is to male sportspersons and the Rani Laxmi Bai award is given to female sportspersons.

fields.schemeName: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Disability Allowance Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to the differently able unemployed persons with 40% disability or more in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

fields.schemeName: Free Medical Card for Media Persons
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides free medical facilities to press correspondents and members of their families in Government hospitals /institutions under the control of the Administration. This will include free treatment in Government hospitals /institutions with entitlement to A-Class Special Wards..

fields.schemeName: Nirman Shramikon ke Liye Vyavsayik Rin Par Byaj ki Punarbharan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The "Nirman Shramik Rin Punarbharan Yojana" helps construction workers by reimbursing interest on their business loans. This program aims to ease the financial burden of construction workers by reducing their loan interest payments.

fields.schemeName: Disability Pension (MBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, the Board shall provide disability pension to a beneficiary who is permanently disabled due to paralysis, leprosy, T.B., accidents,etc. Additionally, workers will be eligible for an exgratia payment based on percentage of disability & subject to condition as may fixed by the Board.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Pension Benefits to the Journalists/Photojournalists
fields.briefDescription: "Scheme for Pension Benefits to the Journalists/photojournalists" was launched by the Department of Information and Cultural Affairs, Govt. of Tripura aims to provide financial assistance in the form of a Pension of ₹1000/- to retired Journalists/ photojournalists.

fields.schemeName: Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan - Internship Program
fields.briefDescription: The 'Internship Program' as part of the Framework for Implementation of Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Revamped Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) (2022-23 to 2025-26) of the Ministry of Panchayati Raj (MoPR), Government of India (Gol), seeks to engage 'Students'.

fields.schemeName: Assistance For Purchase of Aids/Appliances
fields.briefDescription: The "Assistance for Purchase of Aids/Appliances" scheme is to provide support to individuals with disabilities by facilitating access to assistive devices and appliances.

fields.schemeName: Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Kaushal Sanvardhan Yojna -RS-CIT
fields.briefDescription: The objective of Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Kaushal Sanvardhan Yojna is to provide empowerment to the girls and women of the state in the field of computers by providing free computer courses to them.

fields.schemeName: Skill Development Scheme (PBAOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The Board is implementing this scheme by entering an MoU with M/s Labour Net Services Private Limited and M/s G&G Skill Developers Private Limited, to provide training to the Construction Workers enrolled as beneficiaries in the Board. The applications are accepted offline.

fields.schemeName: Relief under Natural Calamity / Pandemic Period (PBAOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The Board provides financial assistance of ₹ 2,000/- to the registered worker as a relief during a natural calamity/pandemic. The amount is credited through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) into the bank account of the registered construction worker. The applications are accepted offline.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Sports Development Scheme - Retired Person
fields.briefDescription: Launched on 9th February 2024 the "Mukhyamantri Sports Development Scheme-Retired Person" was launched by the Directorate of Youth Affairs & Sports, Govt. of Tripura. The scheme aims to generate employment opportunities for retired persons by giving a monthly fixed remuneration of ₹30,000/-.

fields.schemeName: Lakshya Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support in the form of scholarships to candidates who are permanent residents of Tripura and clear the Civil Service Examination (Prelims/Mains) conducted by UPSC.

fields.schemeName: Pension Plan (MBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, a member of the fund who has been working as a building worker for not less than one year after the commencement of these rules shall on completion of sixty years of age be eligible for the person.

fields.schemeName: Chief Minister’s Girl Child Protection Scheme-II
fields.briefDescription: The "Chief Minister’s Girl Child Protection Scheme-I" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to girl children of poor families as well as to promote girl child education & eradicate female infanticide.

fields.schemeName: Suraksha Laghu Evan Simant Vriddhajan Krishak Samman Pension Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Rajasthan government's Social Justice and Empowerment Department launched the "Suraksha Laghu Evan Seemaant Vrddhajan Krshak Sammaan Penshan Yojana" program, a social welfare initiative that aims to improve the lives by providing them with monthly financial assistance.

fields.schemeName: Government Working Women’s Hostel
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Government Working Women’s Hostel" is an initiative by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide safe accommodation facilities to working women who live far away from their families, belonging to lower and middle-income groups.

fields.schemeName: Scheme of Giving Awards to Eminent Artists - Kalai Ilamani Award
fields.briefDescription: "Scheme of Giving Awards to Eminent Artists - Kalai Ilamani Award" was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu aims to promote and preserve the culture of Tamil Nadu. The selected artists are awarded financial assistance ₹4,000/- and certificates of appreciation.

fields.schemeName: Krishi Yantra
fields.briefDescription: In the Krishi Yantra scheme, the farmer purchases farming-related equipment from an authorized dealer, then the state government gives a subsidy to the farmers.

fields.schemeName: Go-Green Three Wheelers Scheme (GBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, a one-time subsidy will be provided on the purchase of battery-operated tricycle (e-rickshaw) vehicles to registered construction disabled workers. Also, assistance will be available for the amount of Registration Fee and Road Tax paid for the first time of the new Three-Wheeler.

fields.schemeName: Meghalaya Agriculture Response Vehicle Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Meghalaya Agriculture Response Vehicle Scheme” was launched by the Department of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare, Government of Meghalaya to provide Small Commercial Vehicles and pickups at each CD Block across Meghalaya with 50% financial aid from the Government of Meghalaya.

fields.schemeName: Full Medical Checkup Assistance Scheme- Gujarat Labour Welfare Board
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to conduct health check-ups for male Shramyogis above 45 years of age and female Shram Yogis above 35 years of age who are working in the organized sector in the state of Gujarat.

fields.schemeName: Funeral Assistance Scheme (PULWS)
fields.briefDescription: The "Funeral Assistance Scheme (PULWS)" is a Welfare Scheme by the Puducherry Unorganised Labourers' Welfare Society. The Society extends ₹7,000/- to the nominee of the deceased Unorganised Worker towards meeting the funeral expenses. The amount is credited through DBT into the bank account.

fields.schemeName: Walk In Tunnel
fields.briefDescription: Under the Walk-In Tunnel, the Rajasthan government provides the benefit of a subsidy to the farmers with affordable and efficient structures that offer protection from adverse weather conditions, pests, and diseases.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship/Stipend to SC Students for ITI/Professional Courses (Swami Vivekanand Scholarship)
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, a monthly stipend/scholarship will be given to Scheduled Caste Category students who are studying professional courses in Government or Private Industrial Training Institute (ITI).

fields.schemeName: Cash Grant in lieu of Sewing Machine
fields.briefDescription: "Cash Grant in lieu of Sewing Machine" is a Welfare Scheme by the Armed Forces Flag Day Fund of the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, ₹10,000/- is provided to the Widows of Ex-servicemen for the purchase of a Sewing Machine. The applications are accepted offline.

fields.schemeName: Spectacle Grant (Sainik Welfare)
fields.briefDescription: "Spectacle Grant" is a Welfare Scheme by the Armed Forces Flag Day Fund of the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, ₹2,000/- to the Ex-servicemen/Widows of Ex-servicemen for the purchase of Spectacle. The members of the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme are not eligible.

fields.schemeName: National Handicrafts Development Programme: Direct Benefit to Artisans - Supports to Artisans in Indigent Circumstances
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Direct Benefit to Artisans - Supports to Artisans in Indigent Circumstances" is designed to give a boost to the handicraft sector in India. Assistance of upto ₹8,000/- per month is granted to the Artisans in Indigent Circumstances in the form of monthly allowance/lump sum grant/ both.

fields.schemeName: Maternity Assistance Scheme- Gujarat Labour Welfare Board
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to female workers and the wives of workers to cover expenses incurred for health check-ups, medicine, nutritious diet, etc., during the maternity period.

fields.schemeName: Scheme of Awarding Porkizhi to the Indigent Kalaimamani Awardee Artists
fields.briefDescription: "Scheme of Awarding Porkizhi to the Indigent Kalaimamani Awardee Artists" was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The artists who have already received the Kalaimamani Award and who are presently in indigent circumstances are awarded ₹15,000/-.

fields.schemeName: Scheme of Extending Grants for the Publication of Rare Books on Arts
fields.briefDescription: Under the "Scheme for Giving Awards to Traditional Artists", a grant is sanctioned to the writer for the publication of books that are considered rare for the development of arts. 60% of the total cost of the printing charges of 1000 copies or ₹15,000/- whichever is less is sanctioned as a grant.

fields.schemeName: Scheme of Encouragement to Young Artists
fields.briefDescription: "Scheme of Encouragement to Young Artists" was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Tamil Nadu aims to give a chance to talented young artists to perform in four programs through the successfully running Voluntary Cultural Organization & grant given to the artiste for performing the programs.

fields.schemeName: Tablet Assistance to Scheduled Caste Students of 12th Standard
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, students in the 12th standard belonging to the Scheduled Caste category will receive a tablet by paying a token fee of ₹1,000/-.

fields.schemeName: Mumkin - Livelihood Generation Scheme
fields.briefDescription: "Mumkin - Livelihood Generation Scheme" is a initiative of Jammu & Kashmir State. This scheme is provide the financial help to the youth to empower them and promote the self employment.

fields.schemeName: Anti Bird Net
fields.briefDescription: Under the Anti Bird Net Birds will never leave your garden if they are used to pecking on certain trees and plants, but if you install anti-bird nets at the appropriate places, you can prevent them from coming again to peck your plants.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Grant of Financial Assistance to Industrial Workers/Employee for Purchase of Spectacles
fields.briefDescription: The "Scheme for Grant of Financial Assistance to Industrial Workers/Employee for Purchase of Spectacles" by the Goa Labour Welfare Board, Department of Labour and Employment, Goa, aims to provide financial aid to industrial workers/employees for acquiring spectacles. Through this scheme, assistance

fields.schemeName: Post Matric and Top Class Scholarship
fields.briefDescription: The Scheme Post Matric and Top Class Scholarship for Madhya Pradesh is provide financial assistance to students from economically disadvantaged backgrounds to pursue higher education.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance Scheme for Purchase of Agricultural Land to Scheduled Caste Farmers
fields.briefDescription: The scheme was launched on in the year 1986. Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to farmers belonging to the scheduled castes to purchase agricultural land, with a maximum limit of 2 acres, for self-cultivation.

fields.schemeName: Loan Assistance to Scheduled Castes Students for Commercial Pilot Training
fields.briefDescription: The scheme was commenced in the year 1987 with the objective to provide financial assistance to bright Scheduled Castes Students who want to undergo training for commercial pilot license.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Small Business Owners of Scheduled Castes to Buy a Place of Business/Shop
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, financial assistance in the form of loans and subsidies is provided by banks to individuals belonging to the Scheduled Castes category. This assistance is aimed at enabling them to purchase business premises or shops in urban areas for business development.

fields.schemeName: Cattle Shed Subsidy Scheme under Scheduled Castes Sub Plan (SC Category)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Cattle Shed Subsidy Scheme under Scheduled Castes Sub Plan (SCSP)” is implemented by the Directorate of Animal Husbandry, Government of Gujarat. Under this scheme, the financial assistance is given to Scheduled Caste beneficiaries for construction of Cattle Shed for 2 animals.

fields.schemeName: Reimbursement of Tuition Fees to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)
fields.briefDescription: "Reimbursement of Tuition Fees to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)" is a Welfare Scheme by the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. The wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM studying in Government-recognized Institutions are provided reimbursement of their tuition fees.

fields.schemeName: Death Benefit (GBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Through the "Death Benefit" scheme, the nominee/dependant of the deceased worker is provided with financial assistance. The death should have either been natural or caused due to an accident, during the course of employment. The applications are accepted offline.

fields.schemeName: Marriage Assistance to Normal Persons Marrying Visually Impaired Persons
fields.briefDescription: The scheme 'Marriage Assistance to Normal Persons Marrying Visually Impaired Persons' was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide marriage assistance to a normal person marrying a visually Impaired Person.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance for Marriage for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: The "Financial Assistance for Marriage for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme  that provides financial assistance for marriage of self and for upto 2 children.

fields.schemeName: Pension Benefit for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: The "Pension Benefit for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme for the registered workers of the board with a pension benefit of ₹ 3000/- per month after completion of 60 years.

fields.schemeName: Disability Pension for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: The "Disability Pension for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides monthly disability pension of ₹3000/- to the permanently disabled member due to paralysis, leprosy, T.B and accidents.

fields.schemeName: Sant Surdas Scheme
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, monthly financial assistance is provided to Persons with Disabilities aged between 0 and 17 years, who have a disability of more than 80% and are registered in the Below Poverty Line (BPL) list.

fields.schemeName: Maintenance Allowance to Intellectually Disabled Persons
fields.briefDescription: The 'Maintenance Allowance to Intellectually Disabled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Govt of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a maintenance allowance to intellectually disabled persons.

fields.schemeName: Natural Death Assistance for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: "Natural Death Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance of ₹1,00,000/- to the nominees/dependents of the members in case of natural death of the worker.

fields.schemeName: Accidental Death Assistance for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: "Accidental Death Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance of ₹2,00,000/- to the nominees/dependents of the members in case the death is due to an accident.

fields.schemeName: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme under Integrated Fodder Development Scheme (General Category)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to dairy farmers belonging to General Caste category on purchase of electric powered chaff cutters. By using power driven chaff cutter, dairy farmers can reduce wastage of green & dry fodder which is economically important for their profitable dairy farming.

fields.schemeName: Scheme of Personal Assistance Allowance to Differently Abled Persons with High Support Need
fields.briefDescription: The "Scheme of Personal Assistance Allowance to Differently Abled Persons with High Support Need" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a personal assistance allowance of ₹1,000 to differently abled person.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship (I to VIII Standard) by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons
fields.briefDescription: The 'Scholarship (I to VIII Standard) by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide scholarships to purchase notebooks for differently-abled students studying in government school.

fields.schemeName: Pension To Widows And Destitute Women-Chandigarh
fields.briefDescription: Under the Pension To Widows And Destitute Women scheme To provide financial assistance to Widows and Destitute Women of Chandigarh.

fields.schemeName: Early Intervention Centre for Children with Cerebral Palsy in SRTC, Chennai and Tiruchirapalli Districts
fields.briefDescription: The "Early Intervention Centre for Children with Cerebral Palsy in SRTC, Chennai and Tiruchirapalli Districts" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, stimulation training is given to the children affected with cerebral palsy.

fields.schemeName: Dhobhi Hetu Avashyak Upkaran Sahayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Labor Department of Chhattisgarh initiated this scheme on January 10, 2018, under the "Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board." This scheme aims to provide equipment support to dhobis.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance for Self-Marriage of Registered Women Workers (HBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹50,000/- is provided to registered women workers for arranging their own marriage who have a minimum one-year regular membership.

fields.schemeName: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Nirman Shramik Sammaan Yojana (HBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, registered female workers, who have minimum one-year’s regular membership, are being provided financial assistance of ₹5100/- for the purchase of Saree, Suit, Slippers, Raincoat, Umbrella, Sanitary Napkin and Kitchen utensil etc.

fields.schemeName: Government Institute for the Mentally Retarded - Tamil Nadu
fields.briefDescription: The 'Government Institute for the Mentally Retarded,Chennai' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, children with intellectual disability are given special education, vocational training, food, uniforms etc.

fields.schemeName: Multimedia Training - Tamil Nadu
fields.briefDescription: The Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu, launched the "Multimedia Training Program" for people with locomotor and hearing impairments.

fields.schemeName: Kanyadaan Scheme (HBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, the Board provides financial assistance of ₹51,000/- in the form of Kanyadaan to registered construction workers on the occasion of the marriage of their daughters. This assistance is available for up to three daughters of the worker.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Shramik Aujaar Sahayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Labor Department of Chhattisgarh launched this scheme on October 1, 2010, under the "Building and Construction Workers Welfare Board." Tool kits are distributed to construction workers on an annual basis as part of this initiative.

fields.schemeName: Early Intervention Centres for Children with Autism
fields.briefDescription: The "Early Intervention Centres for Children with Autism" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, Early intervention programme emphasizes attending to social stimuli, imitation skills, language comprehension and usage.

fields.schemeName: Family Pension (HBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, on the death of a pensioner worker who is being given pension by the Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, half of his/her pension is given to his/her spouse (as the case may be).

fields.schemeName: Sewing Machine Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹4,500/- is provided to women workers employed in Industrial and Commercial Establishments in the state of Haryana for the purchase of sewing machines for their domestic use.

fields.schemeName: Assistance for Purchase of Spectacles - Folk Artists
fields.briefDescription: The "Assistance for Purchase of Spectacles" scheme was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, the Tamil Nadu Folk Artiste's Welfare Board provides financial assistance for the purchase of spectacles to registered folk artists.

fields.schemeName: Disability (Due to Accident or Other Reason) Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to workers employed in industrial and commercial establishments in Haryana based on their percentage of disability, whether the disability occurs due to an accident or other reasons inside or outside the workplace.

fields.schemeName: Natural Death and Funeral Assistance
fields.briefDescription: The Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu was launched the scheme "Natural Death and Funeral Assistance". This scheme provides financial assistance for the funeral and natural death of registered folk artistes to support their families during difficult times.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to Persons Suffering from Rare Diseases
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Financial Assistance to Persons Suffering from Rare Diseases” was launched by Social Justice & Empowerment Department, Govt. of Haryana. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹3000/- per month will be provided to all persons of Haryana domicile, who are suffering from Rare Diseases.

fields.schemeName: Sikkim Grant of Scholarship to Students with Disabilities Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The Government of Sikkim has introduced the Sikkim Grant of Scholarship to Students with Disabilities Scheme, 2014. This scheme aims to provide financial assistance to differently-abled students to help them secure academic education and technical or professional training.

fields.schemeName: Scheme of Financial Assistance for Dance and Drama Troupes/Associations
fields.briefDescription: The "Scheme of Financial Assistance for Dance and Drama Troupes/Associations" was launched by the Arts and Culture Department, Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide a grant for dance and drama troupes/associations.

fields.schemeName: Subsidy for Disabled Young Professionals
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, loans up to ₹25,00,000/- are provided to professionally educated unemployed disabled youth who fall under the OH, VH, HH, or MR categories, at different interest rates ranging from 4.5% to 8% per annum.

fields.schemeName: Silicosis Rehabilitation Pension- Haryana Silicosis Board
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹4,000/- is given to the Silicosis-affected worker categorized as category (A, B, or C) according to the ILO Classification, until he/she remains alive.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Prakhand Parivahan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: "Mukhyamantri Prakhand Parivahan Yojana" to provide transportation facilities connecting blocks & remote Panchayats with district headquarters. This scheme aims to encourage scheduled castes, scheduled tribes, backward classes entrepreneurship by providing financial support to purchase buses.

fields.schemeName: The Lokpal of India Internship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The Lokpal of India launched the Internship Scheme for the interns to learn about the implementation of the Lokpal & Lokayuktas Act, the Prevention of Corruption Act, the Central Vigilance Commission Act, & they can contribute towards the effective functioning of the Lokpal of India with fresh ideas

fields.schemeName: Small Business in Service/Trading Sector for Persons with Disabilities (Divyangjan Swavalamban Yojana)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme offers loans up to ₹50 lakhs for self-employment to disabled persons in sectors like Agriculture, Small Business/Artisan & Traditional Occupations, Transport & Service Sectors, etc. Eligible individuals can access loans with interest rates ranging from 5% to 9% per annum.

fields.schemeName: Laghu Vyavassay Scheme
fields.briefDescription: "Laghu Vyavassay Scheme" is an economic empowerment scheme by the Haryana Scheduled Castes Finance and Development Corporation, Govt of Haryana. In this scheme, loans are provided to individuals from Scheduled Castes for self-employment/ income-generating activities.

fields.schemeName: National Centre for Earth Science Studies Internship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The “National Centre for Earth Science Studies Internship” scheme by the Earth System Science Organization, Ministry of Earth Sciences, provides various opportunities for school as well as college students to familiarise and/or pursue research on different branches of earth sciences.

fields.schemeName: Veda Vyasa Scheme for Vedic Education
fields.briefDescription: Andhra Pradesh Brahmin Welfare Corporation launched the “Veda Vyasa Scheme for Vedic Education” for the year 2019-20, to encourage Vedic Education in Andhra Pradesh.  Under this scheme, selected applicants will be granted Annual Financial Assistance.

fields.schemeName: Bharati Scheme for Education - 1st Class to 5th Class
fields.briefDescription: "The Bharati Scheme for Education - 1st Class to 5th Class" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education.  Under this scheme, financial assistance for the academic year will be granted to eligible poor Brahmin student applicants.

fields.schemeName: Marriage Assistance for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: The "Marriage Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides Marriage benefits in the form of financial assistance to the eligible registered women members & their immediate dependents of the board.

fields.schemeName: Partial Disability Benefit for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: The "Partial Disability Benefit for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides financial assistance is provided to the nominees/ dependents of a member, in case of his/her partial disability.

fields.schemeName: Buffalo Entrepreneurship Development Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Buffalo Entrepreneurship Development Scheme" aims to enhance livestock productivity, especially among marginalized farmers in Odisha. This scheme seeks to address protein deficiency, boost nutritional status, & promote livelihood through dairy farming.

fields.schemeName: Agricultural Activities for Persons with Disabilities
fields.briefDescription: This scheme provides loans up to ₹10,00,000/- to the persons with disabilities for agricultural production, irrigation, horticulture, sericulture, the purchase of agricultural machinery and equipment for agricultural services, and the marketing of agricultural products etc.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
fields.schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS) for Thrust Sectors: Scheme For Marine Products Processing Units
fields.briefDescription: “Scheme For Marine Products Processing Units'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)” for Thrust Sectors, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, aims to provide Interest Subsidy to the Establishment /Expansion of Marine products processing industries.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
fields.schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS): Environment Protection Infrastructure Subsidy
fields.briefDescription: “Environment Protection Infrastructure Subsidy'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)”, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to promote Installation of Environment Protection Infrastructure for a cleaner environment.

fields.schemeName: Garuda Scheme for Funeral Expense
fields.briefDescription: The "Garuda Scheme for Funeral Expenses" aims to provide financial assistance for funeral expenses of a deceased Brahmin in their family, where the family has no other means to meet the same. This scheme covers Andhra Pradesh all 13 districts, to meet the funeral expenses of the deceased Brahmi.

fields.schemeName: Additional Pension to 100% Disabled Ex-Serviceman having Children
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides an additional pension to 100% disabled ex-servicemen who were members of the Armed Forces & have been released from service due to 100% disability or permanent incapacity to work, provided the disability or incapacity is attributable to service.

fields.schemeName: Additional Pension to Widow of Ex-Serviceman having Children
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Sainik and Ardh Sainik Welfare Department, Government of Haryana. Under the scheme, an additional amount, in addition to the pension, is provided to the widow of an ex-serviceman who dies while in service but not in any battle.

fields.schemeName: Sanction of Adult Sticks to Senior Citizens
fields.briefDescription: The "Sanction of Adult Sticks to Senior Citizens" scheme aims to provide walking sticks to senior citizens. This initiative ensures that eligible senior citizens receive the necessary support to enhance their mobility and independence.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
fields.schemeName: Promoting Registration for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: The "Promoting Registration for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, U.T. of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides sleeping mat/ blanket/ mosquito net to registered construction workers, in order to encourage construction workers to register with the Board.

fields.schemeName: Marriage Grant for the Marriage of the Daughter of War Disabled Ex-Servicemen above 50% Disability
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹21,000/- is provided for the marriage of each dependent daughter of war-disabled ex-servicemen whose disability has been assessed above 50%, for up to two daughters who are at least 18 years old.

fields.schemeName: Marriage Grant to War Widows’ Daughters of Ex-Servicemen
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Sainik and Ardh Sainik Welfare Department, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹21,000/- is provided to the war widows for marriage of their dependent daughters, for up to two daughters who are at least 18 years old.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
fields.schemeName: Skill Development for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: The "Skill Development for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance in the form of stipend to the workers who attend the training programs under “Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana”.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Celebration of Birth/death Anniversary of Eminent Personalities
fields.briefDescription: The "Scheme for Celebration of Birth/Death Anniversary of Eminent Personalities" scheme aims to provide financial assistance for the celebration of anniversaries/Jayanti's of Sant Kabir, Sant Gadge, and Sant Durbalnath and in addition to Anniversaries of DR. B.R. Ambedkar, etc.

fields.schemeName: Kanya Saksharta Protsahan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme was launched by the Tribal Welfare Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh. The objective of the scheme is to motivate girls towards education. Under this scheme, girls in Class 11th who have passed their 10th class examination will receive ₹3,000/- per year as a monetary incentive.

fields.schemeName: Additional Pension to Widow of Ex-Serviceman having Children
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Sainik and Ardh Sainik Welfare Department, Government of Haryana. Under the scheme, an additional amount, in addition to the pension, is provided to the widow of an ex-serviceman who dies while in service but not in any battle.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to War Widows of Defence Forces
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹3,000/- per month shall be granted to War Widows of Defence Force Personnel’s (Army, Navy & Air Force) who were killed in action during declared war of 1962, 1965 & 1971 in addition to family pension already getting from Government of India.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
fields.schemeName: Pension for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: The "Pension for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides a monthly pension after completion of 60 years to the eligible registered member.

fields.schemeName: Sanction of Adult Sticks to Senior Citizens
fields.briefDescription: The "Sanction of Adult Sticks to Senior Citizens" scheme aims to provide walking sticks to senior citizens. This initiative ensures that eligible senior citizens receive the necessary support to enhance their mobility and independence.

fields.schemeName: Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Meritorious Students Incentive Scheme (Class 12th Passed)
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to motivate students from the lower economic backgrounds & support them economically. Under this scheme, cash award of ₹5,000/- is given to the students who have obtained the highest marks in the 12th class examination in government schools within their district.

fields.schemeName: Integrated Social Security Scheme: Pension for Women in Distress
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Social and Tribal Welfare Department, Administration of Union Territory of Ladakh. Under this scheme, a financial assistance of ₹1,000/- per month is provided as a pension to destitute widows, divorced, or deserted women with no source of income.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
fields.schemeName: Promoting Registration for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: The "Promoting Registration for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, U.T. of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides sleeping mat/ blanket/ mosquito net to registered construction workers, in order to encourage construction workers to register with the Board.

fields.schemeName: Marriage Grant for the Marriage of the Daughter of War Disabled Ex-Servicemen above 50% Disability
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹21,000/- is provided for the marriage of each dependent daughter of war-disabled ex-servicemen whose disability has been assessed above 50%, for up to two daughters who are at least 18 years old.

fields.schemeName: Marriage Grant to War Widows’ Daughters of Ex-Servicemen
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Sainik and Ardh Sainik Welfare Department, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹21,000/- is provided to the war widows for marriage of their dependent daughters, for up to two daughters who are at least 18 years old.

fields.schemeName: Hostel Facility for Students Availing Education in Delhi
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide facilities for residential and other facilities such as water, reimbursement of electricity expenditure, scholarship etc. for scheduled caste students of Madhya Pradesh studying in higher institutions located in Delhi.

fields.schemeName: State Government ST Scholarship (Class 9 to 10)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme was launched by the Tribal Affairs Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to encourage education among Scheduled Tribe students and improve their educational status. This scheme provides scholarships to Scheduled Tribe students in Classes 9 and 10.

fields.schemeName: State Marriage Assistance Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The 'State Marriage Assistance Scheme' offers one-time financial aid to female beneficiaries from families holding AAY or PHH ration cards, with the amount directly credited to their Aadhaar-linked bank accounts. Additionally, divyangjan beneficiaries also receive financial assistance.

fields.schemeName: Pratibha Yojana
fields.briefDescription: This scheme provides financial assistance to Scheduled Tribe students who have passed national competitive examinations such as JEE, NEET, CLAT, AIIMS, and NDA, and have taken admission in IIT, NIT, NLU, MBBS (government colleges located in Madhya Pradesh), AIIMS or NDA.

fields.schemeName: Medical Expenses-Treatment for Major Ailments Including Surgery
fields.briefDescription: "Medical Expenses-Treatment for Major Ailments Including Surgery'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Dept.,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides medical expenses for the treatment of beneficiary or his/ her dependents suffering from Cancer, Heart disease, Kidney disease, T.B. etc.

fields.schemeName: Niji Talabon Ka Jirnoddhar Ki Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The government of Bihar launched the "Niji Talabon Ka Jirnoddhar Ki Yojana" scheme aims to enhance the water holding capacity of private ponds to boost fish productivity & production as well as provide benefits to private fish farmers through the expansion/renovation of their ponds.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Anusuchit Jati Evam Anusuchit Janjati Chhatrawas Anudan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The “Mukhyamantri Anusoochit Jaati Evam Anusoochit Janajati Chhatrawas Anudan Yojana” was launched by the SC and ST Welfare Department, Government of Bihar aims to provide financial assistance in every month to the students studying in Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe hostels.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Funeral Assistance in Case of Death of Registered Construction Worker
fields.briefDescription: The "Scheme for Funeral Assistance in Case of Death of Registered Construction Worker" was launched by the Tripura Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department Tripura. The scheme aims to provide funeral assistance in case of the death of registered construction workers.

fields.schemeName: Research Scholarship for Disabled Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Higher Education Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to provide financial support for PhD research to differently-abled students. Eligible candidates receive ₹16,000/- per month, which is directly transferred to their bank accounts.

fields.schemeName: Sanskrit Scholarship
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, students studying Sanskrit at various levels—Post Graduate (M.A. Classic), Acharya, Graduate (B.A. Classic), Shastri, Uttar Madhyama, Purva Madhyama, and Prathama—in any government or aided non-government college receive a monthly scholarship of ₹300/- for 10 months.

fields.schemeName: Maternity Benefit Scheme - Telangana
fields.briefDescription: The "Maternity Benefit Scheme" was launched by the Telangana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, LET&F (Labour) Department, Telangana. The scheme provides financial assistance to registered women workers, as well as the wives & daughters of registered workers to support them.

fields.schemeName: Marriage Gift Scheme - Telangana
fields.briefDescription: The "Marriage Gift Scheme" was launched by the Telangana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, LET&F (Labour) Dept. Telangana. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance as a marriage gift to unmarried registered women workers & the daughters of registered building & construction

fields.schemeName: Hospitalisation Relief Scheme
fields.briefDescription: This scheme was launched by the Telangana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, LET&F (Labour) Department Telangana financial assistance is provided to construction workers who suffer temporary disabilities due to accidents or diseases & hospitalized for five or more days.

fields.schemeName: Skill Upgradation and Vocational Education Scheme: For Worker (P.B.O.C.W.W.B)
fields.briefDescription: "Skill Upgradation and Vocational Education Scheme: For Worker'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Dept. of Labour, Punjab, is a welfare scheme that provides full course fees, boarding and lodging assistance to the registered workers who acquire Skill from technical institutions.

fields.schemeName: Assistance in Case of Accidents (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
fields.briefDescription: The “Assistance in Case of Accidents” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Odisha, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to the beneficiary in case of hospitalization and becoming disabled due to an accident.

fields.schemeName: Tirth Barat Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to provide government assistance for pilgrimage to the senior citizens & Persons with Disabilities (PwDs), who are residents of Chhattisgarh, to visit one or more of the various designated pilgrimage sites outside the state, once in their lifetime.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: The NSFDC Internship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: "The NSFDC Internship Scheme 2024" is implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. The internship will expose students to various programs & schemes undertaken by NSFDC, offering them hands-on experience in

fields.schemeName: Artificial Limbs and Assistive Devices Supply Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to increase the mobility of persons with disabilities by reducing impact of their disabilities. The scheme provides artificial limbs/assistive devices worth up to ₹6,900/- to persons with disabilities of 40% or more, provided they meet the other eligibility criteria.

fields.schemeName: Potency Development Plan
fields.briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to increase the mobility of all eligible PwDs of the state by providing them artificial limbs/assistive devices. The scheme provides artificial limbs/assistive devices worth up to ₹6,900/- to PwDs of 40% or more, provided they meet the other eligibility criteria.

fields.schemeName: Pension Scheme (K.B.O.C.W.W.B)
fields.briefDescription: The "Pension Scheme'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Department of Labour, Karnataka, is a welfare scheme that aims to provide a monthly pension to registered construction workers who have reached 60 years of age and is a beneficiary of the Board for at least 3 years.

fields.schemeName: Distribution of Certified Seeds-Oil Seeds
fields.briefDescription: The "Distribution of Certified Seeds-Oil Seeds" scheme offers subsidies to farmers for purchasing certified oil seeds, helping them improve their crop yield and quality.

fields.schemeName: Distribution of Rhizobium
fields.briefDescription: The “Distribution of Rhizobium” scheme offers a subsidy on the cost of Rhizobium, to farmers raising seed farms with Pulses crops in Tamil Nadu.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Shramshakti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: This scheme aims to provide employment opportunities to men and women aged 18 to 45 from the minority community by offering vocational skill training in various fields or by providing loans through the Bihar State Minority Financial Corporation, Patna, for self-employment.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance for Education of Children of Beneficiary
fields.briefDescription: The "Financial Assistance for Education of Children of Beneficiary" welfare scheme launched by the Manipur Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board provides one-time financial assistance for the education of children.

fields.schemeName: Animal Husbandry
fields.briefDescription: This scheme provides subsidies on the distribution of sheep units, milch animals, and calves, as well as health coverage and artificial insemination for the animals. It is targeted at Tribal communities to improve their livelihood through animal husbandry.

fields.schemeName: Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award
fields.briefDescription: The Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award was established to commemorate the birth centenary of Pujya Shri Mota, the founder of the Hari Om Ashram, Nadiad. It is awarded to an eminent Indian scientist for their innovative and outstanding contributions to the field of Science and Technology.

fields.schemeName: Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Department-Hostels: Special Guides
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides hostel facilities to all boys and girls boarders studying up to XII Standard.

fields.schemeName: Charmashilpa Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Charmashilpa Scheme" aims to modernize the leather artisans' production methods by offering financial assistance to setup mechanized production units. This support helps leather artisan SHGs and cooperative societies enhance the quality of their products, making them more competitive.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance for Marriage (BBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹50,000/- is provided to registered male or female workers who have been members of the Board for at least three years, for the marriage of their two adult daughters and for the female member's own marriage.

fields.schemeName: Vocational Training to the Dependents
fields.briefDescription: The "Vocational Training to the Dependents" provides a residential skill training program for 15,000 dependents of registered construction workers. The program focuses on enhancing the employability of dependents through training in various trades.

fields.schemeName: Organizing Block Demonstration on Polythene Mulch Technology in Groundnut
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers for adopting polythene mulch technology in groundnut cultivation to improve productivity.

fields.schemeName: Production Of Certified Seeds
fields.briefDescription: The "Production of Certified Seeds" scheme, offers a subsidy to farmers for producing certified seeds of Pulses.

fields.schemeName: Afforestation Schemes Providing Incentives And Employment To Tribals In Forest
fields.briefDescription: This scheme offers grants to unemployed tribals for afforestation work, providing them with incentives and employment opportunities in forest operations.

fields.schemeName: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: For Consumer Durables T.V., Fridge and Two Wheelers Loan
fields.briefDescription: A loan scheme provided by District Central Cooperative Banks for purchasing consumer durables like T.V., fridges, and two-wheelers. Loan covers 75% of the product cost at an interest rate of 14%.

fields.schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (Maharashtra)
fields.briefDescription: "Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (Maharashtra)" is a scheme by the Social Justice & Special Assistance Dept, Govt of Maharashtra. In this scheme, widows aged 40 to 79 years who are from a BPL family receive a pension of ₹1500/- per month.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance for Medical (JKBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The "Financial Assistance for Medical" scheme by the JKBOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Jammu & Kashmir, provides financial support for medical expenses, including injury treatment, temporary and permanent disability, and the treatment of chronic diseases.

fields.schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme offers financial assistance to students from Backward Classes (BC) and Most Backward Classes (MBC) studying in English medium from 6th to 10th standard. It covers tuition and examination fees.

fields.schemeName: Children Education Allowance
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Nagaland Building and Other Construction Workers' Welfare Board, Under this scheme, children of registered beneficiaries studying from Nursery to Class 10 are provided ₹500/- per month per child as education assistance.

fields.schemeName: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: For Housing, House Construction, Repair Extension Loan
fields.briefDescription: The scheme offers loans up to ₹10,00,000/- for housing, house construction, and repair/extension purposes, at a 12% interest rate to provide financial aid to citizens for housing needs.

fields.schemeName: Loans and Advances for Construction of a House
fields.briefDescription: The "Loans and Advances for Construction of a House" scheme by the Manipur Building and Other Construction Workers' Welfare Board provides financial support to registered construction workers to build their own houses. Beneficiaries can avail loans based on their skill level, with amounts ranging.

fields.schemeName: Construction of Free Houses for Tribals
fields.briefDescription: This scheme provides free houses to tribals who already possess free house site pattas. The construction of the houses is carried out by government authorities, ensuring shelter for tribal communities.

fields.schemeName: Educational Assistance to the Children Studying in 1st to 7th and 8th to 10th Class
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, educational assistance is provided of ₹2,500/- to the children studying in 1st to 7th standard and ₹5,000/- for the children studying in 8th to 10th standard of the registered construction worker. The scheme covers up to two children and the wife of a registered male worker.

fields.schemeName: Schooling Education (JKBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Schooling Education" by the Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept., J&K, provides financial assistance for the education of children of registered construction workers, from Class Nursery/1st to 5th, and from Class 6th to 8th.

fields.schemeName: Marriage Assistance (JKBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The "Marriage Assistance" scheme by the JKBOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Jammu & Kashmir, provides financial aid to registered construction workers for the marriage of their dependents, including up to three marriages for their sons, daughters, siblings, or themselves.

fields.schemeName: Savitribai Phule Self-Help Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial support to unemployed women from the Scheduled Caste (SC) category in the state to help them start businesses in industry, service, or trade sectors.

fields.schemeName: Atal Graha Jyoti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides subsidized electricity bills to domestic consumers with monthly consumption up to 150 units, promoting energy conservation and reducing electricity costs for eligible beneficiaries.

fields.schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Disabled Pension Scheme (Madhya Pradesh)
fields.briefDescription: Launched on 1st April 2009, the scheme "Indira Gandhi National Disabled Pension Scheme" is a pension scheme by the Department of Social Welfare, Govt of Madhya Pradesh. In this scheme, a pension of ₹600/- is provided to differently-abled individuals from 'Below Poverty Line'.

fields.schemeName: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: For Women Entrepreneurs
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide loans of up to ₹5,00,000/- at an interest rate of 12% (subject to change) for women entrepreneurs through District Central Cooperative Banks and its branches.

fields.schemeName: Mahila Samridhi Yojana (Maharashtra)
fields.briefDescription: "Mahila Samridhi Yojana" is administered by the Dept. of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. The scheme aims to uplift economically weaker women from the Charmakar Community. Loans ranging from ₹25,000/- to ₹50,000/- are granted at a low interest rate of 4% p.a.

fields.schemeName: Large Sized Multi Purpose Coop. Society For Interest Free Loan
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides interest-free loans to citizens through a cooperative society. The maximum loan amount offered is ₹45,000/-, with zero interest charged.

fields.schemeName: Kanya Dhan Scheme for SC Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Kanya Dhan Scheme for SC Students" by the Directorate of Higher Education, Government of Goa. Through this scheme, an amount of ₹ 25,000/- is provided to the girl students of the Scheduled Caste Communities once they pass the 12th standard board examination (or equivalent).

fields.schemeName: Pre Matric Scholarship Scheme (Saral Vidya Sahay) for SC and OBC (V to VIII)
fields.briefDescription: "Pre Matric Scholarship Scheme (Saral Vidya Sahay) for SC and OBC (V to VIII)" was introduced by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Government of Goa. The scheme aims to support parents of children belonging to Scheduled Castes and Other Backward Classes for the education of their wards.

fields.schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (Maharashtra)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension" is a social welfare scheme by the Social Justice & Special Assistance Department, Government of Maharashtra. In this scheme, ₹600 per month is provided to elderly individuals aged 65 years and above from BPL families.

fields.schemeName: Mahila Kisan Yojana (Maharashtra)
fields.briefDescription: "Mahila Kisan Yojana" is implemented by the Dept. of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. The scheme aims to uplift the lifestyle of economically disadvantaged Charmakar communities. it supports the production and sale of various types of footwear and leather articles.

fields.schemeName: Handicapped Students Stipend Mizoram
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, provide financial support to differently-abled students for purchasing essential items like books and uniforms. Students enrolled in both government and private schools are eligible to receive a monthly stipend.

fields.schemeName: State Disability Pension
fields.briefDescription: The Social Welfare & Tribal Affairs Department, Government of Mizoram launched the State Disability Pension scheme. It provides a monthly pension of ₹350 to 200 eligible individuals who are completely blind or bedridden.

fields.schemeName: Distribution of Sewing Machines at Free of Cost
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides sewing machines to support individuals from Backward Classes (BC), Most Backward Classes (MBC), and Denotified Communities (DNCs) engaged in tailoring work, aiming to improve their livelihood opportunities.

fields.schemeName: Issuance of Free House Sites
fields.briefDescription: This scheme provides free residential land sites to eligible individuals from the Backward Classes (BC), Most Backward Classes (MBC), and Denotified Communities (DNC) who do not own a house or land, helping them secure housing stability.

fields.schemeName: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Sericulture In Irrigated Area
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides loans to farmers for sericulture activities in irrigated areas, with a loan amount ranging from ₹49,000/- to ₹79,000/- per acre, and interest rates from 11% to 12.75%.

fields.schemeName: Savitribai Phule Kishori Samriddhi Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Savitribai Phule Kishori Samriddhi Yojana was initiated by the "Department of Women, Child Development, and Social Security, Government of Jharkhand."

fields.schemeName: State Scholarship of Class 1st to 5th (Scheduled Caste)
fields.briefDescription: Launched in 1966-67, the "State Scholarship of Class 1st to 5th" scheme is a welfare initiative by the Scheduled Caste Welfare Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme provides a scholarship amount of ₹200/- to Scheduled Caste students, which is disbursed until 31st October every year.

fields.schemeName: Assistance for Funeral Rites
fields.briefDescription: The “Assistance for Funeral Rites” scheme provides ₹500/- to support SC/ST families with low income, in covering funeral expenses, ensuring that they can conduct funeral rites for their deceased ones.

fields.schemeName: Krishi Input Anudan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide agricultural input subsidies in affected areas due to the rise in water levels of rivers like Ganga and Kosi and flood-related crop damage from heavy rainfall.

fields.schemeName: Mukhymantri Sarthi Yojana - Jharkhand
fields.briefDescription: The "Mukhymantri Sarthi Yojana" aims to provide industry-relevant skill development training for youth in Jharkhand, aligning with NSQF standards. Implemented by Jharkhand Skill Development Mission Society (JSDMS) across all 24 districts, it offers free training to enhance employability.

fields.schemeName: Ved-Vyas Housing Construction Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Ved Vyas Housing Construction Scheme" provides financial assistance to active and traditional fish farmers in Simdega district for building houses. The scheme prioritizes individuals particularly those living in kutcha or thatched houses.

fields.schemeName: Scheme For Loan And Advances to the Beneficiary For Construction Of House
fields.briefDescription: The Scheme for Loan and Advances to the Beneficiary for Construction of House was launched by the Tripura Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, under the Labour Department of Tripura.

fields.schemeName: Aawaas Sahayata
fields.briefDescription: Launched in 2016, the "Aawaas Sahayata" scheme by the Department of Tribal Affairs, Madhya Pradesh, The scheme provides housing assistance to tribal students pursuing higher education outside their hometowns where hostels are unavailable.

fields.schemeName: Sarvajan Pension Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of per month to elderly individuals, widows, destitute women, differently-abled persons, primitive tribes, and HIV/AIDS patients. The scheme eliminates previous age restrictions and targets inclusivity by guaranteeing pensions to all eligible.

fields.schemeName: West Bengal Transport Workers’ Social Security Scheme: Assistance on Death and Permanent Disablement
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial relief to the beneficiaries in case of permanent disability due to accidents or their dependents/nominees in case of accidental or natural death.

fields.schemeName: Bihar Shatabdi Asangathit Karyakshetra Kamagaar Evan Shilpakar Samajik Suraksha Yojana: Total Permanent Disability
fields.briefDescription: “Total Permanent Disability” under the “Bihar Shatabdi Asangathit Karyakshetra Kamagaar Evan Shilpakar Samajik Suraksha Yojana” launched by the Labour Resources Department, Bihar, provides financial assistance of ₹75,000/- to the families of workers or craftsmen in case of permanent disablement.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Bagwani Mission: Dragon Fruit Vikas Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to expand dragon fruit cultivation in 21 districts of the state, providing financial assistance to ryot farmers for establishing and maintaining dragon fruit plantations.

fields.schemeName: Makhana Vikas Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to boost Makhana cultivation by providing training to farmers and financial support for traditional equipment.

fields.schemeName: Block Level Institute for Rural Skill Acquisition (BIRSA)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free, localized skill training to candidates at the block level in Jharkhand. The program is non-residential and operates in 24 districts across 80 blocks in the first phase.

fields.schemeName: Pay & Play Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The “Pay & Play Scheme” aims to provide state-level players with training and practice opportunities at the Mega Sports Complex, Hotwar, Ranchi.

fields.schemeName: Jharkhand Sports Excellence Cash Award Scheme to Players
fields.briefDescription: The “Jharkhand Sports Excellence Cash Award Scheme to Players” aims to provide cash awards to athletes for exceptional achievements in national and international competitions, as per the Jharkhand Sports Policy, 2022.

fields.schemeName: Jharkhand State Backward Classes Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Jharkhand State Backward Classes Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme" aims to enhance educational opportunities and participation among students belonging to backward classes in Jharkhand. It provides financial assistance to reduce dropout rates from classes 1 to 10 and promote equality in education.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Alpasankhyak Udyami Yojana
fields.briefDescription: This is a flagship scheme of the Bihar government aimed at promoting entrepreneurship and self-employment among the youth by providing financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- for setting up businesses.

fields.schemeName: Jharkhand State Scheduled Caste Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Jharkhand State Scheduled Caste Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme" promotes higher education among Scheduled Caste students in Jharkhand by providing financial assistance. This scheme aims to increase the participation of SC students in post-matric education.

fields.schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarship for Backward Class Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Pre-Matric Scholarship for Backward Class Students" aims to provide financial assistance to backward class students studying at the pre-matriculation level in India. Monthly scholarships of varying amounts are provided to eligible students.

fields.schemeName: Marang Gomke Jaipal Singh Munda Overseas Scholarship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Marang Gomke Jaipal Singh Munda Overseas Scholarship Scheme" provides financial assistance to deserving Scheduled Tribes, Scheduled Castes, Minorities, and Backward Class students for pursuing postgraduate education in top-ranked universities abroad.

fields.schemeName: Jharkhand State Migrant Labourers Survey and Rehabilitation Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Jharkhand State Migrant Labourers Survey and Rehabilitation Scheme" aims to identify and support migrant workers from the state. The scheme ensures social security, rehabilitation, and welfare for migrant workers and their families.

fields.schemeName: Gausevak Training (Initial and Refresher)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Gausevak Training (Initial and Refresher)" aims to empower educated unemployed rural youth with self-employment opportunities and the skills to provide primary veterinary services in remote rural areas. A 100% stipend of ₹6,000 for initial training and ₹500 for refresher training.

fields.schemeName: Tap Water Scheme (Nal Jal Yojana)
fields.briefDescription: "Tap Water Scheme" (नल जल योजना) by the Panchayat and Rural Development Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh aims to provide clean water in Gram Panchayat areas in an accessible manner. The application has to be made to the concerned Gram Panchayat.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Gramin Peyjal Nishchay Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide pure drinking water through pipelines to every rural household in Bihar. This initiative started in 2016 with a focus on community involvement, local governance, and sustainable water management.

fields.schemeName: Satat Jeevikoparjan Yojana (SJY)
fields.briefDescription: "Satat Jeevikoparjan Yojana (SJY)" is a flagship program launched by the Government of Bihar to uplift ultra-poor households through comprehensive livelihood support, skill-building, and financial inclusion.

fields.schemeName: Tuition Fee Reimbursement of Sainik/Public Schools
fields.briefDescription: The "Tuition Fee Reimbursement of Sainik/Public Schools" scheme by the Department of De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Welfare, Government of Madhya Pradesh, reimburses tuition fees for eligible students enrolled in Sainik Schools or Institutions.

fields.schemeName: Khel Chhatravriti (Vritika) Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The "Khel Chhatravriti (Vritika) Yojana" implemented by the Directorate of Art, Culture, Sports, and Youth Affairs, Government of Jharkhand, provides financial assistance to athletes based on their performance to encourage sports as a career.

fields.schemeName: Ganga Swarupa Punah Lagna Arthik Sahay Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme supports remarried women who are beneficiaries of the Ganga Swarupa Pension Scheme, aiming to reintegrate them into society with financial support.

fields.schemeName: Running of Scheduled Caste Hostel
fields.briefDescription: The "Running of Scheduled Caste Hostels" scheme by the Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste (SC) Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to provide housing and a conducive study environment for Scheduled Caste students. Separate junior, senior, and college hostels are operated for boys & girls.

fields.schemeName: Civil Service Incentive Scheme (Madhya Pradesh)
fields.briefDescription: The "Civil Service Incentive Scheme (Madhya Pradesh)" scheme by the Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste (SC) Department of the Government of Madhya Pradesh provides an incentive amount to encourage SC/ST candidates to appear in Civil Services Examinations.
