fields.schemeName: Poshan Sudha
fields.briefDescription: This scheme is a government initiative to provide nutrition and healthcare support to pregnant and lactating mothers in tribal districts of Gujarat.

fields.schemeName: Salt Distribution Scheme Jharkhand
fields.briefDescription: The "Salt Distribution Scheme" by the Department of Food, Public Distribution and Consumer Affairs, Government of Jharkhand, ensures subsidized salt is provided to AAY, PHH, and Green Cardholders, promoting accessibility and affordability.

fields.schemeName: Banglar Awaas Yojana (BAY)
fields.briefDescription: "Banglar Awaas Yojana (BAY)" provides financial assistance to houseless households and those living in kutcha or dilapidated houses, helping them build pucca houses with essential amenities. The scheme offers financial assistance with additional support for toilets and unskilled workdays.

fields.schemeName: Scheme of Post Matric Scholarship to Lower Income Group Student for Studies in India
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Post Matric Scholarship to Lower Income Group Students for Studies in India" aims to provide financial assistance to students from the Lower Income Groups to enable them to complete their education. Students are provided maintenance allowances, tuition fees, and additional benefits.

fields.schemeName: Backward Classes Foreign Study Scholarship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: Launched on 1st January 2007, the "Backward Classes Foreign Study Scholarship Scheme" by the Backward Classes and Minorities Welfare Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh provides financial assistance to backward class students for postgraduate, Ph.D., and post-research studies abroad.

fields.schemeName: Empower ST/SC Communities using ICT Tools through IT Knowledge Centre (ITKC)
fields.briefDescription: "Empower ST/SC Communities using ICT Tools through IT Knowledge Centre (ITKC)" by the Department of Information Technology, Electronics and Communication, Government of Goa aims to create a large pool of computer literate manpower and to make introducing e-governance solutions meaningful.

fields.schemeName: Excellent Work Award Scheme for Social Worker of De-Notified Communities
fields.briefDescription: The "Excellent Work Award Scheme for Social Workers of De-notified Communities" by the Government of Madhya Pradesh awards ₹1,00,000/- to a social worker from De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic communities for outstanding contributions to their social and economic upliftment.

fields.schemeName: Laptop Supply Scheme
fields.briefDescription: "Laptop Supply Scheme" by the School Education Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh provides ₹25,000/- for purchasing a laptop to students who score 80% or more in 12th Standard from a Government Higher Secondary School or a Madhya Pradesh Board (MP Board) affiliated school.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Awas Yojna (HPBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The Mukhyamantri Awas Yojna, introduced by the Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HPBOCWWB), provides financial assistance of ₹1,50,000/- to registered worker.

fields.schemeName: INDIRAMMA Widow Pension (Rural)
fields.briefDescription: "INDIRAMMA Weavers Pension (Rural)" scheme aims to disburse monthly pensions to widows, irrespective of their age. To be eligible, they should be from a BPL family, be a resident of the district, and not be covered under any other Pension Scheme.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
fields.schemeName: Pension Scheme to Widow
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Social Welfare Department, aims to provide financial assistance to widows aged between 18-59 years. The scheme offers ₹1,000/- per month to help meet their basic needs, ensuring public assistance for widows in need of support to maintain a dignified life.

fields.schemeName: INDIRAMMA Old Age Pension (Urban)
fields.briefDescription: "INDIRAMMA Old Age Pension (Urban)" scheme aims to provide monthly pensions to destitute elderly persons aged 65 years or above with little or no means of subsistence and no family or relative to depend upon. To be eligible, they should be from a BPL family, and be a resident of Andhra Pradesh.

fields.schemeName: Schemes for welfare of School Children belonging to BPL and BC(A) families: Monthly Stipend for BPL Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from BPL students to support their education. Under this scheme, a monthly stipend is provided to students studying in classes 1 to 12 in Haryana Government schools.

fields.schemeName: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Antyodaya Parivar Suraksha Yojana (DAYALU-II)
fields.briefDescription: The aim of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to residents of Haryana in case of accidental death or permanent disability occurred due to stray cattle/animal such as such as cow, bull, oxen, donkey, dog bite, mule, nilgai and buffalo that roam freely.

fields.schemeName: Ambedkar International Scholarship - SC
fields.briefDescription: The "Ambedkar International Scholarship - SC" Scheme by the Rajasthan Social Justice and Empowerment Department provides financial assistance to meritorious SC students for pursuing Ph.D. studies in foreign universities in Humanities and Social Sciences.

fields.schemeName: Additional Financial Assistance for the Children of Persons Engaged in the Cleaning Profession
fields.briefDescription: This scheme aims to provide additional financial assistance of ₹500/- per month to children of individuals working in cleaning/sanitation profession. This assistance is given to students already receiving a scholarship under Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme, ensuring their continued education.

fields.schemeName: Transgender Utthan Kosh - College/Higher/Technical Educational Fees Refund for Transgender Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote higher and technical education among transgender individuals by providing financial assistance for their educational expenses. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a refund of their school, college, higher, or technical education fees.

fields.schemeName: Educational Study Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Educational Study Scheme" provides financial assistance in the form of loans for self-supporting graduate-level courses in professional fields such as Medical, Dental, Engineering, Technology, Pharmacy, Architecture, Nursing, Homeopathy, Veterinary, and similar disciplines.

fields.schemeName: Kisan Parivahan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing medium-sized goods vehicles to facilitate the transportation of agricultural produce.

fields.schemeName: Marriage Assistance Scheme (MPBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance for the marriage of a registered female worker herself (including one-time remarriage) and for up to two daughters of a registered worker. The scheme applies to the marriage of the female beneficiary herself and the legal, adopted, or stepdaughter of worker.

fields.schemeName: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Self Employment Programme for Transgender
fields.briefDescription: The scheme objective is to provide financial assistance to transgender individuals for self-employment/business establishment. Eligible beneficiaries can receive up to ₹50,000/- or 25% of the project cost.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to SC Students for Pursuing Higher Studies Abroad
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support SC students for higher education abroad in fields like Engineering, Sciences, and Humanities. Benefits include up to ₹20,00,000/- for Ph.D. and ₹10,00,000 for Masters, with eligibility criteria including residency and income below ₹8,00,000/-.

fields.schemeName: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Training Programme for Transgender
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the socio-economic development of transgender individuals by providing financial assistance, skill training, and employment opportunities.

fields.schemeName: Bhavantar Bharpai Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Department of Horticulture, Government of Haryana, aims to protect horticultural farmers from market price fluctuations and compensate them if they receive low prices for their produce in the market.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to Widower and Unmarried Persons Scheme : For Unmarried
fields.briefDescription: The aim of the scheme is to provide Social Security to Unmarried Persons who are unable to sustain themselves from their own sources and are in need of financial assistance from the State.

fields.schemeName: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to Farmers for Purchasing Sanedo Agricultural Equipment
fields.briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing Sanedo (Mini Tractor) equipment, which enhances efficiency and reduces labor dependency in farming operations.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Assistance on Purchase of Smartphone by the Farmers
fields.briefDescription: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing smartphones, enabling them to access agricultural technology, weather updates, pest control techniques, and government assistance.

fields.schemeName: Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm
fields.briefDescription: The "Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm" scheme introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, provides financial assistance in the form of an interest subsidy to livestock farmers to take up animal husbandry as a sustainable business.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship for Children of Ex-Servicemen for Vocational and Technical Education
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, a scholarship of ₹15,000 per year is provided to the children of ex-servicemen, from the rank of Sepoy to Havildar, who are pursuing vocational & technical education & have not received scholarship assistance under the Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme or from any other source.

fields.schemeName: Free Supply of Text Books
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides textbooks or cash subsidies for textbooks and writing materials to students of Government and Aided Schools. Benefits include financial assistance ranging from ₹550/- to ₹830/- per annum, with additional support for geometry boxes. All students from Nursery to 12th are eligible.

fields.schemeName: Diesel VAT Relief Scheme for Fishermen
fields.briefDescription: The "Diesel VAT Relief Scheme for Fishermen" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to provide financial assistance by subsidizing the VAT levied on high-speed diesel used in fishing boats.

fields.schemeName: Intensive Castration Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Intensive Castration Scheme" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to control the stray animal population by castrating male calves and helps in reducing accidents caused by stray male animals in rural and urban areas.

fields.schemeName: BC & EBC Girls Residential +2 High School
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide quality education and holistic development opportunities for girls from backward and extremely backward classes. Free education, accommodation, study material, medical support, and skill development programs are provided.

fields.schemeName: Union Territory of Lakshadweep Pension Scheme for Widows
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide monthly financial assistance of ₹1,500/- to widows in the Union Territory of Lakshadweep. It covers widows who have not remarried and have no source of income.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Women and Child Development
fields.schemeName: Nari Adalat
fields.briefDescription: Nari Adalat, a component of the "Sambal" sub-scheme under Mission Shakti, it aims to provide women with an alternate Grievance Redressal Mechanism for resolving cases of petty nature (harassment, subversion, curtailment of rights or entitlements) faced by them at Gram panchayat level.

fields.schemeName: Monthly/Family Pension for Freedom Fighters and their Widows of Uttarakhand State
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance in the form of a monthly pension of ₹25,000/- to the freedom fighters of Uttarakhand and to the widows of deceased freedom fighters, in recognition of their contribution to the nation.

fields.schemeName: Subsidy to Purchase E-Bike for Journalists
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to journalists in Goa for purchasing e-bikes at a subsidised rate. The benefits include making it more convenient for journalists to gather and disseminate news, with the intended beneficiaries being eligible Goa-based journalists.

fields.schemeName: Patrakar Kritadnyata Nidhi Scheme (Journalist Benevolent Fund)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to journalists in Goa for emergencies like medical treatment, marriage, and education. Benefits include aid up to ₹2,00,000/and scholarships for dependents. Eligible journalists must be registered and working in Goa for at least three years.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Atyant Pichhda Varg Medhavriti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide ₹10,000/- as a one-time scholarship to extremely backward class students passing class 10th in the first division from the Bihar School Examination Board.

fields.schemeName: Merit Scholarship: Engineering University
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides ₹1000/- per month to eligible students for pursuing B.E. from a recognized engineering college in Chhattisgarh.  The applicants can either be students who have passed their 10th and 12th standard examinations, or Diploma holders newly admitted to the second year of B.E.

fields.schemeName: Merit Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions
fields.briefDescription: "Merit Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions" is a scholarship scheme by the Technical Education Department, Government of Chhattisgarh. The scheme provides ₹600/- per month to eligible students for pursuing education from recognized polytechnic institutions in Chhattisgarh.

fields.schemeName: Rajya Pratibha Khoj Pariksha Chhatravriti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, students are provided with scholarships or a one-time incentive for pursuing education up to the postgraduate level, after being selected through the State Talent Search Examination organized by the Board of Secondary Education Rajasthan, Ajmer.

fields.schemeName: Old Age Pension To Handloom Weavers Under Coop. Fold
fields.briefDescription: The “Old Age Pension To Handloom Weavers” scheme implemented by the MSME and Textiles Dept., aims to provide monthly financial assistance in the form of pension to a weaver member of a handloom cooperative society.

fields.schemeName: Aapki Beti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹2,100/- per year is provided to girls studying in Class 1 to 8 in government schools, belonging to families living below the poverty line (BPL) and whose both or one parent has passed away. Girls studying in Class 9 to 12 receive ₹2,500/- per year.

fields.schemeName: The Goa State Photo Contest And Exhibition Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage local youths in photography and photojournalism, providing cash prizes and exhibition opportunities. The scheme offers cash prizes of ₹20,000/-, ₹16,000/-, and ₹12,000/- in each category. Entries from applicants born and residing in Goa are preferred.

fields.schemeName: Employees' Pension Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme ensures retirement security for employees covered under the EPF Act, offering monthly pensions, family pensions, and withdrawal benefits. It targets workers in organised sectors, providing financial support post-retirement, during disability, or to dependents after the member’s death.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Upgradation of Gaushala/ Panjrapole
fields.briefDescription: The "Scheme for Upgradation of Gaushala/ Panjrapole"  aims to promote indigenous cow breeds and make cow rearing economically viable.

fields.schemeName: Travel Grants To Goan Authors
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to enable the Goan writers to come in close contact with the senior writers of a language-region other than their own within India to acquaint them with the writers and the people of that region, and to widen their awareness and sensibility about the country.

fields.schemeName: Rajasthan Varishth Patrakar Samman Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, a monthly financial assistance of ₹15,000/- is provided to full-time accredited journalists who are 60 years of age or older & have served continuously for at least 20 years in daily, weekly, fortnightly newspapers, independent publications, electronic media, or news agencies.

fields.schemeName: Bhajan Pakhawaj Workshops
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide knowledge of appropriate and traditional Bhajan Singing and Pakhawaj playing to Bhajan performers through experts from the respective field. Applications are invited by announcement in local print & electronic media. Certificates are awarded to participants.

fields.schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (Punjab)
fields.briefDescription: In this scheme, persons aged between 60 and 79 years receive a pension of ₹200/- per month, while those aged 80 years and above receive ₹500/- per month. The scheme applies only to persons belonging to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category.

fields.schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (Punjab)
fields.briefDescription: The "Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (IGNDPS)" provides ₹300/- per month to disabled persons (80% or more disability) aged 18 and above. After age 80, the amount increases to ₹500/-. Dwarfs are also eligible.

fields.schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (Punjab)
fields.briefDescription: "Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (IGNWPS)" provides a pension of ₹300/- per month to widows aged 40 years and above. After attaining the age of 80 years, the pension amount increases to ₹500/- per month.

fields.schemeName: Assistance for Planting Vegetable Crops for Raw and Ripe Mandap
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers in Gujarat for setting up vegetable trellises (Mandap) for raw, semi-ripe, and ripe vegetables, with varying support for General, SC, and ST farmers.

fields.schemeName: Construction of Water Storage Tanks for Drip Irrigation
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers across Gujarat for constructing water storage tanks to support drip irrigation, with cost-sharing benefits based on farmer category.

fields.schemeName: Samajik Sewa Bhatta Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support traditional faith healers by providing a monthly pension. Under this scheme, ₹1,500 is provided to each eligible traditional healer across the state.

fields.schemeName: Tiatr Cantaram Singing Competition
fields.briefDescription: The "Tiatr Cantaram Singing Competition", organised by the Kala Academy under the Department of Art, Culture and Museums, Government of Goa, aims to promote singing talent, preserve and revive the tradition of Tiatr songs, and encourage both traditional and new compositions that reflect Goa.

fields.schemeName: The Goa State Journalist Awards Scheme
fields.briefDescription: "The Goa State Journalist Awards Scheme" aims to encourage journalists to publish commendable news items, articles, or reports, fostering mass awareness. It provides awards, including a cash prize of ₹10,000/-, to eligible journalists in Goa.

fields.schemeName: Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (Scheduled Caste Category)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Assistance of Concentrate Feed After Parturition (Scheduled Caste Category)" provides 150 kg of BIS Type II concentrate feed to Scheduled Caste Category livestock owners after parturition to support cattle health, increase milk production, and enhance calf development.

fields.schemeName: Assistance of Concentrate Feed for Pregnant Animals (General Category)
fields.briefDescription: This scheme provides free BIS type II concentrate feed to pregnant cattle owned by General Category livestock owners in Gujarat to ensure their good health, boost immunity, prevent metabolic diseases, and enhance milk production.

fields.schemeName: Laado Protsahan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage the birth of girl children in poor families and promote their holistic development. Under this scheme, financial support ₹1,50,000/- is provided in seven installments to the parents or guardians of girls born in Government/authorized Medical Institutions.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for the Under Graduate Meritorious Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University
fields.briefDescription: The "Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for the Under Graduate Meritorious Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University" provides monthly scholarships to students pursuing Under Graduate in various faculties at Junagadh Agricultural University.

fields.schemeName: Scheme to Provide Electric Scooter to Disabled Person
fields.briefDescription: The "Scheme to Provide Electric Scooter to Disabled Person" provides financial assistance of up to ₹25,000 for the purchase of electric scooters to eligible persons with orthopedic disabilities.

fields.schemeName: Pension Scheme for State Agitators Other Than Category of Agitators Who Went to Jail for 7 Days or got Injured during the Uttarakhand State Movement
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides a monthly pension of ₹4,500/- to state agitators not imprisoned for 7 days or injured during the Uttarakhand State Movement, who are not eligible for any other government pension and are not employed in government service.

fields.schemeName: Scheme on Promotion of Use of Liquid Fermented Organic Manure (LFOM) for Increasing Organic Carbon in Soil
fields.briefDescription: The "Scheme on Promotion of Use of Liquid Fermented Organic Manure (LFOM) for Increasing Organic Carbon in Soil" offers financial assistance to promote the use of Liquid Fermented Organic Manure (LFOM) and enhance organic carbon levels in soil.

fields.schemeName: Mukhya Mantri Agricultural Mechanization Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Mukhya Mantri Agricultural Mechanization Scheme" launched by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, offers financial assistance ranging from ₹1,200/- to ₹11,00,000/- to farmers in Gujarat for purchasing agricultural machinery and farm equipment.

fields.schemeName: Operation of Sports Hostels
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage tribal students to participate in sports and prepare them for national & international competitions. Tribal students from Classes 6 to 12 are provided with free accommodation, specialized training, nutritious meals & other necessary facilities in the sports hostels.

fields.schemeName: Organisation of Cultural Programs
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to cultural groups and artists registered with the Department for performing in cultural programs organized during traditional fairs, festivals, regional celebrations within and outside the state, as well as on the occasion of national festivals.

fields.schemeName: ICSSR Doctoral Fellowship
fields.briefDescription: The Indian Council of Social Science Research (ICSSR) offers Doctoral Fellowships to support full-time Ph.D. scholars engaged in high-quality research in the field of social and human sciences. These fellowships are awarded to Indian research scholars registered in Ph.D. programs at UGC-recognized u

fields.schemeName: Pandit Dindayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana (Developing Caste Welfare) (EBC)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support Economically Weaker Sections (EWS) by offering financial aid up to ₹1,20,000/- for house construction. This scheme also ensures that Economically Weaker Sections receive support in securing shelter.

fields.schemeName: Kailash Darshan Yatra
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to pilgrims from Gujarat undertaking the Kailash Darshan Yatra. To be eligible, the applicant must be a selected pilgrim from Gujarat and submit proof of yatra completion within 90 days. Applications for this scheme are accepted offline.

fields.schemeName: Printing and Free Distribution of Sanskrit Textbooks
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote Sanskrit education by providing free Sanskrit textbooks to students studying in Classes 1 to 12. Under this scheme, annual financial assistance ranging from ₹250/- to ₹700/- is provided to each student enrolled in Classes 1 to 12 of Sanskrit schools.

fields.schemeName: Protection Against Domestic Violence
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Protection Against Domestic Violence" by the Women and Child Development Department, Government of Haryana, aims to provide legal, emotional, and social support to women facing domestic violence through grievance redressal, offering protection, counseling, and mediation to victims.

fields.schemeName: Sero Positive Illness Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Sero Positive Illness Scheme" by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Gujarat aims to provide educational scholarships to orphaned and destitute children affected by Sero Positive illness.

fields.schemeName: Sindhu Darshan Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹15,000/- to pilgrims from Gujarat undertaking the Sindhu Darshan Yatra in Leh-Ladakh, fostering national unity. Intended beneficiaries include native Gujaratis who complete the yatra and apply within 60 days.

fields.schemeName: Self-Employment Scheme for Scheduled Castes and Tribes
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support scheduled castes and scheduled tribes families below the poverty line through concessional loans and subsidies for self-employment in various sectors.

fields.schemeName: PMMSY: Fish Feed Plants of Production Capacity of at least 100 Ton/Day - Haryana
fields.briefDescription: This scheme provides capital subsidy for setting up fish feed plants with a minimum production capacity of 100 tons per day, under the Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) to general , schedule caste and women beneficiaries .

fields.schemeName: Varanasi and Amritsar Yatra Scheme
fields.briefDescription: This scheme aims to facilitate pilgrimages to Varanasi and Amritsar for individuals belonging to the Scheduled Castes category. The scheme provides financial reimbursement for second-class train travel, enabling eligible beneficiaries to undertake these religious journeys with ease.

fields.schemeName: State Art Exhibition Competition
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "State Art Exhibition Competition" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to promote fine arts and recognize artistic talents by providing awards and scholarships to artists, art students, and school children across Gujarat.

fields.schemeName: Handicraft Mela Participation
fields.briefDescription: The scheme enables artisans and handicraft organizations to participate in government-sponsored melas across Gujarat and other states, fostering market access and preserving traditional crafts. Benefits include subsidized stall fees, promotional support, sales opportunities for handmade products.

fields.schemeName: Mill Gate Price Subsidy Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides 15% subsidy on yarn purchases from NHDC depots to handloom weavers, cooperatives, and NGOs, along with freight reimbursement (1–8.5%). Intended beneficiaries include weavers below the poverty line.

fields.schemeName: PMMSY: Establishment of New Freshwater Fin Fish Hatcheries-Haryana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the establishment of new freshwater finfish hatcheries. Through this scheme, financial assistance in the form of subsidies is provided to beneficiaries for setting up these hatcheries.

fields.schemeName: PMMSY: Live Fish Vending Centres Scheme - Haryana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support fishers by providing financial assistance for live fish vending centers. A subsidy per unit is provided under PMMSY.

fields.schemeName: Pashu Palan Yojana (GSKVN)
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, loans of up to ₹1,00,000 are provided to sanitation workers and their dependents at an interest rate of 6% for self-employment in animal husbandry or related activities.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for the Welfare of Schedule Caste Families in Fisheries Sector: Subsidy on Annual Auction of Notified Waters
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide full-time employment to individuals from Scheduled Caste families in the fisheries sector and uplift their socio-economic status by promoting fish farming through subsidization of fishing contract costs in designated water bodies.

fields.schemeName: Pashupalan (GBCDC)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide an amount for animal husbandry activities. Low-interest loans are provided to Pashu Palaks.

fields.schemeName: New Akanksha Scheme (Educational Loan) (GTKVN)
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, education loans are provided at subsidized interest rates to students belonging to Thakor and Koli communities for pursuing graduate and postgraduate studies in fields such as engineering, medical, MBA, and MCA.

fields.schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Medium Scale Ornamental Fish Rearing Unit (Fresh Water) - Haryana
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance in the form of a subsidy is provided to eligible beneficiaries for setting up infrastructure such as sheds, breeding units, and rearing and culture tanks for ornamental fish.

fields.schemeName: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana (GTKVN)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to empower women entrepreneurs from Thakor & Koli communities by providing access to micro-loans for self-employment. Under this scheme, financial assistance in the form of low-interest loans is provided to eligible beneficiaries to set up small businesses based on their skills.

fields.schemeName: Foreign Study Loan
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from non-reserved categories for pursuing higher studies abroad in medical and post-graduation courses. It offers loans up to ₹15,00,000/- at 4% simple interest per annum to eligible students.

fields.schemeName: Testing Equipment Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The Government of Haryana launched the Testing Equipment Assistance Scheme to support Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs) in enhancing product quality through financial aid for procuring testing equipment.

fields.schemeName: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana (for women only) GNTDNT
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to create self-employment for women of nomadic and denotified castes and support women entrepreneurs doing independent business. Through this scheme, microfinance is provided to women beneficiaries to pursue a business/occupation of their choice.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship to SC students studying in selected schools under Talentpool Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide the best education to meritorious Scheduled Caste students in high-quality residential schools to help them build their careers and improve their living standards.

fields.schemeName: Retired Sportsperson Pension Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Retired Sportsperson Pension Scheme" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to ensure financial security to retired state-level medal-winning sportspersons aged above 50 years through monthly pension assistance.

fields.schemeName: Term Loan Scheme (GMFDC)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among individuals from the minority communities by providing financial assistance for agriculture and allied activities, small-scale businesses, craftsmanship, transport sector, traditional occupations, and service-based businesses/trades.

fields.schemeName: Educational Loan Scheme (GMFDC)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for technical and non-technical education that creates employment or job opportunities for beneficiaries. Through this scheme, loans are provided to eligible students from minority communities for studies within India and abroad.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Providing Incentives to Coaches of Athletes who have Won Competitions at the National and International Levels
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to honour coaches who have significantly contributed to the success of athletes in the field of sports. Under this scheme, financial incentives are provided to coaches of athletes who have won competitions at national and international levels.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship for Ph.D. Students of Socially and Educationally Backward Classes
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Socially and Educationally Backward Classes (SEBC) students pursuing M.Phil. or Ph.D. to encourage higher education and research.

fields.schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY-Inland): Construction of New Grow-out Pond - Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance fish production and provide employment through inland fisheries. It offers financial support to construct new grow-out ponds for eligible beneficiaries.

fields.schemeName: "Agricultural Income Tax Holiday" under the "Assam Tea Industries Special Incentives Scheme"
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure long-term financial sustainability of the Tea industry and to incentivize manufacturers to move from Crush, Tear, Curl tea to Orthodox tea production. The scheme is implemented by the Finance Department and the Industries & Commerce Department, Government of Assam.

fields.schemeName: Handicraft Rebate Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides 5–20% rebates on sales of handicraft goods to cooperatives, with higher incentives for women-led groups and during festivals. Applications are submitted online via e-Kutir.

fields.schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarship for the Students of Socially and Educationally Backward Class
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial aid to promote education. Scholarships are provided to eligible students of Standards 1 to 10.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Integrated Development for Horticulture (HRT-2)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Scheme for Integrated Development for Horticulture (HRT-2)" aims to promote holistic horticultural growth through financial assistance for production, processing, marketing, and infrastructure support to farmers across Gujarat.

fields.schemeName: Vishesh Katan, Vankari & Vanat Sahay (Spinning & Weaving Assistance Scheme)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance in addition to the central government assistance to spinners and weavers. It provides production incentives to Khadi spinners and weavers with category-wise differential assistance rates.

fields.schemeName: Educational Loan Scheme (GBCDC)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial support to students from socially and educationally backward classes for higher technical and professional education. It offers loans at concessional interest rates for approved graduate and postgraduate courses like engineering, medical, MBA, MCA, and more.

fields.schemeName: Sharodotsav Pandit Nandan Mehta: Plan for Conducting Classical Music Competition and Ceremony
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Sharodotsav Pandit Nandan Mehta: Plan for Conducting Classical Music Competition and Ceremony" aims to promote classical music and percussion by organizing a state-level competition and award ceremony on the death anniversary of Pt. Nandan Mehta, through the provision of cash prizes.

fields.schemeName: "Marketing Incentive" under the "Handloom Marketing Assistance" Component of the National Handloom Development Programme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to develop and promote marketing channels for handloom products to bring greater visibility to the sector and ensure commensurate remuneration to weavers. It provides Marketing Incentive to eligible handloom agencies for creating conducive conditions for marketing handloom products.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
fields.schemeName: Visvesvaraya PhD Scheme for Electronics and IT: Full Time PhD Candidates
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims at generating a total of 1000 Full-time PhD Candidates in emerging research areas of Electronic System Design and Manufacturing (ESDM) and IT/IT Enabled Services (ITES) sectors over a period of 5 years.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
fields.schemeName: Visvesvaraya PhD Scheme for Electronics and IT: Part Time PhD Candidates
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims at generating a total of 150 Part-time PhDs in emerging research areas of Electronics System Design & Manufacturing (ESDM) and IT/IT Enabled Services (IT/ITES) sectors over a period of 5 years.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
fields.schemeName: Visvesvaraya PhD Scheme for Electronics and IT: Young Faculty Research Fellowships
fields.briefDescription: This fellowship is meant for Young Faculty having regular position at their institution and proven track record in research. Support is provisioned for 50 candidates, for an initial period of support of 2 years, extendible till 5 years based on performance review.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance as Interest Subsidy on Home Loan
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide 50% reimbursement of interest on home loans up to ₹1,00,000 for eligible war widows, war bereaved families, war disabled personnel, and attributable peacetime casualties.

fields.schemeName: Coaching Assistance for Pre-preparation for Competitive Exams of ALL INDIA level like IIM, CEPT, NIFT, NLU and IELTS, TOFEL, GRE for going Foreign
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist SEBC and economically backward students in coaching for premier Indian and international exams, the eligible candidates receive up to ₹20,000/- or the actual fee paid.

fields.schemeName: Coaching Sahay for the Preparation of NEET, JEE, GUJCET Examination to both Socially and Educationally Backward Class Trainees/Students and Female Students and Economically Backward Class Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support Socially and Educationally Backward Class (SEBC) and Economically Backward Class (EBC) students with coaching fee assistance. Up to ₹20,000 or actual fee is provided for one exam preparation.

fields.schemeName: Kishori Balika Yojana- Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to create awareness among adolescent girls aged 14 to 18 years about nutrition, health, and life cycle issues, and also provides supplementary nutrition for 300 days in a year.

fields.schemeName: National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm: Planting Materials
fields.briefDescription: The scheme component "Planting Materials" launched under the "National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm" scheme aims to increase oil palm production in the state and reduce dependency on imports through financial assistance to farmers for procuring planting materials.

fields.schemeName: National Mission on Edible Oil- Oil Palm: Nursery
fields.briefDescription: The scheme component "Nursery" launched under the "National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm" scheme aims to increase the production of oil palm in the state and reduce dependence on imports through providing subsidy assistance for setting up nurseries for farmers.

fields.schemeName: Assistance in Trellise Mandap for Cultivation of Vegetable Crops
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Assistance in Trellise Mandap for Cultivation of Vegetable Crops" aims to promote structured vegetable farming through the provision of financial assistance for constructing kachha/semi-pucca/pucca trellis mandaps to all farmers across the state.

fields.schemeName: Integrated Horticulture Development Program for Tribal Area Farmers (TASP) HRT-3
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Integrated Horticulture Development Program for Tribal Area Farmers (TASP) HRT-3" by the Agriculture and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to enhance the horticulture sector through financial assistance and subsidies to tribal area farmers across the state.

fields.schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarship for the Students of Notified Tribes and Denotified Tribes Castes
fields.briefDescription: The scheme supports school education by providing annual scholarships to students from Notified Tribes and Denotified Tribes studying in standards 1st to 10th.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Medhavi Chhatra Puraskar Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage academic excellence among students and provides cash prizes to those who secure first, second, or third positions in their graduation or post-graduation studies at the university level.

fields.schemeName: Rishi and Milan Khosla Scholarship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote higher education among girl students in the state by providing scholarships to those pursuing their first year of post-graduation in various government colleges across Uttarakhand.

fields.schemeName: Sanskrit Chhatra Pratibha Samman
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage and motivate students to pursue higher studies in Sanskrit by rewarding those who achieve top positions in the subject at the high school, intermediate, undergraduate, and postgraduate levels.

fields.schemeName: Integrated Dairy Development Scheme Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, tribal women beneficiaries are provided with milch cattle, dairy equipment, and financial assistance of up to ₹90,000 per unit.

fields.schemeName: PMMSY: Construction of  Plant/Storage of Minimum 20 Tonne Capacity - Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support for the construction of 20-tonne capacity ice plant/storage units, ensuring hygienic fish storage and improving the income of beneficiaries.

fields.schemeName: PMMSY: Construction of  Plant/Storage of Minimum 30 Tonne Capacity - Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to strengthen fish storage infrastructure for hygienic preservation. Through this scheme, beneficiaries receive financial assistance for constructing 30-tonne capacity plants or storage units.

fields.schemeName: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Castor cake/Neem cake/ Liquid Fermented Organic Manure / Green manure seed (For mix in the soil) Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to help tribal farmers improve their livelihood by increasing agricultural crop production. Through this scheme, subsidies are provided on high-yield and hybrid seeds, fertilizers, and other agricultural inputs to Scheduled Tribe farmers.

fields.schemeName: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Water Carrying Pipe Line (TASP & OTASP) Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to improve the agricultural productivity of Scheduled Tribe farmers through subsidized seeds, fertilizers, and equipment. It provides direct support to tribal farmers for enhancing crop production and livelihood.

fields.schemeName: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Tarpaulin Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance crop production and livelihood. It provides subsidies on seeds, fertilizers, tarpaulins, and other agricultural inputs to Scheduled Tribe farmers.

fields.schemeName: Saksham Scholarship
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support meritorious differently-abled students pursuing graduate-level studies in the state by providing them with financial assistance in the form of scholarships.

fields.schemeName: Shridev Suman State Merit Scholarship
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides monthly scholarship of ₹1,000/- to meritorious students who qualify in eligibility test conducted by SCERT Uttarakhand. The scholarship is awarded to the next 5 students from each development block of Uttarakhand who are not selected for the Dr. Shivanand Nautiyal Scholarship.

fields.schemeName: PMMSY: Three wheeler with Ice Box including e-rickshaws for fish vending - Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to strengthen fish storage infrastructure for hygienic preservation. Through this scheme, beneficiaries receive financial assistance for a three-wheeler with an Ice Box, including e-rickshaws for fish vending.

fields.schemeName: PMMSY: Support for Acquisition of Deep Sea Fishing Vessels for Traditional Fishermen - Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to strengthen fish storage infrastructure for hygienic preservation. Through this scheme, beneficiaries receive financial assistance for the support for acquisition of deep-sea fishing vessels for traditional fishermen.
tags: Support For Acquisition Of Deep Sea Fishing Vessels

fields.schemeName: PMMSY: Motorcycle with Ice Box - Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for the purchase of motorcycles with ice boxes. Through this scheme, eligible beneficiaries receive subsidies to enhance their livelihood opportunities.

fields.schemeName: Vidhya Sadhana Yojana Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, free bicycles are gifted to girl students across Gujarat to reduce school dropouts among scheduled tribe girls after class 8.

fields.schemeName: Sri Ram Janmabhoomi Shabari Smriti Yatra Sahay Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to scheduled tribes and tribal communities for pilgrimage to Sri Ram Janmabhoomi in Ayodhya in memory of Maa Shabari. The scheme offers ₹5,000/- financial assistance per pilgrim to enable darshan of Lord Sri Ram for eligible tribal beneficiaries.

fields.schemeName: AYUSH Health and Wellness Centre - Ayushman Bharat Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide accessible, affordable, and holistic healthcare services based on Ayurveda, Yoga, Unani and Homeopathy systems to people of all age groups.

fields.schemeName: Khiladi Protsahan Chhatravriti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote sports among talented youth sportspersons aged 14 to 23 years from Uttarakhand by providing a scholarship of ₹2,000/- per month and financial assistance of ₹10,000/- once a year for sports equipment.

fields.schemeName: Funeral Assistance Scheme for Unorganized Workers (Except Construction Workers)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to heirs of deceased unorganized sector workers for funeral expenses. It offers ₹10,000/- to eligible heirs of e-Shram card holders.

fields.schemeName: Sponsorship Scheme (90% Centrally Funded)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to children upto age of 18 years, including those who have lost both parents, those whose main earning parent has died, & children who have suffered due to violation of laws, child labor, child trafficking, child marriage & similar circumstances.

fields.schemeName: Kunwar Bai Nu Mameru Yojana Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to ST families during the marriage of girls, providing ₹12,000 per couple as financial assistance to eligible tribal women across the state.

fields.schemeName: Higher Education Assistance Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage children of workers and reduce financial burden of education through higher educational assistance. It provides ₹20,000/- for Bachelor of Medicine Bachelor of Surgery admission and ₹10,000/- for other graduate courses to merit students.

fields.schemeName: Documentation And Research Assistantship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage documentation and digitisation of valuable Tiatr-related materials to prevent their loss to posterity. It provides assistance and incentives to holders of such materials and pays honorarium to documentation assistants.

fields.schemeName: National Livestock Mission: Livestock Insurance Scheme - Uttarakhand Livestock Development Board
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide insurance coverage to livestock in order to protect cattle rearers against the loss of their animals due to death, thereby encouraging them to adopt better animal husbandry practices.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship Scheme for Students Studying in Government Colleges
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, scholarships of ₹3,000, ₹2,000, and ₹1,000 are provided annually to Science, Commerce, and Arts students to promote higher education.

fields.schemeName: Maitri Prashikshan Karyakram - Uttarakhand Livestock Development Board
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance livestock productivity and improve  artificial insemination services across the state through the training and capacity building of local youth.

fields.schemeName: Machhali Palan
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to fishermen for repairing, reconstructing, and replacing damaged boats and nets due to disasters.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to Dramatic Troupes participating in Kala Academy’s Annual Tiatr Competition
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage non-commercial dramatic troupes participating in Kala Academy’s Annual Tiatr Competition to produce higher quality Tiatrs. It provides financial support for various production aspects, video recording, and expert workshops, benefiting dramatic troupes.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance for encouraging production of Traditional Khell-Tiatr
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage and preserve the traditional Khell-Tiatr folk musical drama of Goa by promoting quality productions. It offers financial assistance and infrastructure support for staging shows, including video documentation, benefiting dramatic troupes and individuals.

fields.schemeName: Promotion of Tiatr Music
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage individuals to learn blowing instruments crucial for Tiatr music, such as Trumpet & Saxophone, addressing a decline in musicians. It provides financial assistance for tuition and instrument purchase, benefiting youth and other interested persons to preserve Tiatr music.

fields.schemeName: Low Altitude Guide Course
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to train and certify youth from Uttarakhand as professional low altitude guides and provide them with skill development opportunities to strengthen their role in the state’s tourism sector.

fields.schemeName: Enhancement of Spoken English Programme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the spoken English skills of students of Classes 9 to 12 studying in all government schools across the districts of the state of Uttarakhand.

fields.schemeName: Promotion of Acting in Tiatr for School Children
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage school children to improve their acting abilities in Goan tiatr through organized competitions. It provides cash prizes and certificates to winners in comedy and non-comedy acting categories.

fields.schemeName: 6% Interest Subsidy on Loans taken through Banks for Study Abroad
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to reduce financial stress for ST students pursuing foreign education by providing up to ₹1,50,000 subsidy on interest for 3 years.

fields.schemeName: Amit Gautam Memorial Scholarship (B.Tech in Electronics Engineering – 4th Year)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support meritorious students pursuing a B.Tech in Electronics Engineering who are in their 4th year of study by providing a one-year scholarship amounting to ₹7,000/-.

fields.schemeName: Hands-on Training and Exposure Visits under Experiential Learning
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free one-week residential hands-on certificate training programs to undergraduate, postgraduate students, researchers, and faculty members, including accommodation and meals.

fields.schemeName: Scheme To Provide Assistance To Students Seeking Education Outside Goa In Any Field Of Art And Culture
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage young talents in Goa to achieve the highest possible standard in fields of Art and Culture by providing financial support for training outside the State. Assistance is provided to eligible students for basic or advanced education in art.

fields.schemeName: One-day Seminar on Vedic Mathematics
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a common platform for officers, teachers, and students from universities, colleges, schools, and other departments to actively participate and gain knowledge about the simplified curriculum of Vedic Mathematics and its easy-to-apply methods.

fields.schemeName: Exhibition of Books on Tiatr, Its Song and Music
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to help Roman Script Konkani writers and publishers who face difficulties in marketing their books related to Tiatr, its song and music, while promoting Tiatr culture among enthusiasts. The scheme provides bulk purchase of books at 80% of the fixed rate and organizes book exhibition.

fields.schemeName: Divisional Tripartite Competition
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote theatrical arts and drama performances across Gujarat by organizing competitive events at divisional and state levels. Individual performers and theatre organizations receive cash prizes based on their performance rankings in state-level competitions.

fields.schemeName: Ashramshalas (Grant in Aid)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide schooling, boarding and lodging to Scheduled Tribe students at a single location, enabling better employment opportunities and competitive equality with other sections of society. The scheme offers residential education with complete support including free education.

fields.schemeName: Establishment and Operation of STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics) Laboratories
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to establish STEM laboratories in schools across Uttarakhand to provide students of classes 6 to 12 with hands-on science, technology, engineering, and mathematics learning opportunities and strengthen their practical understanding of scientific concepts.

fields.schemeName: Empowering Schedule Tribe/Schedule Caste Communities Using Information And Communication Technology Tools
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide Information Technology related trainings free of cost to the Schedule Tribe (ST) and Schedule Caste (SC) communities. Benefits include basic computer skills and job-oriented Information Technology training courses, intended for citizens, students, local youth, etc.

fields.schemeName: Scheme To Provide Grant To The Institution(s)/Individual(s) For Long Term Project In The Field Of Art And Culture
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to give financial support to institution(s)/individual(s) involved in long term projects in the field of Art and Culture. It provides a maximum grant of ₹5,00,000/- per annum to eligible organizations and individuals, while also encouraging young talent and offering scholarships.

fields.schemeName: Free Uniforms for Students
fields.briefDescription: This scheme Launched on 1 July 2004 with the aims to ensure regular attendance and continuity in education by offering uniform assistance to both boys and girls enrolled in Classes 1 to 8.

fields.schemeName: Goa State Logistics and Warehousing Incentives Scheme: Subsidy Towards Annual Interest Rate Payable On Loans
fields.briefDescription: The subsidy aims to support the logistics and warehousing sector by reimbursing 50% of the annual interest paid on construction loans. The benefit is capped at ₹25,00,000/- (Indian Rupees Twenty-five Lakhs) annually per project and is available for up to 05 consecutive years for eligible entities.

fields.schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Anusuchit Jaati Abhyuday Yojana (PMAJAY): Skill Development
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to generate additional employment opportunities and reduce poverty among Scheduled Castes through skill development. Benefits include various skill training programs of varying duration.

fields.schemeName: Development of Manures & Fertilizers: Assistance for Construction/Installation of Vermi-Compost Units
fields.briefDescription: The "Vermi-compost Units" component of the scheme aims to convert available on-field and farm waste material into chemical-free farm resources as farm input for organic farming through vermicomposting processes. The payment of the sanctioned subsidy is through Electronic Clearance System (ECS).

fields.schemeName: Training/Capacity Building Programmes/Research work on Remote Sensing and GIS Applications
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to strengthen scientific and technical capacity of researchers, students, and government personnel in the field of Remote Sensing and Geographic Information System (GIS) applications by providing training, conducting capacity-building programmes, and supporting research initiatives.

fields.schemeName: Compensation for Crop Damage Caused by Wildlife (in Revenue and Forest Villages)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide timely financial assistance to farmers for crop damage caused by wildlife, assessed and compensated within 30 working days as per revenue book circular guidelines.

fields.schemeName: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Pandemics
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to aged and needy Goan artists who have lost the source of income due to the pandemic. The scheme provides relief in the form of financial assistance amounting to a min. of ₹5,000/- (lumpsum) up to a max. of ₹10,000/- (lumpsum) to eligible artists.

fields.schemeName: Bhagwan Birsa Munda Lakshya Siddhi Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance, in the form of a Scholarship, proportionate to the fees paid by Scheduled Tribe students at the Higher Secondary School Certificate (HSSC) level in order to take offline coaching assistance through reputed institutions for preparation for NEET & JEE.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Bal Hridaya Upchar Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance ranging from ₹25,000/- to ₹1,00,000/- for treatment, covering 07 identified heart diseases in children. Key features include covering costs for treatment at recognized government or private hospitals.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Sudharit Kamdhenu Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to help the farmers to get financial assistance for the purchase of cross bred cows, improved she buffaloes and cows of indigenous breeds namely Sahiwal, Gir, Red Sindhi, Rathi and Tharparkar for their Dairy Unit, to promote self employment in the Dairy Sector.

fields.schemeName: ST Girl Child Literacy Incentive Amount - Class 11th
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to Scheduled Tribe girl students of Madhya Pradesh enrolled in Class 11 to encourage them to continue their education and prevent dropouts.

fields.schemeName: Saral Bijli Bill Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme offers free domestic connections and a fixed monthly charge to ensure easy electricity access for eligible beneficiaries.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Persons with Benchmark Disability Requiring High Support
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote economic self-reliance and ensure the well-being of persons with benchmark disabilities requiring high support. It provides a one-time financial assistance of ₹40,000/- to eligible applicants who are bonafide residents of Goa and belong to the EWS Category.

fields.schemeName: Registration for Crop Procurement
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure fair crop prices for farmers by facilitating government procurement and provides easy online registration for landholding farmers to sell their crops at minimum support price.

fields.schemeName: Sanitary Napkin Distribution - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote menstrual hygiene and prevent reproductive tract infections among adolescent girls aged 10 to 19 years in Uttarakhand by providing sanitary napkins at a nominal cost of ₹6/-, available through all ASHA workers across the state.

fields.schemeName: Raah-Veer Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme encourages citizens to help road accident victims during emergencies by providing a ₹25,000 incentive to individuals who save lives through timely medical assistance.

fields.schemeName: Eja-Boi Shagun Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the safe health and well-being of mothers and newborns by encouraging institutional deliveries and ensuring that mothers stay in government hospitals for at least 48 hours after childbirth.

fields.schemeName: Immunization Programme - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: This initiative aims to protect every child from preventable, life-threatening diseases by providing free and timely vaccination as per the National Immunization Schedule.

fields.schemeName: Hybrid Chilli Production Program
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide self-employment opportunities and increase income for Scheduled Caste farmers living below the poverty line by promoting hybrid chilli cultivation.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Ghasyari Kalyan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide affordable and nutritious packed silage and total mixed animal feed to livestock farmers, especially women, in the remote hilly areas of Uttarakhand. Under this scheme, silage is made available to livestock farmers at a subsidized rate of ₹2.75 per kg.

fields.schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Virasat ka Samvardhan
fields.briefDescription: PM VIKAS is a Central sector scheme that focuses on socio-economic empowerment of six notified minorities in the country through skilling & training, women leadership & empowerment and education. The scheme integrates erstwhile skilling & education schemes of the Ministry of Minority Affairs.

fields.schemeName: Award of Cash Incentive to the Toppers at Regional Level and Students Scoring Centum in the Subjects Involving Theory in Secondary School Leaving Certificate/Secondary School Certificate/Intermediate/Higher Secondary Public Examinations in Government Schools in the Union Territory of Puducherry
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to award cash incentives to encourage students in their education by recognizing top three regional rank holders and those scoring centum in theory subjects in Secondary School Leaving Certificate/Secondary School Certificate/Intermediate/Higher Secondary Exams in Govt. Schools.

fields.schemeName: District Plan: Inter-Village Road Construction Scheme on Contributory Basis
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to facilitate the easy and timely transportation of sugarcane from farms to purchasing centers and sugar mills by improving inter-village road connectivity in sugarcane-growing areas.

fields.schemeName: Grid Connected Rooftop Solar Power Plant Scheme - Uttarakhand Renewable Energy Development Agency
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote the adoption of rooftop solar energy among domestic consumers in Uttarakhand by providing financial support and enabling them to generate clean, renewable electricity, reduce their electricity bills through net metering.

fields.schemeName: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar’s Yatra Scheme to visit the places connected with Dr. B.R. Ambedkar’s life in India
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist the people who want to visit the places connected with Dr. B.R. Ambedkar’s life in India. It provides comprehensive financial assistance, with all expenses for the tour programme fully borne by the Department, targeting SC/ST applicants of Puducherry.

fields.schemeName: Uttarakhand Mega Industrial and Investment Policy - 2021
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote large-scale industrial development and investment in the state of Uttarakhand by creating a favourable business environment, encouraging capital investment, and generating employment opportunities.

fields.schemeName: Tribals Development Plan: Subsidy for Purchase of Motorcycle
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist tribal families in Goa to purchase motorcycles for self-employment by offering a government subsidy, thereby promoting economic self-reliance among low-income households.

fields.schemeName: Tourist Guide Certification Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to train and certify Goan youth as tourist guides through Basic and Advanced modules. It reimburses fees for the Basic course and sponsors the Advanced curriculum, creating employment and entrepreneurial opportunities in Goa’s tourism sector.

fields.schemeName: Term Loan Scheme of NMDFC
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, credit of up to Rs. 20 lacs under Credit Line-1 and up to Rs. 30 lacs under Credit line -2 is extended to beneficiaries among minority communities at 6%  p.a. & 8% p.a. respectively for financing economically viable income generation ventures.

fields.schemeName: Tea Development Programme in the Hilly Districts of Uttarakhand - Uttarakhand Tea Development Board
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote tea cultivation in the mountainous regions of Uttarakhand, providing sustainable employment, optimal utilization of barren and unused land, and economic upliftment of local farmers.

fields.schemeName: Grant For Oru Kala Pooja
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide annual financial assistance to Hindu Religious Institutions situated in the Union Territory of Puducherry that have poor resources. It benefits the temple authorities by covering expenses associated with the performance of Oru Kala Pooja, Current Consumption Charges, etc.

fields.schemeName: The Goa State Incentives to Encourage Investments Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to create sustainable employment, accelerate investment, and support environmentally sustainable industrial development in Goa. It provides financial assistance and incentives under separate target schemes to new and existing Micro, Small, Medium, and Large manufacturing units.

fields.schemeName: Tribals Development Plan: Motor Driving Training [Light & Heavy Vehicles]
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide full financial coverage for motor driving training, including courses for Light Motor Vehicles and Heavy Motor Vehicles, specifically recognizing Goa’s future in the transport sector. It benefits eligible Tribal families in Goa whose annual income is below ₹1,20,000/-.

fields.schemeName: Various Training and Support Schemes of Kisan Vigyan Kendra - Veer Chandra Singh Garhwali Uttarakhand University of Horticulture and Forestry
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the knowledge, skills, and productivity of farmers in Uttarakhand by providing them with the latest technical training in agriculture, horticulture, and forestry.

fields.schemeName: Tea Tourism - Uttarakhand Tea Development Board
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote tea tourism in Uttarakhand by attracting visitors to tea gardens and factories, creating local jobs, and supporting the state’s tea industry.

fields.schemeName: Veerjyoti Puraskars
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize and award women and girls in the State of Goa who have shown exceptional bravery and courage against atrocities, violence, and/or harassment. It provides a cash prize of ₹20,000/- and a scroll/citation to two awardees annually.

fields.schemeName: Craft & Gear (Unit: Boats of Appropriate Sizes Including Nets, Fish & Ice Holding Boxes, Etc.)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to uplift traditional fishermen by providing financial help in the form of a subsidy on the purchase or construction of new wooden or Fiberglass Reinforced Plastic fishing crafts below 26 feet for inland fishing activities in Goa.
