Ministry Of Environment,forests and climate change
Ministry Of Consumer Affairs, Food And Public Distribution
Ministry Of Development Of North Eastern Region
NITI Aayog (National Institution for Transforming India)

fields.schemeName: Grant Scheme for Cultivation of Aromatic Plants - Centre for Aromatic Plants
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage farmers to adopt the cultivation of commercially valuable aromatic crops such as lemongrass, citronella, palmarosa, khus, damask rose, mint (except Japanese mint), geranium, black cumin, rosemary, bay leaf, timur & sandalwood by providing financial assistance to them.

fields.schemeName: Incentives To Encourage Purchases From Local Suppliers Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage consumption through local purchases and support the economies of ancillary units, local Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, and traders. It provides a reimbursement of 2% (up to ₹5,00,000/- annually) on eligible local purchases to eligible manufacturing units in Goa.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance For Renovation And Special Repair Works To Hindu Religious Institutions Situated In Economically Weaker Section Areas / Adi-Dravidar Colonies
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide one-time financial assistance of ₹2,50,000/- for renovation and special repairs, specifically targeting the purchase of building materials. The intended beneficiaries are Hindu religious institutions situated in Economically Weaker Section Areas or Adi-Dravidar Colonies.

fields.schemeName: Map Simplification Process
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide an efficient online system for landowners in Haridwar district to get approval for their residential and commercial property maps quickly and easily, ensuring transparency and reducing delays.

fields.schemeName: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM): Self-Help Group - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to empower urban poor women in Uttarakhand by promoting the formation of self-help groups, improving their livelihoods, and supporting them in income-generating and self-employment activities through financial incentives, bank loans, and government subsidies.

fields.schemeName: Simon Sing Horo Special Post-Matric Scholarship
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a one-time incentive of ₹10,000/- to students of the Tea Tribes and Adivasi Community who have cleared High School Leaving Certificate or Higher Secondary School Leaving Certificate examinations during the current year.

fields.schemeName: Providing Model Maps for Residential Construction
fields.briefDescription: It aims to provide landowners in Haridwar district with model maps for residential construction according to the size of their plots.

fields.schemeName: Employment Subsidy Scheme, 2017
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to create an environment conducive for attracting investment in Goa, incentivise existing units, and boost local employment. It provides a subsidy based on the percentage of Goan employees hired, restricting reimbursement to ₹7,000/- per Goan employee per month.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance for ANM/GNM/Technical Courses
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide assistance to the youths of the Tea Tribes and Adivasi Community for training in job-assured technical and professional Diploma and Degree courses. It supports training for courses like ANM, GNM, and Para-Medical, with a minimum duration of one year.

fields.schemeName: Grants To Patients Suffering From Tuberculosis/Cancer And Other Major Diseases
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for medical treatment to patients suffering from Tuberculosis, Cancer, and other major diseases. It provides a one-time financial grant to patients of the Tea Tribes and Adivasi community.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: Venture Capital Fund for Scheduled Castes
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship among Scheduled Caste individuals by providing concessional finance. Benefits include investment ranging from ₹10,00,000/- to ₹15,00,00,000/- as debt or equity for eligible Private Limited or Public Limited companies.

fields.schemeName: Short Term Financial Assistance To Good Borrowers
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to meet short term financial requirements related to executing specific orders, seasonal fund increases, or firm export orders. Benefits include loans ranging from ₹5,00,000/- to ₹50,00,000/-, primarily targeting existing Medium Scale Industry and Small Scale Industry units.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Cottage and Village Industries (Composite Loan Scheme)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to extend composite financial assistance (term loan and/or working capital loan) to Artisans, Village and Cottage Industries, and Micro Enterprises promoted by residents of Puducherry. Benefits include loans up to ₹25,00,000/- per unit.

fields.schemeName: Nishadraj Scholarship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote higher education among children of fisher families working in federation reservoirs by providing scholarships of up to ₹20,000 for technical courses and up to ₹10,000 for non-technical courses.

fields.schemeName: 108, Emergency Ambulance Service - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide timely emergency medical assistance by transporting patients to hospitals and offering essential first aid through a free, state-wide ambulance service accessible by calling 108.

fields.schemeName: Greenhouse Construction
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote protected cultivation of vegetables and flowers by encouraging farmers to adopt greenhouse technology through substantial financial assistance and support, thereby increasing productivity, improving crop quality, and enhancing farmers’ income.

fields.schemeName: Equipment Refinance Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to financially assist the well performing SSI units for the purchase of identifiable items of equipment / machinery for diversification / modernization / expansion / replacement and also balancing equipment. The applications for this scheme are accepted online through PIPDIC portal.

fields.schemeName: Divyang Pension Scheme - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support persons with disabilities in meeting their basic needs and improving their quality of life. Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹1,500/- is provided to persons with disabilities who are above18 years of age & have a disability of more than 40%.

fields.schemeName: Old Age Pension Scheme - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹1,500/- is provided to senior citizens (both husband and wife) in the state who are 60 years of age or above and whose family’s monthly income is up to ₹4,000/- or who belong to the BPL category.

fields.schemeName: Sanitary Napkin Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide sanitary napkins to adolescent girls and women at subsidized rates through Anganwadi centres across the state. Under this scheme, sanitary napkins are made available to adolescent girls and women at a cost of ₹6.00 through Anganwadi centres.

fields.schemeName: Dwarf Pension Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to individuals suffering from dwarfism to help them meet their basic needs and improve their quality of life. Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹1200/- is provided to persons above 21 years of age whose height is less than 4 feet.

fields.schemeName: Maulana Azad Education Finance Foundation Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide interest-free loans of up to ₹5 lakh to students from minority communities for pursuing higher education in India and abroad.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship for Engineering and Medical Education
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support the higher education of dependents of ex-servicemen by providing financial assistance for pursuing engineering, medical, and PhD courses. Under this scheme, annual scholarships are awarded to beneficiaries based on their course of study.

fields.schemeName: Gunavatta Evam Navaachar Nishulk Paathy Pustak Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free textbooks to all students from Classes 1 to 8 studying in government and government-aided schools, as well as recognized madrasas that follow the state government curriculum.

fields.schemeName: Self-Employment Scheme for Unemployed Minority Communities
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a grant of 25% of the loan amount (for loans ranging from ₹1 lakh to ₹10 lakh) to individuals belonging to minority communities, who are permanent residents of Uttarakhand, for the purpose of self-employment.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Udeeyman Khiladi Unnayan Chhatravriti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote sports among talented children aged 8 to 14 years in Uttarakhand by providing a monthly scholarship of ₹1,500. Players in this age group are selected every year on the basis of Physical & Sports Aptitude Test (P-SAT), with 150 boys & 150 girls selected from each district.

fields.schemeName: Khushiyon Ki Sawari Sewa - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide safe, timely, and free transportation for pregnant women and newborn babies (0 - 1 year) to access healthcare services, including travel from home to the hospital and from the hospital back home.

fields.schemeName: Uchcha Shiksha Protsahan Chhatravriti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote higher education among meritorious students by providing financial support to regular undergraduate and postgraduate students in government colleges and state universities of Uttarakhand.

fields.schemeName: Dr. A.N. Mukhopadhyay Needy Student Fund (B.Sc. Agriculture - Final Year Student)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹25,000/- per year to meritorious & needy students pursuing B.Sc. Agriculture course in their final year of study, based on their genuine financial need, thereby helping to reduce their economic burden & support the continuation of their education.

fields.schemeName: Admission Process in All Government and Non-Government Schools of the State
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide free and accessible education for children from Class 1 to 8 by offering free education and essential learning materials, including books, shoe-bags, and meals, across all government and non-government schools in the state.

fields.schemeName: Old Age Pension Scheme - On Completion of 60 Years (UKBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹1,000/- to construction workers registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board who have attained the age of 60 years.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship on Merit Basis
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage meritorious students pursuing undergraduate and postgraduate studies at Uttarakhand Sanskrit University by awarding scholarships to those who secure the highest marks in the relevant course, class, or subject.

fields.schemeName: Cash Prize to Players and their Coaches for Winning Medals in National and International Competitions
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognize and honor players and their coaches from the state who have achieved remarkable success and won medals at the national and international level in the field of sports. There is a provision to award prize money ranging from a minimum of ₹10,000/- to a maximum of ₹2 crore.

fields.schemeName: Adventure Training for Youth
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to empower the youth of Uttarakhand by providing free adventure training programs that develop their skills and capabilities through various adventure activities.

fields.schemeName: Girl Education Promotion (Bicycle Scheme)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote girls' education in the state by providing financial assistance for the purchase of bicycles to girl students studying in Class 9 in government and government-aided secondary schools.

fields.schemeName: Incentive Scheme for Marrying a Disabled Young Man/Woman
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹25,000/- to couples on marriage, where at least one partner has 40% or more disability and marries a non-disabled person, or where both partners have disabilities.

fields.schemeName: Special Incentive Scheme for Women of Tharu, Boksa and Other Tribes (For Training and Marketing)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to empower tribal women artisans through specialized training and marketing opportunities and ensures the provision of financial assistance for travel, logistics, and stall rent for participating artisans.

fields.schemeName: Assistance to Handloom Artisans - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to disaster-affected handloom artisans for the repair or repurchase of damaged tools, equipment, raw materials, and finished products.

fields.schemeName: Training Programme for Entrepreneurship Development in Biotechnology
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to train youth in biotechnology and develop entrepreneurial skills by providing technical knowledge, mentorship, and guidance to help them initiate biotech startups.

fields.schemeName: Grant for Sex-Sorted Semen to Livestock Farmers
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote breed improvement and increase milk production by encouraging the use of sex-sorted semen for artificial insemination in cows and buffaloes.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Swarozgar Yojana - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote self-employment and entrepreneurship among the residents of Uttarakhand by providing financial assistance and subsidies for establishing new enterprises or upgrading existing small-scale units.

fields.schemeName: State Fisheries Input Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to aims to enhance the productivity and income of fish farmers by providing financial support in the form of subsidies on essential fishery inputs such as hand nets, hapa, nets, mini kits, etc.

fields.schemeName: Science Communication and Popularization
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote scientific thinking and awareness among citizens by providing support and funding to educational institutions, R&D organizations, and NGOs to organize science communication activities.

fields.schemeName: Nishulk Swasthya Jaanch Yojana - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to ensure accessible, affordable and quality healthcare services for all citizens of Uttarakhand by providing free diagnostic tests across government healthcare facilities.

fields.schemeName: Priyank Pathak Scholarship for B.Sc. Agriculture (4th Year) Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to meritorious students pursuing a B.Sc. in Agriculture who are in their fourth year of study, by awarding them a monthly scholarship of ₹ 800/- for one year.

fields.schemeName: Special Financial Assistance Scheme for Meritorious Students of the State for Preparation of Competitive Examinations
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support of ₹50,000/- to meritorious students who have cleared the preliminary examination conducted by the State or Union Public Service Commission for Group 'A' and 'B' services, or the written examination for the Armed Forces (e.g., NDA, CDS, OTA, etc.).

fields.schemeName: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Sahkarita Kisan Kalyan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide interest-free loans to farmers and self-help groups for agricultural and non-agricultural activities to promote self-employment and strengthen the rural economy.

fields.schemeName: Aromatic Awareness Programme - Centre for Aromatic Plants
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to raise awareness about aromatic plants and their benefits, and to provide guidance on cultivation practices suitable to different agricultural climates.

fields.schemeName: Very Dense Apple Plantation Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote intensive apple cultivation among farmers by establishing modern orchards with high-yielding varieties and providing financial assistance through a 60% subsidy on saplings, thereby enhancing productivity and increasing farmers’ income.

fields.schemeName: Establishment of Vermicompost Units
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote sustainable agriculture and organic farming by providing financial assistance for setting up vermicompost units to farmers and women self-help groups.

fields.schemeName: Refinance Scheme for Technology Development and Modernization
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist Sole Proprietorships, Partnerships, Co-operative Societies, Private and Public Limited Companies for meeting the expenditure on purchase of capital equipment, acquisition of technical know-how, and the upgradation of process technology and products.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Acquisition of Equipment and Others
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist organizations in the small-scale sector in acquiring essential infrastructure and technology upgrades. The scheme provides need-based financial assistance for in-house quality control facilities, DG sets, pollution control equipment, computers and related accessories.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Sampoorna Pushti Yojana: Maternal Nutrition
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide supplementary Take Home Ration (THR) in the form of nutrient-rich food products to pregnant women and lactating mothers across the state.

fields.schemeName: Aama Kuni Pilaa
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to focus on early stimulation and responsive parenting in the best interest of each child from 0-3 years. The scheme envisages promoting parent-led, home-based, joyful child-friendly learning by creating an early stimulating environment at the household level.

fields.schemeName: Udhyan Card
fields.briefDescription: It aims to create a unified identification system for farmers engaged in horticulture activities, enabling them to access all horticulture-related schemes and benefits provided by the Government of Uttarakhand.

fields.schemeName: Kalpana Chawla Chatravriti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Launched in 2012-13 by the Govt. of Himachal Pradesh, the "Kalpana Chawla Chatravriti Yojana" is a scholarship scheme that provides financial assistance to girls from economically weaker sections to pursue higher education without any financial burden, and achieve their career goals.

fields.schemeName: Capital Investment Subsidy For Creation Of Infrastructure And Installation Of Permanent Facility/ Acquisition Of Equipment/Tents And Facilities To Establish Adventure Tourism, Water Tourism, Water Sports, Cruise/House Boat, Navigation Infrastructure, Amusement Park, Water Park, Sound And Light Show, Laser Show, Camping (Including Tents)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote adventure and water tourism by financially incentivizing the creation of permanent infrastructure and the acquisition of equipment. It provides a 15% capital subsidy up to ₹3,00,00,000/- to private investors establishing projects such as amusement parks, water sports, etc.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Construction of Marriage Hall/ Community Hall/ Convention Centre/ Commercial Godown
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to assist Qualified Personnel in Medicine, Management, Accountancy, Engineering, Architecture, etc. and Good Borrowers of the Corporation (Industrial Units) for purchase of New Four Wheeler Vehicle (Air Conditioned or Non-air-conditioned) for own use. The applications are online.

fields.schemeName: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Training Kit - Gujarat
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide training and equipment to boost inland fisheries among Scheduled Tribe beneficiaries.

fields.schemeName: Sweekruti: Pre & Post Matric Scholarship
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Transgender students studying at post matriculation or post-secondary stage to enable them to complete their education. These scholarships are available to transgender students  for studies in India only and awarded where the applicant is studying.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
fields.schemeName: Assistance to the Fishermen for Purchase of Fisheries Requisites
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide one-time financial assistance in the form of a subsidy for the purchase of essential fisheries-related equipment, including support for the installation of IBM engines, procurement of electrical or solar equipment, and the purchase of insulated ice boxes for fish storage.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to Fishermen Affected by Natural Calamities / Accident
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial support to fishermen and their families in cases of death due to natural calamities or accidents, or in situations where fishermen are held captive by Pakistani authorities.

fields.schemeName: Investment Promotion Assistance To Setup Large/Mega/Ultra-Mega Tourism Projects
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to attract high-value private investment for developing Large, Mega, and Ultra-mega tourism projects in the state. It offers financial assistance of up to 30% of the capital investment to investors who meet minimum investment thresholds and generate employment for Madhya Pradesh.

fields.schemeName: Rehabilitation of Cured Leprosy Persons: Pre & Post-Matric Scholarship
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to the parents of Cured Leprosy Persons in order to support such parents in successfully bringing up their children against societal intolerance, stigma, discrimination and violence.

fields.schemeName: Biju Yuva Sashaktikaran Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹30,000/-, which is transferred directly to the bank accounts of 15,000 meritorious +2 students through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) for the purchase of a laptop.

fields.schemeName: Technical Education Scholarship Scheme For Diploma Level
fields.briefDescription: This scholarship will be awarded to students who are pursuing Diploma level Courses in Engineering/Technology including Architectural Assistantship or any other equivalent courses as approved by the All India Council of Technical Education (AICTE).

fields.schemeName: Nagaland State Merit Scholarship
fields.briefDescription: The Directorate of Higher Education has launched the Nagaland State Merit Scholarship for the students of classes from 11th to 12th and UG Degree to PG degree so that they will be able to secure their scholarship rights or seats after getting online registration under this scholarship.

fields.schemeName: Award For Meritorious Students Of Meghalaya In The HSSLC Examination (Science Stream)
fields.briefDescription: The Directorate of Educational Research & Training Meghalaya, Shillong is implementing a scheme in providing a one-time award for meritorious tribal students of Meghalaya who passed the current HSSLC Examination (Science) every year.

fields.schemeName: Dr. Ambedkar Medhavi Chhatravriti Yojna to Other Backward Classes Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Dr. Ambedkar Medhavi Chhatravriti Yojna to Other Backward Classes Students” was started by Dept. of Education, H.P. Under the scheme, scholarship is given to top 1000 meritorious students of OBC declared as such in the result of Matric Examination conducted by H.P. Board.

fields.schemeName: Vidyajyothi Scheme- Financial Aid For Uniforms And Study Materials To PH Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Vidyajyothi Scheme- Financial Aid for Uniforms and Study Materials to PH Students” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

fields.schemeName: Educational Assistance For Children Of Victims Of Crime
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Educational Assistance for Children of Victims of Crime” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

fields.schemeName: State Talent Search Examination in Mathematics and Science for Tribal Students of Meghalaya at the Close of Upper Primary Stage (Class VIII)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “State Talent Search Examination in Mathematics and Science for Tribal Students of Meghalaya at the Close of Upper Primary Stage (Class VIII)” was launched by the Education Department, Government of Meghalaya.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to Sportspersons to Pursue Sports Coaching Courses Conducted by SAI, NSNIS, Patiala as a Part of Skill Development Programme to Improve their Employability
fields.briefDescription: The Scheme was launched by the Department of Sports & Youth Services Department, Government of Odisha to provide financial assistance to sportspersons of Odisha to help them become qualified coaches, by undertaking SAI, NSNIS coaching courses, so as to improve their employability.

fields.schemeName: Pratibha Kiran Scholarship
fields.briefDescription: Pratibha Kiran Scholarship has been launched by the Government of Madhya Pradesh. Through this scheme, scholarship will be provided every year to girl students living below the poverty line.

fields.schemeName: The Meghalaya Tribal Students’ Book Grant (Post-Matric Education)
fields.briefDescription: "The Meghalaya Tribal Students’ Book Grant (Post-Matric Education)" scheme was launched by the Directorate of Higher and Technical Education, Meghalaya. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided to the meritorious tribal students for the purchase of books for their studies.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance To Disabled Students Pursuing (10th, 11th, 12th Equivalent Exams)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Financial Assistance to Disabled Students Pursuing (10th, 11th, 12th Equivalent Exams)” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

fields.schemeName: Post-Graduate Scholarships for Professional Courses for SC/ST Candidates
fields.briefDescription: The scheme has been initiated to provide opportunity to deprived sections of the society, viz. SC/ST for undertaking postgraduate level studies in Professional subjects like Engineering & Technology, Management, Pharmacy etc. in recognised Indian Universities/Institutions/Colleges.

fields.schemeName: CM's Jibon Anuprerana Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide one-time financial assistance to eligible research scholars from public institutions in Assam, promoting academic excellence and innovation. It provides ₹25,000/- to research scholars and ₹40,000/- to Divyang research scholars.

fields.schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Uchchatar Shiksha Protsahan (PM-USP) Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University students
fields.briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by the Dept. of Higher Education to provide financial assistance to meritorious students from poor families to meet a part of their day-to-day expenses while pursuing higher studies. The scholarships are awarded on the basis of results of Higher Secondary / Class 12th Board Exam

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Development Of North Eastern Region
fields.schemeName: Financial Support To The Students Of N.E.R For Higher Professional Courses (NEC Merit Scholarship)
fields.briefDescription: The scholarship scheme aims to support students of the North Eastern States undergoing studies in different disciplines at different levels in Institutions inside as well as outside the North-East but within the country.

fields.schemeName: Free Education For Sports Medal Winners / Participants Of National/ International Events
fields.briefDescription: The scheme of "Free Education for Sports Medal Winners / Participants of National/ International Events" is introduced by UGC, to provide financial assistance to the medal winners\ elite sports persons studying in universities/colleges leading to all the full-time regular courses.

fields.nodalMinistryName: NITI Aayog (National Institution for Transforming India)
fields.schemeName: NITI Internship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: This Scheme seeks to engage students pursuing Under Graduate/Graduate/Post Graduate Degrees or are Research Scholars enrolled in recognized University/Institution within India or abroad, as "interns". They shall be given exposure to various Verticals/ Divisions/Units within NITI Aayog.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
fields.schemeName: National Renewable Energy Fellowship Scheme of the Human Resource Development Programme in New and Renewable Energy
fields.briefDescription: Through this scheme, fellowships will be provided for pursuing higher studies/ advanced research in renewable energy. The fellowship scheme is directly aligned with the overall requirement of renewable energy, research thrust areas identified by MNRE.

fields.schemeName: Merit Cum Means Linked Financial Assistance Scheme
fields.briefDescription: It is the policy of the Government of National Capital Territory of Delhi that students get access to high quality higher education provided by Delhi State Universities irrespective of their caste, creed, economic background, or gender.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Samajik Sahayata Prakalpa - Unorganized Workers
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Mukhyamantri Samajik Sahayata Prakalpa-Unorganized Workers" was launched by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura. The objective of this scheme is to provide financial benefits to Unorganized Workers (home-based, self-employed or wage workers).

fields.schemeName: Madhya Pradesh Kalakar Evam Sahityakar Kalyan Kosh Niyam- Death Assistance
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide one-time financial assistance to the dependents of deceased artists and litterateurs.

fields.schemeName: Krishi Vidya Nidhi Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide merit-based financial assistance to children of CM-KISAN beneficiaries pursuing professional and technical courses, supporting higher education through Direct Benefit Transfer.

fields.schemeName: Scheduled Tribe Dashamottar Scholarship (Starting from Class 11) - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support Scheduled Tribe students of Uttarakhand from Class 11th onwards by providing financial assistance for their education, including tuition fees and other academic expenses.

fields.schemeName: Scheduled Tribe Purvadasham Scholarship Scheme (Class 1 to 8) - Uttarakhand
fields.briefDescription: The aim of this scheme is to help Scheduled Tribe students studying in Classes 1st to 8th by giving them financial support so they can continue their education without any financial difficulty.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Statistics and Programme Implementation
fields.schemeName: Sukhatme National Award in Statistics
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to recognise excellence in statistical research and official statistics. Through this scheme, national recognition is provided to eligible Indian statisticians for lifetime or young achiever contributions.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
fields.schemeName: Fisheries Training and Extension Programme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support fishermen attending training programmes. Through this scheme, stipend and travelling allowance or daily allowance are provided to fishermen during training.

fields.schemeName: Study in India Programme
fields.briefDescription: The Study in India Programme aims to promote India as a global education hub by offering centralized admissions, quality education, and visa support to international students.”

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: Dr Ambedkar Central Sector Scheme of Interest Subsidy on Educational Loans for Overseas Studies for Other Backward Classes (OBCs) and Economically Backward Classes (EBCs)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides interest subsidy to the students belonging to the OBCs and EBCs on the interest payable for the period of the moratorium for the Education Loans for overseas studies to pursue approved courses of studies abroad at Masters, M.Phil. and PhD level.

fields.schemeName: Special Incentive to OBC Meritorious Students (Boys & Girls)
fields.briefDescription: This scheme offers a financial incentive of up to ₹10,000/- to meritorious Other Backward Classes (OBC) students who have achieved 80% or higher marks in the HSSLC examination. The objective is to motivate and encourage OBC students to pursue higher education.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
fields.schemeName: Khadi Gramodyog Vikas Yojana: Khadi Vikas Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase productivity and wages of Khadi artisans, improve production infrastructure, boost employment and sales, revive traditional rural skills, modernize sales outlets, and promote marketing and exports.

fields.schemeName: Banglar Yuba Sathi
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide monthly financial assistance to educated unemployed youth of West Bengal to support them until they get employment or join another scheme. The objective is to ensure income support for eligible unemployed youth for a maximum period of 5 years.

fields.schemeName: Prime Tourism Vehicle Scheme-Meghalaya
fields.briefDescription: The scheme boosts tourism by providing 50% financial assistance for adventure tourism vehicles, along with easy credit, operator training, and GPS and branding support.

fields.schemeName: Youth Engagement through Empowered Youth Organisations (YESS)
fields.briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to empower young people and youth organisations by providing financial support for development activities. It aims to encourage youth participation in community service, sports, cultural events, and leadership initiatives across Meghalaya.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: Top Class Education For Students With Disabilities
fields.briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by DoEPwDs for Students with Disabilities (SwDs) pursuing studies beyond class 12th admitted in a full-time course in one of the 'notified institutions'.

fields.schemeName: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Degree)
fields.briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by MoE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical degree course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for max. 4 years for first-year admitted students and max. 3 years for second-year admitted students through lateral entry.

fields.briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by MoE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical degree course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for max. 4 years for first-year admitted students and max. 3 years for second-year admitted students through lateral entry.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: National Overseas Scholarship For Scheduled Caste Etc. Candidates
fields.briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by MoSJE for regular, full-time students from Scheduled Castes, Denotified Nomadic and Semi Nomadic Tribes, Landless Agricultural Labourers and Traditional Artisans; to obtain higher education viz., Master degree or Ph.D courses by studying abroad

fields.schemeName: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Diploma)
fields.briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by AICTE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical diploma course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for a period of max. of 3 years for first-year students and a max. of 2 years for second-year admitted students (later entry).

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: Top Class Education For Scheduled Caste Students
fields.briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment for Scheduled Caste students pursuing studies beyond class 12th admitted in a full-time course in one of the notified institutions. The total annual family income from all sources must be less than or equal to Rs. 8.00 lakh.

fields.schemeName: National Youth Corps
fields.briefDescription: A volunteership scheme by Ministry of Youth Affairs And Sports to tap the potential of the disciplined and dedicated youth In the age group of 18 to 29 years who have the inclination and spirit to engage in nation building exercises, to serve up to two years in Nation Building activities.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: NBCFDC General Loan Scheme
fields.briefDescription: A general loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice for Indian citizens from backward classes for various income-generating activities. Loan up to ₹15 Lakh per beneficiary for pursuing income-generating activities.

fields.schemeName: SVAMITVA Yojana (Survey of Villages and Mapping with Improvised Technology in Village Areas)
fields.briefDescription: SVAMITVA, a Central Sector scheme of Ministry of Panchayati Raj to provide ‘Record of Rights’ to village household owners with issuance of legal ownership cards (Property cards/Title deeds) to the property owners by mapping of land parcels using drone technology.

fields.schemeName: Health Minister’s Discretionary Grant
fields.briefDescription: A health scheme by Ministry of Health & Family Welfare for financially poor patients to defray a part of the expenditure on Hospitalization/treatment in Government Hospitals,for life threatening diseases covered under Rashtriya Arogya Nidhi (RAN), in cases where free medical facilities aren't there.

fields.schemeName: PM POSHAN - Prime Minister's Overarching Scheme For Holistic Nourishment
fields.briefDescription: PM POSHAN is a centrally sponsored scheme by the Department of School Education & Literacy, Ministry of Education. Under this scheme, one hot cooked meal will be provided to the children studying in Government and Government – aided schools. The Scheme is implemented by the Ministry of Education.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
fields.schemeName: Coir Udyami Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Coir Udyami Yojana" by the Coir Board, Ministry of MSME, Government of India, aims to modernize the coir industry and generate rural employment. It offers credit-linked financial assistance to establish coir units by eligible applicants.

fields.schemeName: Post Office Monthly Income Scheme
fields.briefDescription: POMIS is an investment scheme recognized and validated by the Ministry of Finance. It is one of the highest-earning schemes with an interest rate of 6.6%. The interest in this scheme is disbursed monthly. After opening a POMIS account, individuals can invest a minimum amount of ₹1500.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
fields.schemeName: National Scheme Of Welfare Of Fishermen
fields.briefDescription: The National Scheme of Welfare of Fishermen provides financial assistance to fishermen. They can use these for constructing houses and community halls for both recreation and work purposes. Further, through the amount availed under this scheme, fishermen can install tube wells.

fields.schemeName: Post Graduate Indira Gandhi Scholarship For Single Girl Child
fields.briefDescription: A scholarship scheme by the University Grants Commission for Girl students who are admitted in the first year of PG courses in any designated university or a postgraduate college, and happen to be the only girl child in the family. The amount of fellowship is ₹ 36,200/- per annum.

fields.schemeName: National Scheme Of Incentive To Girls For Secondary Education
fields.briefDescription: The National Scheme of Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education promotes the girl child's enrolment of 14-18 years age group at secondary stage, who passes class 8th and subsequently drops out for various socio-economic reasons.

fields.schemeName: Swami Vivekananda Single Girl Child Fellowship for Research in Social Sciences
fields.briefDescription: A fellowship scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC) for Single Girl Child for research in Social Sciences with an aim to compensate for direct costs of higher education, especially for such girls who happen to be the only girl child in their family.

fields.schemeName: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Women In Distress
fields.briefDescription: ISSS (Integrated Social Security Scheme) is a State Sponsored Scheme by the Social Welfare Department of the Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir where financial assistance is provided to Old Age Persons, Widows, Divorcees, Women in Distress, Transgenders, and Physically Handicapped Persons.

fields.schemeName: DPIIT Internship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: DPIIT has introduced an internship scheme for students pursuing Under Graduate/Post Graduate degrees or Research Scholars enrolled in recognized universities/Institutions within India or abroad. The applicants can choose the  period of their choice ranging from one/two/three months.

fields.schemeName: Dr. D.S. Kothari Research Grant For Newly Recruited Faculty Members
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Dr. D.S. Kothari Research Grant for Newly Recruited Faculty Members" is a research grant scheme by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Department of Higher Education (DoHE). The purpose of the research grant is to provide opportunities to regularly appointed faculty members.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
fields.schemeName: Krishonnati Yojana - Sub Mission On Seed And Planting Material (SMSP)
fields.briefDescription: The Sub-Mission on Seeds and Planting Material (SMSP) aims to increase the production of certified / quality seed, increase SRR, upgrade the quality of farm-saved seeds, strengthen the seed multiplication chain, promote new technologies and methodologies in seed production, processing, testing, etc.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
fields.schemeName: National Agriculture Market
fields.briefDescription: Launched on 14th April 2016, e-NAM is a pan-India electronic trading platform that links existing mandis to create a unified online market for agricultural commodities, promoting “One Nation One Market” and enabling transparent, efficient, and nationwide agri-trade.

fields.schemeName: Post Graduate Merit Scholarship Scheme For University Rank Holders At Under-Graduate Level Applicable
fields.briefDescription: UGC, Dept. of Higher Education introduced a Post-Graduate Merit Scholarship Scheme for University rank holders both in General and Honours Courses at the UG level. The scholarship may be tenable for a period of two years.

fields.schemeName: Nikshay Poshan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India has announced the scheme for incentives for nutritional support to TB patients. This scheme will be called “Nikshay Poshan Yojana”.

fields.schemeName: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Pension For Physically Challenged Persons
fields.briefDescription: ISSS-PPCP is a State Sponsored Scheme by the Social Welfare Dept. of the Govt. of J&K wherein financial assistance is provided to Physically Challenged Person who have meager support or no source of livelihood. A pension of ₹1000 per pensioner per month is deposited into their bank account.

fields.schemeName: Lakshmir Bhandar Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Lakshmir Bhandar" scheme is a flagship program to provide financial assistance to women from economically weaker sections of society, for the empowerment of women in the age group of 25-60 years, and enrolled in ‘Swasthya Sathi’.

fields.schemeName: Savitribai Phule Scholarship For V.J.N.T. And S.B.C. Girl Students Studying In 5th To 7th Standard
fields.briefDescription: Savitribai Phule Scholarship is a Scholarship Scheme by the Social Justice and Special Assistance Dept., Govt. of Maharashtra, to encourage the enrollment and to decrease the dropout ratio of Girl Students of Maharashtra from Vimukta Jati and Nomadic Tribes and Special Backward Classes.

fields.schemeName: Chief Minister Samagra Gramya Unnayan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: A 5-year mega-mission called Chief Minister Samagra Gramya Unnayan Yojana (CMSGUY) was launched in the Financial Year(FY) 2016-17, which is scheduled to culminate in the FY 2021-22, coinciding with 75 years of India's Independence.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Baristha Bunakar and Karigara Sahayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Mukhyamantri Baristha Bunakar and Karigara Sahayata Yojana is a welfare scheme initiated by the Handlooms, Textiles and Handicrafts Department, Government of Odisha to provide financial assistance to elderly individuals involved in weaving and craft work, who may face economic difficulties.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Bayan Jyoti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Scheme will be implemented "Mukhyarrantri Bayan Jyoti Yojana" (MBJY) under Chief Minister's Special Package for Handloom weavers.

fields.schemeName: Pension To The Disabled Person
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the pension to the disabled person scheme is providing a pension to disabled persons is multifaceted, but generally centers around promoting social welfare, equity, and inclusivity.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship For Cadets Of Rashtriya Indian Military College (RIMC), Dehradun
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the Scheme is to provide financial assistance to Mizo students permanently residing in the States of studying at RIMC, Dehradun, to enable them to qualify and joint National Defence Academy and further to the Armed Forces. The scheme is 100% funding from the State Plan Fund

fields.schemeName: Bidya Lakshmi Loan
fields.briefDescription: "Bidya Lakshmi" aims to provide education loans for higher studies to children of Assam State Government employees. Benefits include loans up to ₹10,00,000/- at 4% interest, with subsidies for eligible candidates.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance To Poor & Needy Widow Women
fields.briefDescription: "Financial Assistance to Poor & Needy Widow Women" is a scheme by the Department of Social Welfare, Govt. of Manipur. The objective of the scheme is to provide social security by way of financial assistance to widows in the age group of 18-40 years.

fields.schemeName: Tailoring Training To Scheduled Caste & Backward Classes Widows/Destitute Women/Girls
fields.briefDescription: The aim of the scheme is to enable Scheduled Caste Widows/girls/destitute women for self-employment. A stipend of Rs.600/- P.M. and raw material costing Rs.300/- per month per trainee is given to a trainee for getting training from the nearest Kalyan Kendar run by this department.

fields.schemeName: Chief Ministergi Shotharabasingi Tengbang (CMST): Scholarship Of Students With Disabilities
fields.briefDescription: "CMST: Scholarship of Students with Disabilities" is a Scholarship Scheme by the Govt. of Manipur. In this scheme, the Students with Disability who are a domicile of the State of Manipur, and are studying in Class 1st and and above are awarded with scholarship of upto ₹ 8,000/-.

fields.schemeName: Arunachal Pradesh State Stipend Scheme
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, provide financial support to scheduled tribe (ST) students pursuing higher and technical education through stipends and book grants.

fields.schemeName: Pension to Widows and Destitute Women
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, widows and destitute women aged 18 years and above are eligible for a pension if they are domiciles of Haryana and have been residing in the state for at least one year at the time of application submission.

fields.schemeName: Nirman Shramik Antrashtriya Khel Pratiyogiyo Hetu Protsahan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The purpose of the Nirman Shramik Antrashtriya Khel Pratiyogiyo Hetu Protsahan Yojana is to encourage people employed in Labour Department building, other construction works to participate in international sports by providing them incentives for participating and excelling in international sports.

fields.schemeName: Niramaya Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The Department of Health & Family Welfare Department, Government of Odisha introduced a scheme named "NIRAMAYA" - a Free Medicines Distribution Scheme. The aim is to provide quality essential medicines for all kinds of diseases to patients visiting government health facilities at free of cost.

fields.schemeName: Assistance Scheme For Reimbursement For Expenditure On Visa By Construction Workers For Employment Abroad
fields.briefDescription: This scheme will be called "Reimbursement of expenditure incurred on visa for employment abroad to construction workers". The purpose of this scheme is to provide assistance to the registered beneficiaries employed in building and other construction works for better employment opportunities.

fields.schemeName: Self Employment Scheme
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, Subsidies will be provided to the religious minority communities with the help of Nationalized / Scheduled banks to start or improve a small-scale handicraft industry, service sector,  and agro-based activities.

fields.schemeName: Incentive For The Simple Marriage
fields.briefDescription: The Social Welfare Department of the Government of Karnataka has launched the Simple Marriage scheme, which offers incentives to couples belonging to the SC community. The scheme aims to promote the idea of simple marriages and provide financial assistance to eligible couples.

fields.schemeName: Sikkim Unmarried Women Pension Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Sikkim Unmarried Women Pension Scheme (SUWPS)” was launched in 2013 by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim. Under this scheme, the unmarried women of Below Poverty Line (BPL) families in Sikkim would receive a pension of ₹ 2000/- per month.

fields.schemeName: Krushi Mahotsav
fields.briefDescription: The Krishi Mahotsav Yojana is an agricultural development scheme launched by the Government of Gujarat in the year 2010. The scheme aims to boost agricultural productivity and increase the income of farmers in the state.

fields.schemeName: Atal Sneh Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Gujarat Chief Minister Shri Vijay Rupani here today announced the Atal ‘Screening of Newborn for Enhancement of Health’ (SNEH) Yojna to be started in the state from the former Prime Minister Atal Behari Vajpayee’s birthday on December 25, 2016.

fields.schemeName: Nirman Shramik Safety Kit Yojana
fields.briefDescription: "Nirman Shramik Safety Kit Yojana" is a scheme by the Department of Labour, Employment, Training & Skill Development Govt of Jharkhand. The scheme provides a direct cash transfer of ₹ 1,000/- for purchasing a branded helmet and a pair of safety shoes.

fields.schemeName: Sardar Patel Awas Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Sardar Patel Awas Yojana (SPAY) is a housing scheme launched by the government of Gujarat in India to provide affordable housing to economically weaker sections (EWS) and low-income groups (LIG) of society.

fields.schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme - Sikkim
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (IGNWPS)” by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim provides financial support is provided to the poor widows of the state of Sikkim. The beneficiary receives a monthly pension of ₹ 2000/- through DBT.

fields.schemeName: Chief Ministergi Artistesinggi Tengbang (CMAT) – Artiste’s Pension
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Chief Ministergi Artistesinggi Tengbang (CMAT) – Artiste’s Pension" by the Dept. of Art and Culture, Govt. of Manipur provides a monthly pension of up to ₹ 4,000/- to the aged reputed artists who have contributed to making the tradition, culture, and art forms of Manipur more vibrant.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance To Disabled For Self Employment
fields.briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to facilitate the self-employment of unemployed disabled persons. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to persons with disabilities for self-employment, small-scale business, and agro-based project. This scheme is 100% funded by Govt. of Maharashtra.

fields.schemeName: Nirman Shramik Pucca Ghar Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Labour and ESI Department, Government of Odisha has introduced a scheme "Nirman Shramik Pucca Ghar Yojana (NSPGY)" to meet the housing needs of the building and other construction workers in rural areas, registered under the Odisha Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (OB&OCWWB).

fields.schemeName: Special Education And Vocational Training Through Government Institutions
fields.briefDescription: In this scheme, Special Education is provided to children with disability between the age group of 6 to 18 years in the Government Special Schools and Vocational Training is provided to special children above the age of 18 years. Only citizens who are permanent residents of Maharashtra are eligible.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance For Aids And Appliances For Disabled Persons
fields.briefDescription: The "Financial Assistance for Aids and Appliances for Disabled Persons" is a scheme by the Govt. of Maharashtra. The objective of this scheme is to provide assistance to Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) for the purchase of aids and appliances as per their age group and the type of disability.

fields.schemeName: Odisha State Treatment Fund
fields.briefDescription: The Odisha State Treatment Fund will provide financial assistance for treatment of the poor patients suffering from life threatening disorders & diseases. The financial assistance will be released to the Medical Institutions where the patient undergoes treatment.

fields.schemeName: The Post-Matric Scholarship For Scheduled Tribes Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Post-Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Tribes Students" by the Ministry of Tribal Affairs, Government of India, and Government of Mizoram aims to provide financial assistance to ST students pursuing post-matriculation education. It covers various recognized courses.

fields.schemeName: Widow/Abandoned/Single Woman Pension Scheme
fields.briefDescription: Widow/Abandoned/Single Woman Pension Scheme of Himachal Pradesh Government aims to provide financial help to widows, abandoned women, and unmarried women shall be entitled to receive pension for a sum of Rs.1,150/-per month.

fields.schemeName: Unemployment Allowance
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh Berozgari Bhatta Yojana is an important initiative of Chhattisgarh Government for the unemployed. It has been announced by the Chief Minister of the state Mr. Bhupesh Baghel in his budget speech on 06-03-2023.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Kisan Sahay Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme was launched on September 6, 2019, to provide relief and support to farmers in case of crop damage due to natural calamities and was implemented by the Revenue Department of the Government of Gujarat in collaboration with the Agriculture and Co-operation Department.

fields.schemeName: Chief Minister’s Yuva Kaushal Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Chief Minister’s Yuva Kaushal Yojana (CM YKY)” was launched by the government of Arunachal Pradesh on 1st April 2018 to provide high-end training to the youth across the state to enable them to find jobs in the private sector.

fields.schemeName: Cluster Nutritional Kitchen Garden Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The Cluster Nutritional Kitchen Garden Scheme (CNKGS) is an initiative launched by the government of Arunachal Pradesh to promote self-sufficiency and improve nutritional needs by encouraging the establishment of kitchen gardens.

fields.schemeName: Advance For Purchase Or Construction Of House (APB&OCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Advance for Purchase or Construction of House” was started by the Department of Labour and Employment, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh for the registered workers of Arunachal Pradesh Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (APB&OCWWB).

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Vriksharopan Protsahan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh Mukhyamantri Vriksharopan Protsahan Yojana has been started by the Government of Chhattisgarh with the aim of conserving the environment and doubling the income of the farmers by promoting tree plantation in the state.

fields.schemeName: Arun Pig Development Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Arun Pig Development Scheme” was launched by the Department of Animal Husbandry, Veterinary & Dairy Development, Government of Arunachal Pradesh in the financial year 2019-20 with a focus on pig rearing.

fields.schemeName: Schemes Of HP Minorities Finance & Development Corporation
fields.briefDescription: Social, educational and economic upliftment of the minority class people living below the poverty line of the state.

fields.schemeName: ₹ 5 Lakh Insurance Cover To Farmers
fields.briefDescription: Launched on 15 August 2018, the scheme "₹5 Lakh Insurance Cover for Farmers" is an Insurance Scheme by the Department of Agriculture, Government of Telangana. This scheme provides ₹5 lakh insurance coverage to all farmers aged between 18 and 60 years.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance To The Child Victims Of Violence Under TheNational Foundation For Communal Harmony
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance for the physical & psychological rehabilitation of child victims of communal, caste, ethnic & terrorist violence with special reference to their care, education & training, besides promoting communal harmony,

fields.schemeName: Chief Minister's Jeevan Jyoti Swaniyojan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Chief Minister's Jeevan Jyoti Swaniyojan Yojana is a self-employment scheme initiated by the Government of Assam. The primary objective of the scheme is to provide avenues of self-employment to educated unemployed youth in Assam.

fields.schemeName: Mamata Scheme
fields.briefDescription: In order to improve the process in curbing the high rate of mortality and infant mortality rate, the Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Odisha introduced a scheme named "MAMATA" - a conditional cash transfer maternity benefit scheme.

fields.schemeName: Endeavour To Empower-Skill Development
fields.briefDescription: Endeavour to Empower is a customized skill development programme for the youth of J&K.

fields.schemeName: Atma Nirbhar Krishi Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Atma Nirbhar Krishi Yojana (ANKY) is a scheme launched by the Arunachal Pradesh government to boost the agriculture sector. It provides financial assistance to farmers for various agricultural activities

fields.schemeName: Swanirbhar Naari
fields.briefDescription: The Swanirbhar Naari scheme, initiated by the Directorate of Handloom & Textiles, Assam, aims to promote traditional hand-woven items by procuring them directly from indigenous weavers.

fields.schemeName: Subsidy Scheme For Establishment Of Goat Unit (10+1) For Scheduled Tribe Women
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme for Establishment of Goat Unit (10+1) for Scheduled Tribe Women” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to uplift Economically poor livestock breeders of Gujarat State.

fields.schemeName: Subsidy Scheme On Establishment Of 40 R.I.R. Birds Unit For Divyang People
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme on Establishment of 40 R.I.R. Birds Unit for Divyang People” was launched by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Govt. of Gujarat to provide employment, nutritious diet and to raise the income of Divyang People of the society of Gujarat State.

fields.schemeName: Innovation In Science Pursuit For Inspired Research (INSPIRE) - Fellowship
fields.briefDescription: INSPIRE Fellowship is one of the components of INSPIRE scheme implemented by the Department of Science and Technology (DST), Government of India to strengthen the Science and Technology base of the country. This Component focuses on attracting students to pursue doctoral degree.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Medhavi Vidhyarti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to cover the tuition fees for meritorious students from Madhya Pradesh admitted to graduate courses. Financial assistance for admission and course fees is provided to eligible students through this scheme.

fields.schemeName: Stipend Scheme For Poultry Farming Training For Weaker Section
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Stipend Scheme for Poultry Farming Training for Weaker Section” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to raise the income of poultry farmers by scientific poultry farming training.

fields.schemeName: Nationwide Artificial Insemination Programme
fields.briefDescription: The Nationwide Artificial Insemination Programme (NAIP), is a flagship program of the Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying. The objective of the programme is to increase the productivity of livestock by improving the genetic potential through artificial insemination.

fields.schemeName: Schedule Tribe Pre-Metric Scholarship Class 06 To 08
fields.briefDescription: In the year 1984, Rajasthan Government started a scholarship to encourage the education of the Schedule Tribe.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship To Scheduled Castes Students Studying In Government ITI’s
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Scholarship to Scheduled Castes Students Studying in Government ITI's” was launched by the Dept. of Welfare of Scheduled Castes & Backward Classes, Government of Haryana in the year 2017-18. This scheme is implemented through Skill Development and Industrial Training Department, Haryana.

fields.schemeName: Ashirwad
fields.briefDescription: The Punjabi government has established the Punjab Ashirwad Scheme to offer financial support for a girl's marriage.

fields.schemeName: Young Interns Program
fields.briefDescription: The Young Interns Program (YIP) is an internship program, envisaged by the Government of Rajasthan, for providing opportunities for talented and progressive youth to upgrade their skills by gaining practical experience working in programs, schemes and projects of the government departments.

fields.schemeName: Innovation In Science Pursuit For Inspired Research (INSPIRE) - Scholarship For Higher Education (SHE)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "INSPIRE Scholarship for Higher Education (SHE)" aims to attract students to study basic and natural Science subjects at undergraduate and postgraduate levels and pursue research as a career by providing scholarships to interested and deserving students.

fields.schemeName: Rajiv Gandhi Social Security Scheme For Poor Families - 2012
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Rajiv Gandhi Social Security Scheme for Poor Families - 2012” was started by the Department of Revenue and Disaster Management, Union Territory of Puducherry on 25.03.2011.

fields.schemeName: Bihar Rajya Fasal Sahayata Yojna
fields.briefDescription: The scheme strives to back the farmers with financial incentives in the event of a crop loss due to natural calamities.

fields.schemeName: Scheme For Subsidy On Interest For Establishment Of 1 To 20 Milch Animal Farm For Scheduled Caste
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Scheme for Subsidy on Interest for Establishment of 1 to 20 Milch Animal Farm for Scheduled Caste” was started by the Dept. of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

fields.schemeName: Schedule Caste Pre-Metric Scholarship Class 06 To 08
fields.briefDescription: In the year 1998, Rajasthan Government started a scholarship to encourage the education of Schedule Cast.

fields.schemeName: Incentive To Saharia Students For B.Ed
fields.briefDescription: In Rajasthan, "Incentive To Saharia Students For B.Ed" scheme is run by the "Tribal Area Development Department" from 2004-05.

fields.schemeName: Scheme For Grant Of Rewards To The Children Of Salt Labourers
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Scheme for Grant of Rewards to the Children of Salt Labourers” was launched by Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), Ministry of Commerce and Industry in the year 1985.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance For Education Of Children Of Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Financial Assistance for Education of Children of Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

fields.schemeName: LLB Internship Programme
fields.briefDescription: Department of Justice introduced an Internship Programme for young law students. The purpose is to well acquaint law students in the field of research & referencing work, in various specialized areas of justice delivery, such as Tele-Law, Nyaya Bandhu etc.

fields.schemeName: Coaching Schemes For Sc/st/obc (non-creamy Layer) & Minority Students For Universities
fields.briefDescription: Coaching schemes for students belonging to SC (Scheduled Caste), ST (Scheduled Tribe), OBC (Other Backward Classes) (non-creamy layer), and minority communities are implemented to provide them with equal opportunities and support in pursuing higher education.

fields.schemeName: Food Safety & Standards Authority Of India (FSSAI) Internship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The Internship Program by the FSSAI provides interns with unique learning opportunities in various areas of food regulation of food safety administration. FSSAI is a statutory body established under the Food Safety & Standards Act, 2006 under the aegis of the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.

fields.schemeName: Scheme For Award Of Senior/Junior Fellowships To Outstanding Persons In The Fields Of Culture
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Scheme for Award of Senior/Junior Fellowships to Outstanding Persons in the Fields of Culture” was launched by the Ministry of Culture, Government of India.

fields.schemeName: Sindhu Dharshan Yatra Scheme 2016
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Sindhu Dharshan Yatra Scheme 2016” was launched by Tourism Department, Government of Haryana on 12th July 2016. Under the scheme, the government of Haryana provides financial assistance to the pilgrims of the State of Haryana.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Aarthik Kalyan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Mukhyamantri Aarthik Kalyan Yojana” was launched by the Department of Industrial Policy and Investment Promotion, Government of Madhya Pradesh on 1st August 2014.

fields.schemeName: Internship Policy Of The Madhya Pradesh Tourism Board
fields.briefDescription: The Internship Policy of the Madhya Pradesh Tourism Board intends to provide practical training experience (in summer/ winter etc.) to the students studying in various hospitality / tourism-related schools in Madhya Pradesh or outside the state.

fields.schemeName: Internship Policy Of Indian Council For Cultural Relations (ICCR)
fields.briefDescription: ICCR provides an excellent opportunity for budding scholars to familiarise themselves with the role of soft power in foreign policy formulation in the Govt of India. These ‘Interns’ would be expected to supplement the process of analysis in various fields (creative writing, cultural mapping, etc).

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Personnel, Public Grievances And Pensions
fields.schemeName: Right To Information Fellowship
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, DOPT proposes to offer four short-term fellowships to researchers from the field of media / Civil Society professionals / RTI Trainers to conduct field-based research on themes relating to RTI. It is hoped that the research output will enhance their understanding of the RTI Act.

fields.schemeName: Assistance For Delivery / Miscarriage Of Pregnancy / Termination Of Pregnancy To Female Differently Abled Person
fields.briefDescription: The Government of Tamil Nadu introduced "Assistance for Delivery/Miscarriage of Pregnancy/Termination of Pregnancy to Female Differently Abled Person.

fields.schemeName: Scheme For Providing Assistive Devices To Differently Abled Persons
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Scheme for Providing Assistive Devices to Differently Abled Persons” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

fields.schemeName: Griha Aadhar Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Griha Aadhar Scheme" addresses the problem of spiralling prices and provides support to the housewives/homemakers from the middle, lower-middle and poor sections of society, to maintain a reasonable standard of living for their families.
