NITI Aayog (National Institution for Transforming India)

fields.schemeName: Sindhu Dharshan Yatra Scheme 2016
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Sindhu Dharshan Yatra Scheme 2016” was launched by Tourism Department, Government of Haryana on 12th July 2016. Under the scheme, the government of Haryana provides financial assistance to the pilgrims of the State of Haryana.

fields.schemeName: Snehayanam Scheme For Mothers Of Persons With Special Needs
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Snehayanam Scheme for Mothers of Persons with Special Needs” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

fields.schemeName: “RAKSHAK PURASKARS’’ Award
fields.briefDescription: The awards are conferred to the individuals who have shown exceptional courage, especially in adverse circumstances in coming to aid, protecting or helping beyond the call of duty and assisting in dealing with the victims of any type of violence, attack or harassment against women and girls.

fields.schemeName: Shreshtam Scheme For Ensuring Participation Of PwDs In Arts & Sports
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Shreshtam Scheme for Ensuring Participation of PwDs in Arts & Sports” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

fields.schemeName: Scheme For Providing Assistive Devices To Differently Abled Persons
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Scheme for Providing Assistive Devices to Differently Abled Persons” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

fields.schemeName: Griha Aadhar Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The "Griha Aadhar Scheme" addresses the problem of spiralling prices and provides support to the housewives/homemakers from the middle, lower-middle and poor sections of society, to maintain a reasonable standard of living for their families.

fields.schemeName: Atal Asra Yojana
fields.briefDescription: "Atal Asra Yojana" by the Department of Tribal Welfare, Government of Goa provides financial assistance of up to ₹ 3,00,000 to individuals from Scheduled Tribes communities for construction/ re-construction and repairs of the house.

fields.schemeName: Antya Sanskar Sahay Yojana
fields.briefDescription: "Antya Sanskar Sahay Yojana" by the Department of Tribal Welfare, Government of Goa provides grants of financial assistance for the performance of funeral and religious ceremonies of Scheduled Tribe (ST) families.

fields.schemeName: Swasraya Scheme For Parents/Mothers Of Physically Handicapped/Mentally Retarded Persons
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Swasraya Scheme for Parents/Mothers of Physically Handicapped/Mentally Retarded Persons” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship For Transgender Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Scholarship for Transgender Students” was launched by the Social Justice Department, Government of Kerala for providing scholarships to Transgender students from 7th standard onwards studying in State Government/ Government aided/ Self Financing schools.

fields.schemeName: Old Age And Destitute Pension
fields.briefDescription: The Government of Puducherry introduced Old Age And Destitute Pension Scheme to extend a helping hand by way of monthly financial assistance to Old Age Persons/Widows/ Deserted Women/ Unmarried Women and Enuches so that they could defray some petty personal expenses without depending on others.

fields.schemeName: Nihshaktajan Vivaah Protsaahan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: In 2008, Madhya Pradesh State Government started the "Nihshaktajan Vivaah Protsaahan Yojana" for differently ables persons

fields.schemeName: Development of Industrie-Training Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The Government of Puducherry introduced the Scheme Development Of Industries-Training Scheme for the candidates to develop their skills to enable them to start their own ventures or to get suitable employment opportunity by sponsoring to selected short term trades.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
fields.schemeName: PM Vishwakarma
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "PM Vishwakarma " by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, is a new scheme that envisages providing end-to-end holistic support to traditional artisans and craftspeople in scaling up their conventional products and services.

fields.schemeName: Medhavi Chhatr/Chhatra Shiksha Protsahan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh state Government started a scheme "Medhavi Chhatr/ Chhatra Shiksha Protsahan Yojana" for education.

fields.schemeName: Durghatana Mein Chikitsa Sahaayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started this scheme "Durghatana Mein Chikitsa Sahaayata Yojana" for labor workers.

fields.schemeName: Merit Based Award and Recognition Of High Performance In The Board Exams Of SSC And HSSC In The State Of Goa
fields.briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to motivate students by giving Merit Based Award on the benchmark of performance and to provide financial incentives to high-performing students who are economically weak. The scheme aims to increase the representation of the ST Community in the High-Rank Holders.

fields.schemeName: Goa Tribal's Employment Generation Programme Scheme
fields.briefDescription: "Goa Tribal’s Employment Generation Programme Scheme" provides a subsidy of 40% on the total loan amount i.e. 95% of the project cost. The scheme is for educated unemployed individuals in the 18 to 45 years age group who are members of the tribal communities of Goa.

fields.schemeName: Kala Gaurav Puraskar
fields.briefDescription: "Kala Gaurav Puraskar" is presented to artists working in the field of Art and Culture who have given outstanding contributions in their respective fields of art. Such artists need to be felicitated and their substantial contribution needs to be felicitated.

fields.schemeName: Fee Waiver Scheme For SC/ST Students Pursuing Higher Education
fields.briefDescription: "Fee Waiver Scheme for SC/ST Students Pursuing Higher Education" provides free access to every SC/ST student, to the institutions of higher learning so that that no eligible SC/ST students are deprived of higher education for want of resources.

fields.schemeName: Safai Karmakar Prasuti Sahayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Safai Karmakar Prasuti Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: Free Coaching for SCs, OBCs and beneficiaries of PM CARES Children Scheme
fields.briefDescription: To provide high-quality free coaching to economically disadvantaged Scheduled Castes (SCs), Other Backward Classes (OBCs), and eligible beneficiaries of the PM CARES Children Scheme for competitive exams in public and private sector employment and admission into professional courses.

fields.schemeName: Viranarayan Singh Shram Ann Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh state Government started a scheme "Viranarayan Singh Shram Ann Yojana" for unorganized worker on 17 January 2018.

fields.schemeName: Asangathit Karmakar Samachar-Patr Hawker Cycle Sahayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Asangathit Karmakar Samachar-Patr Hawker Cycle Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 10 September 2012.

fields.schemeName: Asangathit Karmakar Gambhir Bimari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Asangathit Karmakar Gambhir Bimari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 28 April 2012.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: Pre-Matric Scholarships to the Children of Those Engaged in Occupations Involving Cleaning and Prone to Health Hazards
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to children whose parents/guardians belong to one of the following categories, to pursue Pre-Matric education: Tanners, Flayers, Waste Pickers and Persons who are either presently engaged in Manual Scavenging.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Nirmaan Majadur suraksha upakaran sahaayata yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started "Mukhyamantri Nirmaan Majadur Suraksha Upakaran Sahaayata Yojana" for Building and other construction workers.

fields.schemeName: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Water Augmentation
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Water Augmentation" by the Coffee Board, Department of Commerce, aims to improve the production and productivity of coffee plantations by encouraging water augmentation in traditional areas.

fields.schemeName: Short Term Fellowship under the Human Resource Development Programme for Health Research
fields.briefDescription: Short Term Fellowship under the Human Resource Development Programme for Health Research aims to provide advanced training in India & abroad to medical and health research personnel in cutting-edge research areas related to medicine & health.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: Central Sector Scheme of National Fellowship for Providing Fellowship to Scheduled Caste Students to Pursue M.Phil. & PhD
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides opportunities to Scheduled Castes students to pursue higher education leading to M.Phil/Ph.D degrees in Sciences, Humanities and Social Science streams. The objective of the scheme is to provide fellowships in the form of financial assistance to SC students.

fields.schemeName: Post Graduate Scholarship for GATE/GPAT Qualified Students for Pursuing M.Tech/M.E./M.Pharm-UGC
fields.briefDescription: University Grants Commission is implementing the scheme of Post Graduate Scholarship for GATE/GPAT Qualified Students for Pursuing M.Tech/M.E./M.Pharm courses (including integrated dual degree courses).

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: Free Coaching for Students with Disabilities
fields.briefDescription: A Scheme "Free Coaching for Students with Disabilities" was initiated by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities under the "Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment".

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
fields.schemeName: FutureSkills Prime Incentive Program
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote a novel skilling ecosystem in the country, the programme/scheme would incentivize the cost of the eligible course(s) concerned, providing authentic and accredited certifications that are acceptable in the industry.

fields.schemeName: Padho Pardesh
fields.briefDescription: Padho Pardesh is a scheme of interest subsidy on educational loans for overseas studies for the students belonging to the minority communities. The scheme was launched by the Ministry of Minority Affairs in 2006 under the Prime Minister's New 15 Point Programme for the Welfare of Minorities.

fields.schemeName: Junior Research Fellowship
fields.briefDescription: The Department of Biotechnology, Ministry of Science & Technology, Government of India provides fellowships for pursuing research in biotechnology and life-sciences through the "DBT-Junior Research Fellowship" (DBT-JRF) Programme.

fields.schemeName: Kachara Binane Vaale Hetu Suraksha Upakaran Sahaayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Kachara Beenane Vaale Hetu Suraksha Upakaran Sahaayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 19 June 2017.

fields.schemeName: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Water Augmentation
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Water Augmentation" aims to improve the productivity and quality of coffee by facilitating the creation of infrastructure for water augmentation for irrigation and wet processing of coffee.

fields.schemeName: Visiting Advanced Joint Research Faculty Scheme
fields.briefDescription: VAJRA Faculty Scheme is a dedicated program exclusively for overseas scientists and academicians with emphasis on NRI and Persons of Indian Origin/Overseas Citizen of India to work as adjunct/visiting faculty for a specific period of time in Indian Public funded academic and research institutions.

fields.schemeName: Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Cycle, Chhatari, Chappal/Joota Sahayta Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Cycle, Chhatari, Chappal/Joota Sahayta Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

fields.schemeName: Theka Shramik, Hamaal Shramik Evan Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Gambhir Bimaari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Theka Shramik, Hamaal Shramik Evan Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Gambhir Bimaari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 05 June 2018.

fields.schemeName: Theka Shramik, Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Evan Hamal Shramik Prasuti Sahayta Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Theka Shramik, Gharelu Mahila Kamgar Evan Hamal Shramik Prasuti Sahayta Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

fields.schemeName: SERB-Technology Translation Award
fields.briefDescription: The “SERB-Technology Translation Award (SERB-TETRA)” is a new scheme launched by the Science and Engineering Research Board, Government of India for catalyzing technology translation in academic settings.

fields.schemeName: J.C. Bose Fellowship
fields.briefDescription: The “J.C. Bose fellowship” is awarded to active scientists in recognition of their outstanding performance. The fellowship is scientist-specific and very selective.

fields.schemeName: National Scholarship For Post Graduate Studies
fields.briefDescription: A scheme started by Ministry of Education for the student Higher education.

fields.schemeName: Safai Karmakar Gambhir Bimari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Safai Karmakar Gambhir Bimari Chikitsa Sahayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 28 April 2012.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Aadharbhut Shiksha Prashikshan Sahayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Mukhyamantri Aadharbhut Shiksha Prashikshan Sahayata Yojana" for Building and other construction worker on 29 March 2023.

fields.schemeName: West Bengal Student Credit Card Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The Higher Education Department, Government of West Bengal has introduced the Student Credit Card Scheme for the students of West Bengal to enable them to pursue higher education without having any financial constraints.

fields.schemeName: WISE Fellowship for Ph.D.
fields.briefDescription: The "WISE Fellowship for Ph.D. (WISE-PhD)" of the Department of Science and Technology aims to provide an opportunity to carry out Doctoral research in basic and applied sciences to women scientists and technologists between the age group of 27-45 years who want to pursue research in STEM fields.

fields.schemeName: Delhi Arogya Nidhi
fields.briefDescription: Delhi Arogya Nidhi (DAN) is a scheme to provide financial assistance upto ₹1.5 lacs to needy patients who have National Food Security Cards for the treatment of diseases in Government hospitals only.

fields.schemeName: Women’s Instinct for Developing and Ushering in Scientific Heights & Innovation
fields.briefDescription: 'WIDUSHI' programme aims to encourage and support senior women scientists to conduct research in interdisciplinary areas of Science and Technology.

fields.schemeName: Swarnajayanti Fellowships Scheme
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, a selected number of young scientists, with proven track record, are provided special assistance and support to enable them to pursue basic research in frontier areas of science and technology.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance for Construction/ Purchase of Wooden/ FRP Fishing Vessel (Canoe) for Fishermen
fields.briefDescription: Through this scheme, 50% of the actual cost of the Wooden/ Fiber-Reinforced Plastic (FRP) Fishing Vessel (Canoe) purchased by the fishermen is covered by the Government of Goa. The applicant will be entitled to a subsidy grant once every four years on one craft per family household.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: Disha - Early Intervention and School Readiness Scheme
fields.briefDescription: This scheme aims at setting up Disha Centres for early intervention for Person with Disability (PwD) in 0-10 years of age covered under the National Trust Act, through therapies, trainings and providing support to family members.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to Brackish Water Aquaculture Farms
fields.briefDescription: Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided to eligible fishermen for the construction and renovation of the Farm, for the purchase of farming equipment, and for the purchase of feed. Only the farmers having a water spread area of 2 hectares or less can apply to this scheme.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance for Setting up Crab Culture Unit
fields.briefDescription: Through this scheme, financial assistance of 25% of the actual cost, limited to ₹1,50,000 per hectare is provided to eligible fishermen for setting up crab culture unit. Only Fish Farmer/ Individual/ Registered Self Help Group/ Societies, interested in the setting up of the Crab Farming Unit.

fields.schemeName: Disability Pension - West Bengal
fields.briefDescription: In 2010, the Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department of the West Bengal State Government introduced the "Disability Pension" scheme.

fields.schemeName: E-YUVA Scheme: BIRAC’s E-YUVA Fellows (for under graduate students)
fields.briefDescription: BIRAC’s E-YUVA Fellows shall apply as a team and pursue their research work at their College/University labs and will also be allowed access to facilities at EYC and EYC Knowledge Partners as and when required.

fields.schemeName: E-YUVA Scheme: BIRAC’s Innovation Fellows (for post graduates and above)
fields.briefDescription: BIRAC’s Innovation fellows shall apply as an individual and are required to work full time at EYC. BIRAC’s Innovation Fellows are expected to initiate biotech startups. Hence, only proposals with potential to commercialize innovative products and technologies will be considered for support.

fields.schemeName: Atal Beemit Vyakti Kalyan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Atal Beemit Vyakti Kalyan Yojana (ABVKY)” was introduced by the Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) on a pilot basis for a period of 2 years w.e.f. 01.07.2018 for providing relief to the Insured Persons (IPs) who have become unemployed.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: Samarth-Respite Care Scheme
fields.briefDescription: Samarth (Respite Care) scheme, launched by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, aims at setting up Samarth Centres for providing respite and residential care for the specified categories of Persons with Disability (PwD).

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: Gharaunda-Group Home for Adults Scheme
fields.briefDescription: Gharaunda (Group Home for Adults) scheme aims at setting up Gharaunda Centres or Registered Organisations (RO) for for all Adult PwDs covered under the National Trust Act with adequate and quality care service with acceptable living standards including provision of basic medical care from profession

fields.schemeName: Grant of 50% Subsidy for the Purchase of Aquarium and Its Accessories under "Development of Freshwater Aquaculture and Setting up of Aquarium, Ornamental Fish Breeding Centre"
fields.briefDescription: "Grant of 50% Subsidy for the Purchase of Aquarium and Its Accessories" is introduced with the objective to propagate the importance of aquarium keeping and to inculcate the art of aquarium keeping among the general public. The scheme is extended to all the regions of Puducherry.

fields.schemeName: Manabik Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The Manabik Pension Scheme is a financial assistance program launched in 2018 to provide monthly pensions to individuals with disabilities in West Bengal.

fields.schemeName: Old Age Pension
fields.briefDescription: In 2010, the Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department of the West Bengal State Government introduced the "Old Age Pension" scheme.

fields.schemeName: Zero Ticket Bus Travel Scheme for Women
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide to eligible women/ transgender beneficiaries of Tamil Nadu under the Zero Ticket Bus Travel Scheme for Women, Free of Cost Travel in Government of Tamil Nadu Buses. No Need to Pay any Fare up to 30 Kilometers.

fields.schemeName: Scheme of Pension for Eminent Sports Persons
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Scheme of Pension for Eminent Sports Persons” was launched by the Department of Sports, Government of Punjab to provide pension to eminent veteran sportsmen who have excelled at International level during their youth and made the nation proud.

fields.schemeName: Supply of Dhotis and Sarees to Scheduled Caste (SC) People
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Supply of Dhotis and Sarees to Scheduled Caste (SC) People” by the Adi Dravidar Welfare and Scheduled Tribes Welfare Department, Union Territory of Puducherry is introduced to provide clothing items (lungi, shirt, saree, blouse, etc) to the Scheduled Caste (SC) people of Puducherry.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
fields.schemeName: Coconut Palm Insurance Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The “Coconut Palm Insurance Scheme (CPIS)” is being implemented by the Coconut Development Board, Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, Government of India with the objective of insuring coconut palms against natural calamities, climatic risks, pests, diseases, and other perils.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to Old Age Pensioner Suffering From TB/ Cancer
fields.briefDescription: “Financial Assistance to Old Age Pensioner Suffering From TB/ Cancer” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Puducherry, was introduced to extend a helping hand by way of financial assistance to Old Age/Destitute Pensioners who are suffering from TB/Cancer to meet the medical expenses.

fields.schemeName: Grant of House Construction Subsidy to Scheduled Caste People
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Grant of House Construction Subsidy to Scheduled Caste People” was introduced by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Dept, Govt of Puducherry. The poor Scheduled Caste people, and other Economically backward class people, who meet the eligibility criteria, are provided house construction subsidy.

fields.schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Uchchatar Shiksha Protsahan Yojana: Central Sector Interest Subsidy Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides full interest subsidy during the moratorium period on loan availed under Model Education Loan Scheme of Indian Banks’ Association (IBA) to students belonging to economically weaker sections whose annual parental income is up to ₹4.5 Lakhs from all sources.

fields.schemeName: Grant of Marriage Allowance to the Widow's Daughter
fields.briefDescription: This scheme aims to provide financial support to widows for the marriage of their daughters. Eligible widows can receive ₹25,000/- to cover marriage expenses. The scheme is implemented through the Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Puducherry.

fields.schemeName: "Annual Insurance Premium for Boat Owners" under "Financial Assistance for Availing Subsidy Components for the Development of Marine Fisheries"
fields.briefDescription: "Annual Insurance Premium for Boat Owners" under "Financial Assistance for Availing Subsidy Components for the Development of Marine Fisheries" is introduced to increase marine fish production through subsidies for the annual premiums for insurance coverage paid by the mechanized boat operators.

fields.schemeName: Reimbursement of Tuition Fees for Typewriting and Shorthand Courses for Children of Widows
fields.briefDescription: “Reimbursement of Tuition Fees for Typewriting and Shorthand Courses for Children of Widows” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Pondicherry, was introduced to encourage the children of widows to pursue Typewriting and Shorthand courses and facilitate the reimbursement of course fees.

fields.schemeName: Biju Patnaik Sports Award for Excellence in Sports Journalism
fields.briefDescription: The award is given to the journalists who have done significant work in the sphere of journalism for the promotion and popularization of sports and games as well as fighting for the causes of sports and sportspersons in the State of Odisha.

fields.schemeName: "Conversion/Modernisation of Mechanised Fishing Boats for Deep Sea Fishing" under "Financial Assistance for Availing Subsidy Components for the Development of Marine Fisheries"
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Conversion/Modernisation of Mechanised Fishing Boats for Deep Sea Fishing" is introduced by the Dept of Fisheries and Fishermen Welfare, Govt of Puducherry to increase marine fish production by extending grants for the conversion/modernization of mechanized boats for deep-sea fishing.

fields.schemeName: Grant of Financial Assistance to Poor Scheduled Caste Pregnant & Lactating Women
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Grant of Financial Assistance to Poor Scheduled Caste Pregnant & Lactating Women” was introduced by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Department, Government of Puducherry. The objective of the scheme is to provide assistance for the well-being of Pregnant and Lactating mothers and their children.

fields.schemeName: Chief Minister Breakfast Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Breakfast Scheme is that Breakfast will be provided to primary school children from 1st to 5th standard studying in Government schools on all school working days.

fields.schemeName: Matritva, Shishu Evam Baalika Madad Yojana
fields.briefDescription: "Maatrtv, Shishu Evan Baalika Madad Yojana" is a initiative of Uttar Pradesh state Government to provide the financial assistance to the mother and her girl child.

fields.schemeName: Cash Award (A.B.O.C.W.W.B)
fields.briefDescription: Cash awards shall be given to the three male & three female children of the registered construction workers in each district to those students who score 75% or above, 65% or less than 75%, and 55% or less than 65% mark in HSLC, AHM and H.S. examinations.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry of Women and Child Development
fields.schemeName: Internship Programme for Women Students / Scholars / Social Activists / Teachers
fields.briefDescription: The Ministry of Women and Child Development launched the Internship Programme aims to harness the talent of the trainees, giving them an opportunity to work towards bringing more efficiency in the implementation of the schemes.

fields.schemeName: National Youth Award
fields.briefDescription: This award is to motivate young persons to achieve excellence in the field of national development or social service and to develop in them a sense of responsibility to the community and thus to improve their potential as good citizens.

fields.schemeName: Group Insurance for Differently Abled Person Government Employees
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Group Insurance for Differently Abled Person Government Employees" was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry. In this scheme, in the case of death due to accident while in service the sum insured will be given to the family of the deceased employee.

fields.schemeName: Maternity Benefit (A.B.O.C.W.W.B)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Maternity Benefit” was started by the Assam Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (A.B.O.C.W.W.B), Labour Welfare Department, Government of Assam for providing financial assistance to the registered women beneficiaries as maternity benefits during the period of maternity.

fields.schemeName: Gambhir Bimari Sahayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The "Gambhir Bimari Sahayata Yojana" is a scheme by the government of Uttar Pradesh, India, to provide financial assistance to registered construction workers for the  treatment from the serious Illness

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Rajya Bridhhabasta Pension Yojana
fields.briefDescription: “Mukhyamantri Rajya Bridhhabasta Pension Yojana” is a Social Security Scheme by the Department of Women, Child Development & Social Security, Government of Jharkhand. The scheme provides financial asistance to the age group of 60 years and above.

fields.schemeName: Award of Post-Matric Scholarship to Scheduled Caste Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Award of Post-Matric Scholarship to Scheduled Caste Students” was introduced by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Dept, Government of Puducherry. The objective of the scheme is to benefit the students who are studying at the Post-matric level or Post-Secondary stage to complete their education.

fields.schemeName: Supply of Sarees and Dhoties to Differently Abled Persons
fields.briefDescription: In this scheme, free dhothies and sarees or equivalent Direct Benefit Transfer are provided to the differently abled persons who are benefited under the monthly financial assistance schemes in lieu of Diwali / Pongal / local regional festivals.

fields.schemeName: Supply of Radio to the Blind Persons
fields.briefDescription: “Supply of Radio to the Blind Persons" was launched by the Dept of Social Welfare, Govt of Puducherry. In this scheme, a radio is provided to the blind person for recreation. The applicant should have disability of 40% or above, and should be a Native/Resident of Puducherry.

fields.schemeName: "Integrated Farming for Productivity Improvement Scheme" by the Coconut Development Board
fields.briefDescription: Through the “Integrated Farming for Productivity Improvement Scheme" by the Coconut Development Board, the coconut farmers are provided financial assistance through DBT (Direct Benefit Transfer) mode for the Laying of the Demonstration Plot, and for the Construction of the Organic Manure Unit.

fields.schemeName: Replanting & Rejuvenation of Coconut Garden" by the Coconut Development Board
fields.briefDescription: Through the scheme “Replanting & Rejuvenation of Coconut Garden (R&R)" by the Coconut Development Board, the coconut farmers are provided financial assistance through DBT (Direct Benefit Transfer) mode for the cutting & removal, replanting, and for integrated management practices.

fields.schemeName: Fruit Development Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to make available to the farmers good quality planting materials in convergence mode and sale at subsidized rates.

fields.schemeName: Plantation Crop Development Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The objectives of the scheme are to boost up the area and production of all plantation crops like Arecanut, Cashewnut, Coconut, Pineapple etc., and to provide a 50 % subsidy for planting materials and construction of a soakage tank.

fields.schemeName: Floriculture Development Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to motivate the farmers to take up floriculture (traditional and non-traditional flowers) as a commercial venture through the distribution of planting materials and other inputs.

fields.schemeName: Masala Shetra Vistar Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Masala Shetra Vistar Yojana was launched by the Government of Madhya Pradesh the whose objective is to expand the area and increase the production of selected spice crops through quality high yielding varieties.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: PM-YASASVI: Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC, and DNT students (who are not covered under SC, ST, or OBC) is welfare and motivation to the children of these categories by providing financial assistance at pre-matriculation or secondary stage.

fields.schemeName: Home for the Aged and Infirm
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Home for the Aged and Infirm" was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry. The objective of this scheme is to cater to the needs of persons who are aged/infirm, i.e. senior citizens, both male and female above the age of 60 years from BPL Family.

fields.schemeName: Assistance to General Farmers for Installation of Submersible / Centrifugal Motor Pumpsets With Accessories
fields.briefDescription: Through this scheme, the farmers from the General Category are provided with a grant of 65% subsidy towards the installation of suitable Submersible / Centrifugal motor pump sets with accessories, subject to a maximum of ₹50,000/‐ per tubewell per individual.

fields.schemeName: "Advance / High Skill Training" Component of the "Development of Industries" Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the skill of those who have completed the basic training and are interested in advanced training in their trade or the candidates having technical qualifications willing to undergo some special high skilled training to start their ventures or to get suitable employment.

fields.schemeName: "Vocational Training" Component of the "Development of Industries" Scheme
fields.briefDescription: "Vocational Training" by the Department of Industries and Commerce, Union Territory of Puducherry aims to create more employment opportunities broadly for the unemployed youth particularly women to pursue wide career openings besides self-ventures by giving training in trades.

Ministry of Women and Child Development

fields.schemeName: Integrated Technology Enabled Agriculture Management System Or iTEAMS
fields.briefDescription: The scheme was launched by the Department of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare, Govt. of Meghalaya to address critical issues of enabling & facilitating access to remunerative & sustainable markets for farmers produce in most transparent & effective manner through facilitation service iTEAM Dial 1917.

fields.schemeName: Indira Gandhi National Vridhavastha Pension Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, the Madhya Pradesh government provides financial support to the citizens whose families live below the poverty line.

fields.schemeName: "Advance / High Skill Training" Component of the "Development of Industries" Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme aims to enhance the skill of those who have completed the basic training and are interested in advanced training in their trade or the candidates having technical qualifications willing to undergo some special high skilled training to start their ventures or to get suitable employment.

fields.schemeName: "Vocational Training" Component of the "Development of Industries" Scheme
fields.briefDescription: "Vocational Training" by the Department of Industries and Commerce, Union Territory of Puducherry aims to create more employment opportunities broadly for the unemployed youth particularly women to pursue wide career openings besides self-ventures by giving training in trades.

fields.schemeName: Bio Control Laboratory and Pesticides Testing Laboratory Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The objective is the production of Bio Control Agents such as Trichoderma, Trichogramma, etc., and further distribution to farmers as awareness and demonstration for organic Plant Health Management in order to promote organic crop production.

fields.schemeName: Nirman Shramik Siksha Kaushal Vikas Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The NIRMAN SHRAMIK SIKSHA KAUSHAL VIKAS YOJANA (NSKKVY) is a scheme launched by the Government of Rajasthan to provide financial assistance for education and skill development to the children of registered construction workers in the state.

fields.nodalMinistryName: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
fields.schemeName: PM-YASASVI: Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC, and DNT students (who are not covered under SC, ST, or OBC) is welfare and motivation to the children of these categories by providing financial assistance at pre-matriculation or secondary stage.

fields.schemeName: National Awards To Teachers (Higher Education)
fields.briefDescription: The purpose of National Awards to Teachers is to celebrate the unique contribution of some of the finest teachers in the country and to honor those teachers who through their commitment and industry have not only improved the quality of school education but also enriched the lives of their students.

fields.schemeName: Pension Scheme for Grade II Deformed Leprosy Patients
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Pension Scheme for Grade II Deformed Leprosy Patients" is a Pension Scheme by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura. The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹2,000/- per month to Leprosy Patients who are residents of Tripura.

fields.schemeName: Integrated Agriculture Training Centre Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide training for enhancing the skills of farmers besides imparting updated agricultural technologies to departmental functionaries.

fields.schemeName: Mukh‍yamantri Janakal‍yaan (Sambal 2.0) Yojana (Asangathit Karmakaar Man‍da)
fields.briefDescription: The Mukhyamantri Jan Kalyan (Sambal 2.0) Yojana is a initiative of Madhya Pradesh government. The scheme will provide much-needed social security to unorganized workers in the state and help them live a dignified life.

fields.schemeName: Award of Pre-Matric Scholarship to Other Economically Backward Class (OEBC) Students
fields.briefDescription: The "Award of Pre-Matric Scholarship to Other Economically Backward Class (OEBC) Students" initiated by the Department of Information & Publicity, Union Territory of Puducherry, is designed to extend financial assistance to OEBC students, mitigating the risk of dropouts due to financial constraints.

fields.schemeName: Award of Puducherry State Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme make sure that no brilliant student is prevented on the grounds of poverty alone from pursuing the academic career. Scholarship is awarded to students in 11th & 12th standards who have secured promotion to the next higher class with 60% & 50% marks in 10th & 11th standard respectively.

fields.schemeName: Plant Protection including Integrated Pest Management Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to mobilize and support farmers to use bio-pesticides and bio- agents for plant health management through distribution of bio-pesticides and other IPM tools and through sale of Sprayers and Plant Protection Equipment to encourage organic crop production.

fields.schemeName: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Allowance to Destitute Women Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Allowance to Destitute Women Scheme” is implemented by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands to provide financial assistance to the poorest and destitute women in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

fields.schemeName: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Widow Pension Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Widow Pension Scheme” is implemented by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands to provide financial assistance to poor and destitute widows in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

fields.schemeName: Laxman Award / Rani Laxmi Bai Award Scheme- Differently-abled and Posthumously
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Laxman Award/Rani Laxmi Bai Award” was launched by the Department of Sports, Government of Uttar Pradesh to honor special sports personalities of the state, differently-abled players and the Laxman Award, the highest sports award of the state will be given posthumously to Shahid.

fields.schemeName: "Advance/High Skill Training in Coir" Component of the "Development of Coir" Scheme
fields.briefDescription: "Advance/High Skill Training in Coir" aims to enhance the skills of Coir artisans and interested individuals. The objective is to acquire the latest skills and modern technologies through advanced/high-skilled training available across various locations in India, offering valuable benefits.

fields.schemeName: Pension Scheme for Cancer Patients
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Pension Scheme for Cancer Patients" was launched by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura. The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹2,000/- to the person suffering from cancer.

fields.schemeName: Vidhva Vivah Uphar Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Rajasthan government's Social Justice and Empowerment Department launched the "Vidhva Vivah Uphar Yojana" program, a social welfare initiative that aims to improve the lives of widow women.

fields.schemeName: Disability Assistance (ANBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to registered construction workers who become disabled due to an accident during the course of their employment on the production of a certificate from competent medical authorities in respect of the percentage of disability.

fields.schemeName: Award of Scholarship to the Cadets Belonging to UT of Puducherry and Studying in Rashtriya Indian Military College, Dehradun
fields.briefDescription: The objective of this scheme is to extend scholarships worth of ₹20,000/- per annum to the cadets belonging to the Union Territory of Puducherry who come from economically weak backgrounds and have been selected for admission into the Rashtriya Indian Military College, Dehradun.

fields.schemeName: Grant of Annual Scholarship to the Students Belonging to UT of Puducherry Selected and Studying in the Sainik School, Amaravathi Nagar, Tamil Nadu
fields.briefDescription: "Grant of Annual Scholarship to the Students Belonging to UT of Puducherry Selected and Studying in the Sainik School, Amaravathi Nagar, Tamil Nadu" is a Scholarship Scheme by the Directorate of School Education, Puducherry. A scholarship of ₹10,000/- per annum per student is provided.

fields.schemeName: Total Health Check-up Scheme (GBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: This scheme facilitates a complete physical examination of the construction workers, which can diagnose potential illnesses and early treatment can prevent major illnesses. Hence, major illness can be avoided and the construction worker can lead a healthy life.

fields.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Work Form Home-Job Work Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The main objective of the "Mukhyamantri Work from Home" Scheme is to provide an opportunity for the women of the state to get employment sitting at home and to empower women by providing them with financial help by giving them work.

fields.schemeName: "SUPER 30" Scheme
fields.briefDescription: "Super 30" was launched by the Directorate of Secondary Education, Tripura. The scheme aims to provide free coaching for JEE/ NEET to the students who are appearing in the class 10th Board Final Exam and want to pursue Science Stream in Class 11th & 12th with the aspiration to crack JEE/NEET.

fields.schemeName: Dr. Muthulakshmi Reddy Ninaivu Inter-caste Marriage Assistance Scheme-I
fields.briefDescription: The 'Dr. Muthulakshmi Reddy Ninaivu Inter-caste Marriage Assistance Scheme' was launched by the Social Welfare & Women Empowerment Dept. Tamil Nadu. The aim is to abolish caste & community discrimination by encouraging inter-caste marriage by giving financial assistance to newly married couples.

fields.schemeName: Farm Pond (Khet Talai) Nirman Karyakram
fields.briefDescription: Under the Farm Pond (Khet Talaee) Nirmaan Kaaryakram scheme provied to help the farmers of Rajasthan to collect rain water and use it for irrigation purposes so that the farmers can get sufficient water for irrigation in their fields.

fields.schemeName: Funeral Assistance Scheme (PBAOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The "Funeral Assistance" is a Welfare Scheme by the Puducherry Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Union Territory of Puducherry. Through this scheme, the Board may sanction an amount of ₹7,000/- to the nominees/dependents of the deceased Construction Worker.

fields.schemeName: Award of Scholarship to the Children who are Recipients of National Child Award for Exceptional Achievements and Other National / International Merit Awards
fields.briefDescription: The objectives of this scheme are to recognize the talents of children who are recipients of the National Child Award for Exceptional Achievements and other National/International Merit Awards and to recognize the talents of children who are pursuing outstanding achievements in different fields.

fields.schemeName: Annai Teresa Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Orphan Girls-II
fields.briefDescription: "Annai Teresa Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Orphan Girls-I" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Dept, Govt of Tamil Nadu. The scheme provides financial assistance to the orphan girls for their marriage. The bride should be 18 years or older during her marriage.

fields.schemeName: Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Koshal Sanvardhan Yojana (RS-CSEP)
fields.briefDescription: The Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Koshal Sanvardhan Yojana, offered by the Rajasthan Knowledge Corporation Limited (RKCL), provides free training in spoken English and personality development for women and girls.

fields.schemeName: Winter Cropping & Development of Cultivable Land Scheme
fields.briefDescription: The objectives of the scheme are to bring more areas under cultivation during the normally lean winter season under different crops other than paddy and increase production and productivity of various crops like cereals, pulses, oilseeds, and vegetables during the Rabi season.

fields.schemeName: Hostel Assistance Scheme for Children of Migrant Construction Workers (GBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, hostel facilities for free accommodation and meals shall be provided to the children of migrant construction workers in primary school. The aim of the scheme is to provide primary, secondary, and higher education to the children of migrant construction workers.

fields.schemeName: Shramik Basera Yojana (GBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, the accommodation facilities will be provided @ ₹5/- per day to registered construction workers in temporary prefabricated housing with basic amenities that can be dismantled.

fields.schemeName: Diggy
fields.briefDescription: Rajasthan Government has started the Diggy Scheme for the welfare of farmers, under which farmers will be provided grants for making dig for irrigation of crops. This scheme is to help farmers improve their farming by using more water resources and encourage them to grow good crops.

fields.schemeName: Housing Subsidy Scheme (GBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: The main objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to construction workers registered with the Gujarat Building and Other Construction Worker’s Welfare Board to build their own houses.

fields.schemeName: Scheme of Giving Awards to Eminent Artists - Kalai Valarmani Award
fields.briefDescription: "Scheme of Giving Awards to Eminent Artists - Kalai Valarmani Award" by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu aims to promote and preserve the culture of Tamil Nadu. The selected artists are awarded financial assistance ₹6,000/- and certificates of appreciation.

fields.schemeName: Mini Sprinkler Sanyantr
fields.briefDescription: The Mini Sprinkler Sanyantr scheme provided a subsidy to the farmers can irrigate more land by getting sprinkler subsidy. The subsidy given by the state government to the farmers will be sent directly to their bank account through DBT.

fields.schemeName: Green House
fields.briefDescription: Under the Green House Scheme Farmers can get the benefit of subsidy on green house and earn more income by cultivating horticultural crops like vegetables, flowers, fruits etc. by controlling the ago-climatic factors, temperature, humidity and sunlight.

fields.schemeName: Chhatraon Ke Liye Protsahan Rashi
fields.briefDescription: In the "Chhatraon Ke Liye Protsahan Rashi" scheme to encourages girl students to study agriculture subject and provides financial assistance to economically disadvantaged students who may face challenges in accessing education due to financial constraints.

fields.schemeName: Kisan Kaleva Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Under the Kisan Kaleva Scheme run by the Rajasthan Government, food is provided at concessional rates through coupons to the farmers and their assistants who come to sell crops in the vegetable market premises.

fields.schemeName: One Time Cash Incentive towards acquiring BEd, BPEd, DTEd, PGDCA (Sainik Welfare)
fields.briefDescription: "One Time Cash Incentive towards acquiring BEd, BPEd, DTEd, PGDCA" is a Welfare Scheme by the Armed Forces Flag Day Fund of the Department of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, up to ₹20,000/- is provided to the unemployed Ex-servicemen to pursue the mentioned programs/courses.

fields.schemeName: "Outstanding Artisan of the Year" under “Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries - State Awards to Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises”
fields.briefDescription: The "Outstanding Artisan of the Year" award is conferred upon the artisan who has been a participant for 3 years in National / International handicraft exhibitions/fairs. The awardee is given a cash award of ₹2,00,000/- and a citation. The applications are accepted offline in the prescribed form.

fields.schemeName: Scheme of Extending Financial Assistance to Folk Artists, Troupes for the Purchase of Musical Instruments, Costumes
fields.briefDescription: "Scheme of Extending Financial Assistance to Folk Artists, Troupes for the Purchase of Musical Instruments, Costumes" was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme provides a sum of ₹2,000/- to individual folk artists & ₹6,000/- for cultural troupes.

fields.schemeName: Kam Lagat Pyaaj Bhandaran Sanrachna
fields.briefDescription: Under the Kam Lagat Pyaaj Bhandaran Sanrachna yojana Construction of warehouses should be done at a high level to prevent moisture and dampness which occur due to direct contact of onions with soil.

fields.schemeName: Award to Scheduled Castes Students Who Secured Top Ranks at State and District Level in Standard X & XII (Sahuji Maharaj Assistance)
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, Scheduled Castes Category students who have Secured Top Ranks at State and District Levels in Gujarat in Standard X & XII are given cash prizes. Cash prizes are awarded to the first three students who secure the highest ranks in both Standard X and Standard XII across all streams.

fields.schemeName: Coaching Assistance to Scheduled Castes Students for Preparation of Examination Like IIM, NIFT, NLU, CEPT
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to Students of the Scheduled Castes category who are preparing for examinations like IIM, NIFT, NLU, and CEPT.

fields.schemeName: Dr. P. G. Solanki Scheme for Loan/Assistance to Law Graduates of Scheduled Caste
fields.briefDescription: The scheme was launched in year 1973. Under this scheme, law graduates belonging to the Scheduled Caste who intend to start independent legal practice will receive financial assistance for the purchase of business premises/shops.

fields.schemeName: Grant of Financial Assistance for Purchase of Textbooks/Notebooks to School-Going Children of Industrial Workers/Employees (GLWB)
fields.briefDescription: Through this scheme, the children of industrial workers/employees, studying in classes 1st to 4th in recognized/approved schools are provided financial assistance for the purchase of textbooks/notebooks. The scheme aims to provide financial support for the educational needs of the children.

fields.schemeName: Coaching Assistance Scheme for Preparation of Recruitment Exams for Scheduled Caste Students
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to Students of SC category who are preparing for all State Government and Central Government Recruitment Examinations of Class– 1, 2 & 3 conducted by UPSC/GPSC/State Commission/Bank/LIC/Subordinate Services Selection Board/District Panchayat Selection Board.

fields.schemeName: Poompuhar State Award
fields.briefDescription: "Poompuhar State Award" was launched by the Dept of Handlooms, Handicrafts, Textiles & Khadi, Tamil Nadu. The awardees are given ₹50,000, a 4-gram gold medal, tamirapathiram and a certificate. The economically backward awardees are also eligible for monthly pension of ₹3,500/- after 60 years of age.

fields.schemeName: Book Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)
fields.briefDescription: "Book Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows" is a Welfare Scheme by the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, the wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM studying in Government-recognized Institutions are provided allowances towards the purchase of books.

fields.schemeName: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Shramik Pravidhik Shiksha Sahaayata Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Government of Uttar Pradesh initiated a scheme "Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Shramik Pravidhik Shiksha Sahaayata Yojana" to encourage the children towards the education.

fields.schemeName: Ganesh Shankar Vidyaarthi Shramik Puraskar Rashi Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Government of Uttar Pradesh initiated a scheme "Ganesh Shankar Vidyarthi Shramik Puraskar Raschi Yojana" to encourage the children towards the education.

fields.schemeName: Naye Fal Bagicho Ki Sthapana
fields.briefDescription: Under the "Naye Fal Bagecho Ki Sthapana" subsidies to Increase farmers' income by facilitating the cultivation of high-value fruit crops that have a potentially higher market demand and profitability compared to traditional crops.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to Meet the Funeral Expenses of Differently Abled Person
fields.briefDescription: The scheme 'Financial Assistance to Meet the Funeral Expenses of Differently Abled Person' was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons. In this scheme, financial assistance of ₹2,000/- is provided to meet the expenses in connection with funeral, in the event of the...

fields.schemeName: Assistance for Power Driven Chaff Cutter Scheme under Scheduled Castes Sub Plan (SC Category)
fields.briefDescription: The scheme provides financial assistance to dairy farmers belonging to Scheduled Caste category on purchase of electric powered chaff cutters. By using power driven chaff cutter, dairy farmers can reduce wastage of green &dry fodder which is economically important for their profitable dairy farming.

fields.schemeName: SC/ST Pre Matric Scholarship - Uttar Pradesh
fields.briefDescription: The Uttar Pradesh Social Welfare Department offers a Pre Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) students. This scholarship aims to financially assist students from these categories to pursue secondary education and complete their matriculation.

fields.schemeName: OBC Pre Matric Scholarship-Uttar Pradesh
fields.briefDescription: The Uttar Pradesh Social Welfare Department offers a Pre Matric Scholarship for Other Backward Class (OBC) students. This scholarship aims to financially assist students from these categories to pursue secondary education and complete their matriculation.

fields.schemeName: Medical Assistance for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: "Medical Assistance for the Construction Workers" was launched by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept, Delhi. The registered workers are given medical assistance upto ₹ 10,000/- in case of being hospitalized for 5 or more days due to an accident or disease.

fields.schemeName: Maintenance Allowance for Persons Affected with Muscular Dystrophy
fields.briefDescription: The 'Maintenance Allowance for Persons Affected with Muscular Dystrophy' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a maintenance allowance to the person affected with muscular dystrophy.

fields.schemeName: Maintenance Allowance to Severely Affected Persons
fields.briefDescription: The 'Maintenance Allowance to Severely Affected Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons. The scheme aims to provide a maintenance allowance to the severely affected persons who cannot be rehabilitated by any other assistance.

fields.schemeName: Funeral Assistance for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: The "Funeral Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides funeral assistance of ₹10,000/- in case of death of a member to their nominees/dependents.

fields.schemeName: Alpasankhyak Post-Maitrik Chhaatravrtti Yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Alpasankhyak Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme under the Madhya Pradesh Government is to provide financial assistance to students from minority communities in Madhya Pradesh pursuing post-secondary education.

fields.schemeName: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Mandi shramik kalyaan yojana
fields.briefDescription: The Agriculture Department of Rajasthan runs the Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Mandi Shramik Kalyan Yojana, a program that offers a range of assistance programs to improve the well-being of mandi laborers.

fields.schemeName: Readers Allowance to Visually Impaired Persons
fields.briefDescription: 'Readers Allowance to Visually Impaired Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide readers allowance to visually impaired students, specific allowance rates based on the education level.

fields.schemeName: AlCTE - Distinguished Professional Scheme
fields.briefDescription: AICTE-Distinguished Professionals Scheme has been launched by the All India Council for Technical Education, Ministry of Education to improve the quality of Technical Education in India by utilizing the expertise of Professionals, Emeritus professors & Eminent Personalities to share their knowledge.

fields.schemeName: Early Intervention Centre for the Visually Impaired
fields.briefDescription: The "Early Intervention Centre for the Visually Impaired" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, visually impaired children are identified, assessed and prepared to join main stream education in 6 districts.

fields.schemeName: West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Death Assistance
fields.briefDescription: "West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Death Assistance" is a social welfare scheme by the West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Government of West Bengal, that provides an one time assistance to the nominee in case of natural death/accidental death of the migrant worker.

fields.schemeName: West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Repatriation of Dead Body
fields.briefDescription: "West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Repatriation of Dead Body" is a social welfare scheme implemented by the West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Board, that provides an one time assistance to the nominee for bringing the dead body of the registered migrant worker in case of death.

fields.schemeName: West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Cremation
fields.briefDescription: "West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Cremation" is a social welfare scheme by the West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Government of West Bengal, that provides an one time assistance to the nominee of the worker for cremation when the worker dies.

fields.schemeName: Scholarship (Above VIII Standard) - Tamil Nadu
fields.briefDescription: The 'Scholarship (Above VIII Standard) by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide scholarships to differently-abled students studying in government school/colleges/training centre

fields.schemeName: Fitter Training to Hearing Impaired Persons
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Fitter Training to Hearing Impaired Persons" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to give fitter training to the hearing-impaired candidates at the ITI, Guindy for two years and a stipend of ₹300 per month.

fields.schemeName: Chief Minister’s Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme - Tamil Nadu
fields.briefDescription: Chief Minister Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme launched on 23.07.2009 as kalaingar Kaappittu Thittam. Now the scheme from January 2022 to 2027 is implemented through United India Insurance Company.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance for Treatment of Chronic Diseases (HBOCWWB)
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹1,00,000/- is provided to registered workers for indoor treatment of chronic diseases like Cancer, TB, AIDS, etc. as per government rules.

fields.schemeName: Battery Operated Wheelchair by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department
fields.briefDescription: The 'Battery Operated Wheelchair by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons Department' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, battery-operated wheel chairs are given to muscular dystrophy & tetraplegia persons.

fields.schemeName: Loan for the Purchase of Work Tool for the Construction Workers
fields.briefDescription: "Loan for the Purchase of Work Tool for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept., Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides an amount not exceeding ₹20,000/- as loan to the members of the fund, for the purchase of work related tools.

fields.schemeName: Bicycle Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹5,000/- is provided to the workers employed in the industrial and commercial establishments of the state of Haryana for the purchase of a new bicycle for commuting on duty from their residence to the establishments.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to Widow/Dependent in case of Death of a Worker- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹2,00,000/- is given to the widow or dependent of the worker working in the industrial and commercial establishments of Haryana state in case of his death due to any reason.

fields.schemeName: Assistance for Delivery of a Child or the Miscarriage of Pregnancy or the Termination of Pregnancy
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Assistance for Delivery of a Child or the Miscarriage of Pregnancy or the Termination of Pregnancy" was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to give financial assistance for the delivery of a child, miscarriage, or termination of pregnancy

fields.schemeName: West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme 2024: Grant to Industrial Cooperative Society
fields.briefDescription: “Grant to Industrial Cooperative Society” is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme 2024”, by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal. It aims to create, support and sustain an enabling ecosystem for strengthening creativity and capacity of the artisans.

fields.schemeName: Scheme of Financial Assistance for Publication of Manuscripts/Research Journals
fields.briefDescription: The "Scheme of Financial Assistance for Publication of Manuscripts/Research Journals" was launched by the Arts and Culture Department of Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for publishing manuscripts/research journals.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Conservation and Development of Indigenous Cattle and Murrah Development
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Department of Animal Husbandry & Dairying, Government of Haryana with the objective of encouraging the farmers for conservation and development of the indigenous breeds of cows and buffaloes.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Establishment of Hi-Tech and Mini Dairy Units
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, unemployed persons will be assisted by way of providing financial assistance in form of subsidy for establishing dairy units of 4, 10, 20 & 50 milch animals like buffaloes, indigenous cows (Hariana, Sahiwal, Belahi, Red Sindhi, Tharparkar and Gir breeds only) and crossbred cows.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities to Scheduled Castes by Establishing Livestock Units
fields.briefDescription: This is a credit-linked scheme with a primary objective of providing self-employment opportunities to Schedule castes, the unemployed persons will be assisted by way of establishing Dairy units, Piggery units, and Sheep/Goat units.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance to Indigent Tamil Scholars
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "Financial Assistance to Indigent Tamil Scholars" was launched by the Arts & Culture Department, Puducherry. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹1,500 per month to indigent artists aged 58 years & above & contribution to Tamil language & literature must be of significance.

fields.schemeName: Nehru Child Literature Prize
fields.briefDescription: The Arts and Culture Department of Puducherry launched the "Nehru Child Literature Prize" scheme for authors/writers. Financial assistance with a certificate will be provided for their contribution to children's literature books published in Tamil.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistance for Stage III & IV Cancer Patients
fields.briefDescription: The scheme “Financial Assistance for Stage III & IV Cancer Patients” was launched by the Social Justice & Empowerment Department, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, a monthly financial assistance of ₹3,000/- will be provided to Stage III & IV cancer patients of Haryana from 01.01.2024.

fields.schemeName: West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme: Facilitation Supports
fields.briefDescription: “Facilitation Supports” is a sub-scheme under "West Bengal Artisans Financial Benefit Scheme 2024”, implemented by the MSME and Textiles Dept, Government of West Bengal. It aims to provide various types of facilitation support to the artisans and Industrial Cooperative Societies.

fields.schemeName: Education Loan for Persons with Disabilities- Haryana
fields.briefDescription: Under this scheme, education loans of up to ₹50 lakhs are provided to persons with disabilities (OH/VH/HH/MR) for pursuing professional and technical education both in India and abroad.

fields.schemeName: Comprehensive Educational Loan Scheme - Sikkim
fields.briefDescription: The "Comprehensive Educational Loan Scheme" was launched by the Department of Personnel, and Reforms, Training, Public Grievances, Government of Sikkim. The scheme aims to provide loans free of interest for the duration of one particular course of study with one one-year moratorium period offered...

fields.schemeName: Education Loan Scheme- Credit Line 2 for Minority Community
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam, aims to provide education loans to sections of minority population on the basis of "Creamy Layer". These loans support pursuing general/professional/technical courses at graduate levels or higher.

fields.schemeName: State Award for Teachers
fields.briefDescription: The scheme "State Awards to Teachers" aims to celebrate the unique contribution of the finest teachers in the state and honor those who have improved the quality of school education and enriched students' lives. Ten state awards consisting of ₹100,000 and a citation each are provided to teachers.

fields.schemeName: Saksham Scheme for Backward Classes
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, loans of up to ₹10,00,000/- are provided to young professionals for setting up Doctors' Clinics, Nursing Homes, Physiotherapy Clinics, Bio-Medical Labs, Lawyers' Offices, Engineering Units, Chemist Shops, Architect Offices, and similar establishments.

fields.schemeName: Financial Assistive Devices for Persons with Disabilities
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under the scheme, loans of up to ₹5 lakhs are provided to persons with disabilities who are either employed in reputable organizations or have received confirmed appointment letters.

fields.schemeName: Term Loan Scheme for Backward Classes
fields.briefDescription: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under this scheme, loans of up to ₹15,00,000/- are provided at an annual interest rate of 6% to 8% to individuals from the Backward Classes to enhance their employability.

beneficiaryState: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
fields.schemeName: Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS): Scheme For Reimbursement Of Stamp Duty
fields.briefDescription: “Scheme For Reimbursement Of Stamp Duty'' under the “Investment Promotion Scheme (IPS)”, implemented by the Dept. of Industries, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide reimbursement on Stamp duty to the new units as well as the units undertaking expansion/ diversification.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Providing Employment Opportunities to Scheduled Castes by Establishing Livestock Units under Mukhya Mantri Antyodaya Parivaar Utthan Yojana
fields.briefDescription: Under the scheme, an unemployed resident of Haryana belonging to the Scheduled Caste category can avail a subsidy for purchasing livestock. This subsidy will be provided after the establishment of the livestock units and can be availed as a loan by the beneficiary.

fields.schemeName: Scheme for Establishment of Backyard Poultry Units
fields.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to improve the socio-economic and nutritional status of the poor families, small farmers and landless agricultural labourers and other economically weaker section of the society.
